THROAT. ► Objective. ► *Much mucus in the back of the throat , which is only loosened after much hawking, [5] . ► Much mucus in the throat, especially in the morning, [4] . ► Frequently much mucus in the throat (first three days), [1] . [490.] ► Tenacious mucus in the back of the throat, in the morning, which can be neither completely swallowed nor hawked up, with a constant sensation as though a lump of mucus were sticking in the throat (sixteenth day), [1] . ► Hawking, with expectoration, in the morning, [1] . ► Increased hawking of mucus (nineteenth day), [3] . ► Subjective. ► Dryness far back in the throat, [6] . ► Feeling of a lump in the throat, [1] . ► On waking in the morning, feeling of a little lump in front of the throat about the root of the tongue, worse on swallowing saliva, which makes it smart; better on swallowing food, which makes it seem to go lower; worse after singing in evening, [8] . ► Something like a plug sticking in the throat, which is loosened by the cough, and the larynx becomes free, [1] . ► Anxious pressure in the throat, [1] . ► Soreness of throat, worse on swallowing saliva, better by swallowing food, came on in the evening and lasted all night; soreness next evening, worse after singing, [8] . ► Soreness of throat seems to go into ears when swallowing food or saliva, [8] . [500.] ► Sore throat, with difficult swallowing and difficult opening of the mouth, [1] . ► Sore throat on the left side; he feels a lump there, with sticking on empty swallowing, [6] . ► Sore pain in the throat, [1] . ► Sore pain in the throat, above in the palate, on empty swallowing , also worse on swallowing food, is only noticed when swallowing, [1] . ► Scraping sensation in the throat , it feels dry, parched, and rough (after five or six days), [7] . ► Scraping and scratching in the throat (after eight days), [1] . ► Smarting sore throat on swallowing, [1] . ► Roughness in the throat, on uncovering the body, [1] . ► Great roughness in the throat, with much sneezing, [1] . ► Throat rough, with a cough , [1] . [510.] ► Throat very rough and hoarse for several days, [4] . ► Crawling in the throat, which provokes hawking and coughing , with a feeling of firmly adherent mucus, in the morning and evening (twelfth, twenty-second and twenty-ninth days), [2] . ► Uvula and Tonsils. ► Elongation of the uvula, with stiffness of the nape of the neck, [3] . ► Tonsils feel swollen as if touching, causing feeling of suffocation, worse on lying down; the swollen feeling always comes on at the same time as the stiffness in neck and back, [8] . ► Pharynx and sophagus. ►► *Sticking pain in the pharynx, as if there were a fishbone in it , if he becomes cold , [1] . ► Pressure and tearing in the sophagus (ninth day), [2] . ► Sensitiveness of the sophagus; warm food burns it; she is able to take only lukewarm nourishment, [1] . ► Swallowing. ►► *Difficult swallowing , the food descends the sophagus very slowly, [1] . ► *Swallowing is hindered in the throat , [1] . ► The food will not go down; she is quite unable to swallow dry or cold things, [1] . ► Throat Externally. [520.] ► Swelling of the cervical glands (after five and fourteen days), [1] . ► Swelling of the cervical glands of both sides, with pain on turning the head, [1] . ► Swelling of the cervical glands; tickling so that she is obliged to press upon them with the cold hand in order to relieve it, [1] . ► Right cervical gland became swollen in the evening, [8] . ► Hard swelling of the cervical glands, at the angle of the lower jaw, [1] . ► Hard swelling of the parotid gland near the articulation of the jaw, with pain when touched, [1] . ► Swelling of a gland beneath the chin; it is painful after taking cold, [1] . ► Rush of blood to the neck, [1] . ► The neck seems thicker than usual, and the neckcloth too tight, [1] . ► Sticking in the cervical glands, [1] . [530.] ► The cervical glands are painful as after taking cold (third day), [1] . ► Both sides of neck tender to touch, or on moving head, [8] . ► Submaxillary glands painful to touch, [6] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-c. THROAT. ► Every attempt to swallow gave great pain (after one hour), [14] .

THROAT. ► Objective. ► Inflammation and swelling of the whole throat and even of the neck, [2] . ► Yellowish-gray spots and ulcers in the throat, [2] . ► Subjective. ► Dryness and frequent cramp in the throat, with apprehensiveness, [3] . ► *A feeling of dryness and itching was experienced in the throat, with burning at the epigastrium, copious salivation, running from the nose, intense injection of the conjunctivæ, and lachrymation , [24] . ► Disagreeable dryness and irritation in his throat (third day), [7] . ► Burning and rawness in the throat, as from heartburn (thirteenth day), [1] . [290.] ► Feeling of constriction in the throat, [6] . ► Choking in the throat, as if something were sticking in it; on hawking, a piece of thick mucus was raised, and the choking ceased (after six days), [1] . ► Dull stitches and ulcerative pain in the left side of the throat, only when swallowing, worse in the evening, [1] . ► Sore throat; sticking and a feeling of pressure in it on swallowing; even on reading she experiences pain (twenty-first and twenty-second days), [1] . ► Scraping sensation in the throat, with sanguineous congestion, [2] . ► Rawness and scraping in the throat, [1] . ► Rawness and dryness in the throat, with frequent hacking cough, in the morning in bed (third day), [1] . ► Sense of occlusion of the posterior nares (fourth day), [34] . ► Burning and uneasy sensation in the sophagus and stomach, [18] . ► The act of swallowing was painful and difficult, and there were redness and swelling of the soft palate and tonsils (particularly the right), [24] . ► External Throat. [300.] ► *The glands in the neck enlarged , [31] . ► The glands in the neck suddenly enlarged, and to a degree highly disfiguring; at least two months elapsed before the swellings showed the slightest symptom of subsidence (after three weeks), [32] . ► *Swelling of the whole thyroid gland, increasing very rapidly, with some sensitiveness to touch, and pressure (after eight days), [27] . ► A small swelling became after three years a large bronchocele, a ponderous tumor, [33] . ► *Swelling on the neck like goitre , [2] . ► (Sensitiveness of the goitre to touch), [1] . ► The goitre seems smaller and softer for a short time, [1] . ► Swelling of the cervical and maxillary glands, [2] . ► Swelling of submaxillary region, [49] . ► Swelling of the parotids, with lancinating, crampy, distensive pains in the entire jaw, [2] . [310.] ► Bellows-mumur in the carotids, [54] . ► Muscular pain, extending over the whole region of the neck (fourth day), [34] .

THROAT. ► Hawking of mucus in the afternoon, with expectoration of a piece having the form and consistence of liver, of a sweetish taste, [13] . ► Pain in the throat (fourth day), [25] . ► Burning in the throat for three days, relieved for only a short time by cold drinks, [13] . ► Frightful burning in the throat, stomach, and intestines, [39] . ► Pressive pain in the throat like commencing inflammation, lasting twenty-four hours (after nine hours), [15] . ► Cutting pain in the throat, as if in the larynx, with impeded swallowing (after eight days), [14] . ► Sticking pain in the throat, in the morning on rising, also externally on pressing on the larynx and on eating, [13] . [310.] ► Sticking pain in the throat, aggravated by swallowing, [13] . ► Sticking in the middle of the throat and fauces, when swallowing, [15] . ► Sticking pain in the left side of the throat when swallowing and speaking, relieved by taking food (sixteenth and seventeenth days), [13] . ► Sore throat day and night, with inflammation of the arch of the palate and uvula for four days (after ten days), [13] . ► Sore throat at night, very violent, as if the throat would grow together, and as if she could not get air through it, [13] . ► Sore pain in the throat (third day), [23] . ► Rawness in the throat immediately, [13] . ► Rawness in the throat, with hoarseness and burning in the pharynx like heartburn, [13] . ► Rawness and scraping in the throat; she was frequently obliged to hawk, which caused pain in the chest; in the evening and morning (after eight days), [13] . ► Rawness in the choanæ, as if coryza would occur (first day), [22] . [320.] ► After the most violent paroxysms of cough there was frequently experienced scraping in the throat, as from acidity of the stomach (from which I had never before suffered), [26b] . ► Tickling in the throat; he was obliged to hawk, but raised nothing, [13] . ► Uvula and Tonsils. ► Uvula and tonsils red, with painful swallowing of saliva aversion to smoking, and general prostration, towards evening (second day), [25] . ► sophagus. ► Glutinous sensation in the sophagus, as though the mucous membrane were covered with a thick glutinous jelly (fifth day), [24] . ► Soreness of the sophagus so great, that for five days she was unable to swallow irritating food or drink, [11] . ► She swallowed very easily whenever she ate, [13] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-n.

rectum.text:
RECTUM AND ANUS. ► Painful retraction of the anus, especially violent on the days when there were no stools, lasting several months, [23] . ► Burning in the anus after a normal evacuation, [35] . ► Burning in the anus after a pasty stool (one hundred and twenty-seventh day), [35] . [960.] ► Burning in the anus after the second rather thin stool (fifth day), [35] . ► Burning in the anus for a long time after a scanty evacuation in the morning (sixty-ninth day), [35] . ► Burning and pressure in the anus for a short time in the forenoon (thirty-fourth day), [35] . ► Burning pain in the anus, [25] . ► Fulness in the hæmorrhoidal vessels (thirty-fourth day), [35] . ► Sensation of a plug in the anus while sitting in the afternoon (ninety-third day), [35] . ► Dragging in the anus, [35] . ► Dragging and biting in the anus at noon (ninety-first day), [35] . ► Dragging in the anus and tenesmus of the sphincter at noon (seventy-first day), [35] . ► Dragging and burning in the hæmorrhoidal vessels after active exercise (thirty-sixth day), [35] . [970.] ► Much dragging in the anus after a somewhat hard stool, afterwards great pressure in the hæmorrhoidal vessels, still later, at times, dragging and pressure in the anus, which even amounted to acute pain; during dinner the pain was so violent that he could scarcely sit (ninety-fourth day), [35] . ► Great dragging in the hæmorrhoidal vessels, with a feeling of soreness in the anus (ninety-second day), [35] . ► Indescribable sensation of twinging and pressure in the anus, as though violent diarrha would ensue, and sudden relief after the emission of flatulence (seventeenth day), [26] . ► Pressure in the anus at noon (ninety-third day), [35] . ► Pressure in the anus after a normal stool (twenty-third day), [35] . ► Pressure in the hæmorrhoidal vessels, while sitting after active exercise, in the evening (ninety-sixth day), [35] . ► Great pressure and burning in the anus, with desire for stool, in the forenoon, but only emission of flatulence; while still at stool, sudden outbreak of perspiration over the skin, especially on the face, where it ran down in streams, disappearing as suddenly as it came on (ninety-fifth day), [35] . ► Stitches in the anus (one hundred and twenty-sixth day), [85] . ► Feeling of soreness in the anus (seventy-fourth day), [35] . ► Sore pain in the anus, preventing walking, towards evening, [25] . [980.] ► Sore pain in the anus after prolonged motion, [25] . ► Itching in the anus, [35] . ► Violent itching in the anus while walking (fifteenth day), [35] . ► Desire for stool towards noon, [25] . ► Violent, ineffectual urging to stool after dinner (seventy-first day), [35] .
STOOL. ► Diarrha. ► A little diarrha, [57] . ► Diarrha constant, and the evacuations passed away involuntarily; the bed was perfectly swamped, [46] . ►► *Diarrha-like stool, consisting of brown frothy water , with excessively painful pressure, urging, and tenesmus in the anus (following a normal evacuation); these stools were repeated seven or eight times, accompanied by constant pain in abdomen and by nausea and inclination to vomit, after which there followed sudden complete rest (tenth day), [26] . ► Very profuse diarrha-like stools at times (thirtieth to thirty-fifth day), [23] . ► Stool in the evening, with some griping in the abdomen, tolerably consistent, followed by a diarrha-like stool, after which there was a feeling of tenesmus for some time (seventeenth day), [26] . [990.] ► Evacuation towards evening somewhat formed, afterwards like diarrha (thirty-first day), [26] . ► Purging, [49] . ► In a small dose, a few centigrammes, it acts as a purgative, [44] . ► Slightly purged, the evacuations being of a greenish-yellow color, [45] . ► Violent purging, almost incessant, of mucus and blood; bowels evacuated as he lay in bed, [52] . ► *Stools bloody and extremely painful , [58] . ► *Dysenteric attacks for several successive years , lasting about three weeks; frequent bloody motions, with gnawing pain at the navel, followed by ineffectual straining, [22] . ► Involuntary liquid stools had passed as she lay dressed on the bed (after one hour and a half), [51] . ► Frequent dejections of dark coffee-colored stools, [47] . ► Several stools natural color and consistence (second day), [42] . [1000.] ► Two liquid stools in quick succession, in the morning, followed after some minutes by burning in the anus (eighteenth day), [35] . ► For a long time after the proving there were two daily evacuations of the bowels, the first normal and the second diarrha-like, [26] . ► Stool twice during the day, in the morning and also after dinner, very unusual; the evacuation was scanty and not thin (fifty-fifth day), [35] . ► Pasty stools, followed by a sensation as if too little had been passed (thirty-sixth day), [23] . ► Pale, slate-colored stools, [20] . ► Scanty, pale, clay-colored stools, sometimes twice a day, [1] . ► Violently urgent desire for stool woke her at 6 A.M.; she was unable to reach the closet soon enough; the watery contents of the intestines spurted from her; such violent tenesmus followed that she was unable to rise from the stool (second day), [30] . ► Semiliquid stool, after rising in the morning, followed by some griping in the intestines (one hundred and second day), [35] . ► Urging to stool for the third time, only a scanty evacuation, at most a spoonful of liquid, which, however, seemed to relieve the discomfort in the abdomen, in the forenoon (ninety-fifth day), [35] . ► A profuse evacuation, whereby the abdomen was very much relieved, was followed after an hour by complete disappearance of the pain, which, however, returned after dinner (one hundred and sixteenth day), [35] . [1010.] ► Copious loose stool, [1] . ► Copious thin stool, without griping, tenesmus, or other painful sensation, about 11 A.M.; some time after the stool an uncomfortable feeling in the abdomen, with distension and slight pressure in the anus; after dinner renewed desire for stool, but only emission of flatulence (sixty-ninth day), [35] . ► Copious dark-colored evacuation, with tenesmus (fifth day), [2] . ► One loose passage (eighth day), [6] . ► Soft stool, followed by burning in the anus (fifty-third day), [35] . ► Pasty stool (sixth day), [35] . ► Stool immediately after rising in the morning (an unusual time), followed by a feeling of soreness in the anus (fifty-ninth day), [35] . ► *Hard evacuation, followed by burning and pressure in the anus , in the morning (ninety-first day), [35] . ► Stool very hard, lumpy (twenty-second day), [31a] . ► *Stool scanty, lumpy, followed by burning in the anus (eighth day), [35] . ► Constipation. [1020.] ► Disposition to constipation, and then symptoms aggravated, [22] . ► Constipation; no stool (seventh and eighth days); hard, unsatisfactory evacuation (ninth day), [26] . ► Constipation, with pain across the loins, [22] . ► Periodic constipation occurring every three months, [22] . ► Generally costive, [22] . ► Bowels habitually costive (reaction?), [52] . ► Bowels always costive, [22] . ► Evacuation of the bowels difficult and painful; fæces extremely hard, [25] . ► Evacuation of the bowels hard and infrequent, accompanied by protrusion of the rectum, lasting fourteen days after the proving, [34] . ► Evacuation from the bowels scanty and hard (thirty-seventh day), [23] . [1030.] ► *Scanty, hard stool, followed by burning in the anus (thirty-fourth day), [35] . ► Hard, unsatisfactory stool in the morning (ninety-second day), [35] . ► Evacuation of the bowels towards noon extremely difficult, hard, and unsatisfactory (fifth day), [26] . ► Evacuation of the bowels suppressed (fourth day), [26] .

STOOL. ► Diarrha. ► Diarrha in the evening, [4] . ► Diarrha, at night, with intolerable pain in the abdomen, which also lasts the following day, [4] . ► Diarrha, every night from 3 to 4 o'clock (first week), [1] . ► Diarrha, without pain, rumbling in the bowels, [3] . [820.] ► Diarrha, with griping low down in the abdomen preceding and following, [3] . ► Diarrha the first fourteen days, with great weariness, lying down, loss of appetite, and daily colic; fæces light-colored and gray, [1] . ► Great diarrha, day and night (after twenty-two days), [4] . ► Great diarrha, with great weariness (after twenty-seven days), [4] . ► Severe diarrha, with much colic (after four days), [1] . ► Diarrha-like stool, with biting pain in the anus (after eight days), [1] . ► Diarrha-like stool, with griping in the abdomen preceding it, and followed by burning in the rectum, [1] . ► Three scanty, though otherwise natural, stools (first day), [5] . ► Two liquid stools, preceded by rumbling in the bowels, [5] . ► Hard, scanty stool, in the morning, afterwards a soft stool, in the forenoon (second day), [5] . [830.] ► Semiliquid stool (scanty), pain in the bowels, followed by tenesmus, [5] . ► Thin stool, with griping and uneasiness in the abdomen, [1] . ► Unnoticed thin stool, on emission of flatulence, [1] . ► Stool more soft than hard, for several days (after four days), [5] . ► Soft stool preceded by colic (first day), [5] . ► Soft stool, followed by burning in the anus (after half an hour), [5] . ► Semiliquid stool, in the morning, preceded by pain in the abdomen, [5] . ► Copious brown stool, [3] . ► Very offensive stool, [1] . ► Blood with the stool for several days (after four days), [1] . [840.] ► Stool colored with blood, followed by anxiety and dyspna, [1] . ► White mucus is discharged from the anus, before and during the stool, [1] . ► A round worm is passed with the stool, [5] . ► Pieces of a tapeworm are passed with a solid stool, [5] . ► Tenacious, soft, dark-colored stool, [2] . ► Tenacious stool, as though he was unable to loosen it, [6] . ► *Insufficient stool; most of it remains behind , [1] . ► *Insufficient stool after much pressure , [2] . ► *Insufficient soft stool , [6] . ► Very hard stool, with uneasiness in the abdomen, [1] . [850.] ► Hard delayed stool, at times with great urging, or followed by tenesmus, [5] . ► *Stool like sheep-dung, which is only passed with pain and exertion , [1] . ► Constipation. ► Constipation (after three days), [1] . ► During the menses, constipation, [1] . ► Constipation, with painful drawings in the abdomen, [1] . ► Very hard stool, and only every other day, [1] . STOOL. ► Stools often purulent and at times bloody, for several weeks, [13] . ► Profuse evacuation from the bowels and violent colic; the evacuations contained blackish portions of membranes and streaks of blood, [13] .

RECTUM AND ANUS. ► Inflammation and swelling of the rectum and anus, [2] . ► Hæmorrhoids, with very painful pimples at the anus, [2] . [420.] ► Great itching at the anus, especially at night, [2] .
STOOL. ► Diarrha. ► Diarrha (second day), [14] . ► Serous diarrha, unattended by febrile action, [16] . ► Diarrhic stools mixed with glairy matter, bile and blood, with anorexia, great weakness emaciation, and strong and painful beating of the heart, [2] . ► Purging and vomiting at the same time (after four doses); purging lasted several days, notwithstanding the exhibition of demulcents and opiates, [9] . ► Red, dark, semiliquid stools, as if caused by intestinal hæmorrhage, [2] . ► *Light green and yellow watery stools , [2] . ► Slimy and bloody stools, [2] . ► Stools with constant tenesmus, and spells of weakness, [2] . ► Stool hard (fifth day), [1] . ► First hard, then soft stool, preceded by some colic (third day), [1] . ► Constipation. [430.] ► Constipation , [50] , [54] , [55] . ► Obstinate constipation followed by diarrhic stools, [2] . ► Stool very hard; it is only with extreme exertion that she can pass a few small fæces (first day); after five days the stools became more natural and occurred more frequently, [1] . ► Stool omitted (second day), [1] .

STOOL. ► Diarrha. [530.] ► Diarrha , [34] , [41] ; (fourteenth and twenty-seventh days), [13] . ► Diarrha frequently alternates with the stools (first day), [13] . ► Very urgent desire for stool, and diarrha, in the morning (eighth day), [29a] . ► Diarrha with violent pains in the abdomen, [17] . ► Diarrha preceded by cutting in the abdomen (twentieth day), [13] . ► Diarrha and almost griping about the umbilicus, only seldom remitting (forty-first and forty-second day), [13] . ► Dreadful diarrha, with awful griping, and bloody stools (after a week), [48] . ► Diarrha four or five times in the day, followed by smarting in the anus; after some thin stool is passed once, it seems as though the orifice of the anus became stopped (hæmorrh. saccat.), which caused a disagreeable sensation; after prolonged and great urging very little passed, feeling like hardened fæces, with relief of the tenesmus (sixth day), [29a] . ► Diarrha twice (fourth day), [14] . ► Diarrha twice, with emission of much flatus, [3] . [540.] ► Diarrha of a bright-yellow color twice after a normal stool (ninth day), [29a] . ► Purging (after a quarter of an hour), [42] . ► Violent purging, [44] . ► Soft diarrha-like stools, preceded by rumbling and noises in the intestines (sixth day), [15] . ► Several diarrha-like stools without colic, [12] . ► Three diarrha-like stools (second day, after 13 grains); followed by constipation, [7] . ► Two diarrha-like stools without much pain in the abdomen (after 14 grains), [7] . ► Several thin evacuations of the bowels (after 7 grains), [8] . ► Soft stool several times (fourth day), [22] . ► Bowels opened three times within three or four hours, [49] . [550.] ► Three pasty stools; with the third evacuation in the evening there was associated a slight cutting in the whole intestinal tract, which lasted two hours and gradually disappeared (after 10 grains); next day the evacuation was hard, not copious (after 12 grains); on the following day, three thin evacuations (after 13 grains); next day, four watery evacuations (after 15 grains), [4] . ► Two very thin stools towards evening (after two normal evacuations in the morning), (after 9 grains), [8] . ► Frequent urging to stool, followed by two thin evacuations preceded by cutting colic (after 7 grains), [5] . ► Two soft stools, and once diarrha, followed by tenesmus (twenty-ninth day), [13] . ► Two soft stools in one day, with violent griping beneath the umbilicus extending up into the chest, where it became a sticking, [13] . ► Two very soft stools in the evening, preceded by painful griping in the abdomen and desire for stool, [13] . ► Evacuation consisting of small, thin, followed by some consistent fæces, with a feeling as if something should be expelled; afterwards, again a very soft stool preceded by urging; all this alternated very speedily, and the evacuation ceased as if cut off; at 7 A.M., scarcely an hour after the dose (second day), [29] . ► Profuse thin evacuations from the bowels, for several days, [11] . ► Slimy evacuations for three days, [15] . ► The evacuation of the bowels was thinner than usual (after 9 grains), [3] . [560.] ► Soft stool, immediately, [13] ; (after one hour), [31] . ► Soft stool after dinner, followed by burning and sticking in the anus, so that she was unable to sit, [13] . ► Stool soft or diarrha-like , with rumbling and moving about (first day), [13] . ► Soft stool preceded by griping and cutting in the abdomen (thirty-fifth day), [13] . ► Soft stool, unsatisfactory, at the usual time (second day), [23] . ► Evacuation straw-yellow (first day), [29a] ; in morning (third day), [29a] . ► Stool covered with mucus (twenty-fifth day), [13] . ► Bloody stools, [17] . ► Evacuation of the bowels mixed with blood, with tenesmus, [39] . ► Indolent stools (fourth and fifth days), [15] . [570.] ► Stool in the evening with great pressure (nineteenth day), [13] . ► Normal stool, though in thin pieces twice, with great pressure (first day), [13] . ► Stool later than usual (third day), [22] . ► Stool scanty and thin (tenth day), [29] . ► An unsatisfactory though not hard stool, preceded by much urging and the evacuation accomplished with great pressure, followed by disappearance of the feeling of fulness in the abdomen (first day), [29] . ► Stool more hard than soft (after fourteenth day), [13] . ► Stool hard (fourth day), [25] . ► Stool hard, with great pressure, at 3 P.M. (fourth day), [24] . ► Hard stool three times (ninth day), [13] . ► Hard stool twice towards evening, with swelling of the hæmorrhoids (thirty-fifth day), [13] . [580.] ► Hard stool in the evening for the second time, preceded by sticking in both groins, afterwards also in the anus, repeated next morning, [13] . ► Hard stool in the evening, with great pressure and sticking in the pudenda, [13] . ► Frequent urging in the rectum, and a hard stool followed in the evening (sixth day), [24] . ► Hard stool, followed by burning in the anus (eighth day), [13] . ► Hard stool formed like sheep-dung, [15] . ► Stool unusually hard, followed by discharge of blood from the anus, [26b] . ► Frequent sensation as though a thin stool would occur, but the stool the next morning was very hard (seventh day), [25] . ► Desire for and sudden evacuation of a thin stool, after which the dragging and desire do not seem to disappear, but continue till at last some scanty hard fæces pass (seventh day), [29a] . ► Constipation. ► Hard difficult stool (fifth day), [15] . ► Hard stool, with such exertion that the rectum protrudes (after fifteen days), [13] . [590.] ► Stool omitted (fifth day), [24] . ► The usual stool in the evening omitted (third day), [24] . ► The stool omits for one or two days, [13] .

urinary.text: URINARY ORGANS. ► Urethra. ► Escape of prostatic fluid at stool (fifth day), [2] . ► Burning in the urethra, in the forepart of the penis, when urinating and for a long time afterwards, [25] . ► Burning in the bulbus urethræ, both when urinating and when not (twenty-seventh day), [35] . ► Burning in the navicular fossa of the urethra while urinating (fifteenth day), [35] . ► Acute drawing from the perineum into the urethra (ninety-fifth day), [35] . ► Sticking pain in the prostate gland, extremely violent and preventing walking, in the afternoon, [25] . [1040.] ► Transient stitches in the urethra, especially after urinating (third day), [26] . ► Occasional smarting during micturition, which lasted two days (after fourth dose), [2] . ► Irritation at the orifice of the meatus urinatus (male). "N---n." ("N--n." ought to denote Norton, but the symptom is not in his daybook.] ► Micturition. ► Frequent desire to pass urine, [22] . ► Constant urging to urinate the whole day without change in the quantity of color of the urine, [25] . ► Frequent micturition, with slight burning after urinating (eighth day), [2] . ► Frequent emission of very watery but very strong-smelling urine; woke him during the night, contrary to habit (twentieth night), [31] . ► Some time in passing urine (third day), [2] . ► Did not pass a drop of urine (second day), [42] . ► Urine. ► High-colored urine (third day), [2] . [1050.] ► Urine red , with pain across back, [22] . ► Urine scanty, [49] . ► Scanty urine, with white film and whitish deposit, [1] . ► At times, for about a week or a fortnight, he was scanty, high-colored urine and pain across the loins, [22] . ► Urine scanty, high-colored, and deposited a pearly-white sediment, [3] . ► Scanty reddish urine (with pain in region of kidneys, etc.), [22] . ► Urine of a brownish hue, [22] . ► The urine passed during the night was turbid, and deposited a copious sediment (thirty-sixth day), [35] . ► The urine was turbid in the evening, and deposited a thick mucous sediment (eighteenth day), [35] . ► Urine deposits a mucous sediment (twenty-first day), [35] . SEXUAL ORGANS. [1060.] ► Erections lasting over half an hour, [25] . ► Slight pain in glans penis, which lasted two days (after fourth dose), [2] . ► Painful sensation as though the penis were constricted at the root, after waking in the morning, [25] . ► Itching on the glans penis and in the rectum, in the evening (ninth day), [32] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-bi.

URINARY ORGANS. ► Bladder. ► Cutting in the region of the bladder, [1] . ► Urethra. ► Discharge of milky, odorless, flocculent fluid (prostatic fluid), after urinating, [1] . ► Tearing in the neck of the bladder, when not urinating (thirty-seventh day), [2] . ► Cutting tearing in the neck of the bladder, while urinating, aggravated while pressing upon the urine (thirty-sixth day), [2] . [860.] ► Burning in the urethra, while urinating , [1] , [5] . ► Burning in the urethra, after urinating (after five days), [1] . ► Burning and biting in the orifice of the urethra and upper portion of the internal prepuce in the morning in bed, soon after urinating (twentieth and twenty-first days), [2] . ► Frequent drawing and sharp tearing in the forepart of the urethra (eighteenth and nineteenth days), [2] . ► Intermitting cutting in the urethra, when not urinating, [2] . ► Pinching tearing in the urethra (after twelve days), [1] . ► Tearing pain in the urethra, [1] . ► Burning-biting pain in the urethra, during and after urinating, [1] . ► Micturition. ► Great desire to urinate , [1] . ► Urging to urinate, it is a long time, however, before he can do so; the urine flows very slowly, [1] . [870.] ► She is obliged to urinate frequently, only a little every time, but always followed by renewed desire, which is almost painful (after forty-eight hours), [1] . ► *He is obliged to urinate frequently, but there is often pressure upon the bladder a long time before the urine comes ; even at night he is obliged to rise several times on account of it, though he drinks but little , [1] . ► *She is obliged to rise at night to urinate , [1] . ► *He is obliged to rise frequently at night to urinate (third and fourth days), [5] . ► While intent about her work she is suddenly obliged to pass a few drops of urine, [1] . ► Stream of urine interrupted, without pain, in the afternoon (first day), [5] . ► After urinating, a few drops still pass, [1] . ► Discharge of a few drops of urine two or three minutes after urinating, [1] . ► She is obliged to press before she can start the urine, [1] . ► Urine. ► Urine pale, scanty (first and second days); more (third day), [5] . [880.] ► Pale greenish urine, with burning during and after micturition (eighth day), [5] . ► Dark-yellow urine with a cloud; an hour afterwards the urine is paler (after one hour), [5] . ► Urine fiery, diminished (first time), [5] . ► Increased urine; at least she is frequently obliged to urinate, [5] . ► Unusually large secretion of urine (first day), [1] . ► Urine turbid, [2] . ► Urine like mealy water, with much sediment on standing, [5] . ► Urea decreased from 30 grammes to 25 (20 per cent.), [11] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Male. ► A strong seminal odor of the male genitals, [1] . ► Erections at night, without sexual excitement (after seven days), [1] . [890.] ► Frequent erections (after thirteen days), [5] . ► Many erections, during an uneasy dreamy sleep at night, [2] . ► Many erections, even painful, with spasmodic contraction of the spermatic cords, [1] . ► Impetuous erections (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► Violent erections after midnight, disturbing his sleep, exhausting him and threatening him with emissions, which however, do not take place, [2] . ► No erections (first eighteen days), [1] . ► Tension of the penis (after twenty-four days), [1] . ► Tearing-drawing in the penis (twenty-fourth day), [2] . ► Sharp drawing pains through the penis (after twelve days), [6] . ► Tearing in the glans penis (after twenty days), [2] . [900.] ► Bubbling sensation in the glans penis (second day), [6] . ► Itching in the glans penis, and especially in the orifice of the urethra, becoming a tearing (seventh day), [2] . ► Sticking-itching in the glans penis, [1] . ► Soreness of the scrotum (after seventeen days), [6] . ► Scrotum painful as if bruised, [1] . ► Swelling in the testicle and spermatic cord, with externally perceptible heat, [1] . ► Tension in the left testicle, [1] . ► Pinching in the left testicle and in the pubis, [1] . ► Excited sexual desire, with burning sensation, [1] . ► Increased desire (after twenty-four hours), [1] . [910.] ► Great sexual desire (third day), [1] . ► Very great sexual desire , [2] . ► Loss of sexual desire, with undiminished erections in the morning, [1] . ► Emissions two nights in succession (first and second night), [1] . ► Emissions, with voluptuous dreams (first day), [5] . ► Emissions, followed by great weakness (third, fourth, and seventh nights), [2] . ► Profuse emission, followed by weakness (after twenty-three days), [5] . ► The usually frequent emissions appeared more seldom (after fourteen days), [1] . ► The customary emissions remain absent for forty-two days, [1] . ► Coition without emission (after ten days), [1] . ► Female. [920.] ► Leucorrha-like mucus, [1] . ► Leucorrha (third day), [5] ; (first five days), [1] . ► Yellowish leucorrha, with itching and burning in the pudenda, [1] . ► A woman in the fifth month of pregnancy is attacked (after a vexation), at night, with profuse discharge of lumps of clotted blood from the vagina, with dull headache and yellow color of the face, though without a miscarriage, [1] . ► A voluptuous sensation, as during coition, wakens her from sleep before the appearance of menstruation, in the morning, [1] . ► Pinching in the vagina, during coition, [1] . ► Pinching pain in the labia, [1] . ► Burning-sticking in the pudenda, [1] . ► Stitches transversely through the pudenda, [1] . ► Tearing, extending from the left side of the pudenda through the abdomen into the chest, [1] . [930.] ► *Great soreness about the genitals before, during, and after menstruation , [1] . ► Sore pain in the vagina during coition, [1] . ► Menstruation two days too early, immediately after a new dose (eighth day), [5] . ► *Menstruation four days too early (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► *Menstruation five days too early, more profuse and lasting longer than usual , [5] . ► Menstruation six days too early, [4] . ► Menstruation six days too early, the first day scanty, the second more profuse than usual, the third again scanty, the fourth ceasing entirely, [5] . ► Menstruation then days too early and lasting six days, the first day slight, the latter days profuse; associated with weakness and sleepiness, pain in the abdomen and teeth, [4] . ► Menstruation one day too late, with pains in the lower abdomen, [3] . ► Menstruation delayed thirteen days (secondary action), [1] . [940.] ► Menstruation, which had omitted for eighty-seven days, reappeared without symptoms, except that she felt it the day previously in all her limbs (third day), [1] . ► The suppressed menses return better in color (after five days), [1] . [Kali brings back menstruation, if Natrum muriaticum has not accomplished it. -Hahnemann.] ► The menstrual blood is very acrid, of a strong offensive odor, and causes great soreness of the thighs, which become covered with an eruption, [1] . ► She is easily excited to coition (after twenty-nine days), [1] . ► Female aversion to coition (first day). URINARY ORGANS. ► Urine seldom and high-colored, for several weeks, [13] . ► Took 1 drachm at 12 A.M. (one hour before dinner), and 1 drachm at 8 P.M. (one hour before supper). Observations, [17] . URINARY ORGANS. ► Bladder and Kidneys. ► Burning and throbbing pains, as from an abscess, passing from the kidneys into the abdomen, [2] . ► Cramps in the kidneys, with yawning, nausea, vomiting, raising of phlegm, urging to urinate and desire to remain in bed, [2] . ► Digging in the kidneys, with heat and distensive pains, [2] . ► Lancinating and burning pains in the kidneys ineffectual urging to urinate, and tenesmus, [2] . ► Nephritic colic, with inclination to ease the pain by clenching and grinding the teeth, digging and weakness in the spine, and complete retention of urine, [2] . ► Sensation of congestion and heaviness in the neck of the bladder, with priapism, [2] . [440.] ► Contraction of the neck of the bladder just as urination begins, and during its continuance, [2] . ► Irritable bladder, [43] . ► Urethra. ► Muco-purulent discharge from the urethra, of a gummy consistency, with inflammation of the penis, [2] . ► Discharge resembling blennorrhagia, with tearing and burning pains in the penis, constant priapism, colic, and feeling of exhaustion, [2] . ► Burning and tearing pains in the urethra, frequently with emission of blood, [2] . ► Micturition. ► Frequent urging to urinate, [2] . ► Painful urging to urinate (fifth day), [1] . ► (The urging to urinate which usually accompanied menstruation was wanting), [1] . ► She is obliged to rise at night to urinate (after four days), [1] . ► Frequent and profuse discharge of urine as clear as water (after three days), [1] . [450.] ► Greatly increased discharge of urine (sixteenth day), [1] . ► The emission of urine was materially increased, the patient passing from forty to fifty quarts in the course of twenty-four hours, drinking in the same proportion; each time the Ioduret of Potas. was suspended this accidental supersecretion ceased, but it was reproduced as soon as its use was resumed, [10] . ► The absolute quantity of urine discharged was not increased unless, owing to the dryness of the throat, more water was ingested, [47] . ► The bladder is full and swollen, but cannot be emptied, [2] . ► Urine. ► Increased secretion of urine, [24] . ► Urinary secretion is more abundant, that is, the patient passes more than he drinks (first day); this symptom is almost constant; the urine is clear and transparent; the patients urinate more by night than by day; sometimes, however, the urine is not increased, [14] . ► The most remarkable of its effects are a rapid and very considerable increase of the urine, and what is quite remarkable is, that gradually the uric acid sediments entirely disappear, while those of the ammonio-phosphate of magnesia decidedly increase, [19] . ► Profuse urine, with sediment, [2] . ► Excessive secretion of urine, sometimes with pain in the kidneys, [16] . ► Considerable diuresis (in three cases), [23] . [460.] ► *Clear, limpid urine, [2] . ► Bilious-looking urine, almost black, [2] . ► She frequently passes very pale and watery urine (after five days), [1] . ► Blood-streaked urine, and flow of blood from the urethra, especially in the evening, [2] . ► The urine smells very badly, and decomposes almost immediately, [2] . ► White flocks in the urine, [2] . ► Yellow or gray deposit, adhering to the sides of the vessel, like calcareous concretions, [2] . ► Urea eliminated, from 325 to 372 grains daily (before the proving); fell to between 201 and 294 grains (after the proving), [47] . ► Passage of calculi with the urine, [2] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Male. ► *Penis swollen, inflamed , with constant semi-erections and sexual desire, [2] . [470.] ► *Extensive swelling of the glans penis , with paraphimosis, [2] . ► Erection even after an ejaculation, [2] . ► Chancre-like ulcers, with raised edges on the penis, with burning in the urethra, [2] . ► Raised, suppurating, syphilitic-looking condylomata on the penis, [2] . ► The penis is excoriated by the least friction, [2] . ► The left testis had almost entirely disappeared; it was reduced to the size of a pea, [21] . ► The right testicle was found to have disappeared; the left was about the size of an almond; coition was accompanied by pain, erection taking place slowly and lasting a long time; the duration of the venereal act was much prolonged, and no emission of semen took place (after twelve months), [57] . ► Descent of the testicles, with serous effusion into the scrotum, [2] . ► Compressive pains in the testicles, with sensation as if they were returning into the pelvis, [2] . ► Lancinating and throbbing pains in the scrotum, frequently after coition, [2] . [480.] ► Greatly increased sexual desire, [2] . ► Seminal losses, and frequent profuse nocturnal emissions, [2] . ► Tardy or premature ejaculation of semen, [2] . ► Female. ► Inflammation and swelling of the uterus, with sensation as if its walls were being scraped, [2] . ► The cervix uteri is swollen and contracted, [2] . ► Chancre-like tumors on the cervix uteri, [2] . ► Cramps, burning, and contractions of the cervix uteri, [2] . ► Constrictive pains in the uterus, impeding parturition, [2] . ► Severe burning, tearing, and twisting pains in the ovarian region, especially on the right side, [2] . ► Sensation of congestion and swelling in the ovaries, with pain as from a corrosive tumor there, [2] . [490.] ► Biting in the pudenda with leucorrha, [1] . ► Leucorrha for several days, so acrid that it corrodes the skin (after twenty-five days), [1] . ► Leucorrha milky-white, or red like the washings of meat, [2] . ► Yellow or green leucorrha, of a putrid smell, [2] . ► Leucorrha resembling blennorrhagia, with redness, itching, and burning of the vulva and thighs, [2] . ► (The leucorrha became thinner and more watery), (after seven days), [1] . ► Menstruation reappeared after having been suppressed for six months, and flowed profusely, with pain in the abdomen and looseness of the bowels (in a woman thirty-eight years old), (after forty-six days), [1] . ► Discharge reappeared a week after the menstrual period (one case), [14] . ► Flow of blood between the menstrual periods, [2] . ► Menses two days later but more profuse than usual, [1] . [500.] ► She menstruated imperfectly once (during several weeks, while the medicine was taken); but, though several years have elapsed, she has not, as far as I know, menstruated since, [46] . ► Menstruation sometimes to early, sometimes retarded, [2] . ► Decrease in quantity of menstrual fluid, [34] . ► Menstruation that had existed for two days, was diminished, [1] .

URINARY ORGANS. ► Urethra. ► Burning while urinating (seventh day), [28] ; (eighth day), [13] . ► *Burning in the urethra while urinating, and greatly diminished urine (after fifty days), [13] . ► Burning in the forepart of the urethra during micturition (first day), [25] . ► Burning in the orifice of the urethra while urinating (seventh day), [25] . ► Burning pain at the close of micturition (third day), [23] . ► Fine stitches in the orifice of the urethra, [13] . ► Acute stitches in the region of the prostate gland while urinating, [15] . [600.] ► Biting in the urethra, during micturition (third day), [23] . ► Shivering and tickling in the orifice of the urethra (fourteenth day), [28] . ► Micturition. ► Some desire to urinate (after forty minutes), [9] . ► Increased desire to urinate; he was obliged to urinate every ten minutes, but passed only a little at a time, nevertheless it was more copious than usual (after one hour), [9] . ► Frequent desire to urinate, with emission of much offensive flatus (after 8 grains), [2] . ► Frequent desire to urinate, with a dull painful feeling in the region of the kidneys, and increased thirst (after 13 grains), [7] . ► Frequently recurring desire to urinate, with discharge of only a little urine (after 10 grains), [6] . ► *Urging to urinate, at first only a few drops, then the usual stream, frequently (twenty-third day), [13] . ► Increased micturition, even at night, with a hard stool (first day), [13] . ► Frequent emission of yellow, transparent urine, [9] . [610.] ► Frequent and profuse emission of urine (after 8 grains), [2] . ► Frequent and profuse micturition, the urine is as clear as water, [26b] . ► When this prover had several thin evacuations from the bowels there was no marked action upon the urine (after 7 grains); but while there was no action upon the bowels and the stool was regular, he was obliged to urinate frequently (after 10 and 12 grains), [8] . ► Copious emission of urine, which was dark and red; after several hours there was deposited a sediment, which when disturbed rose in a cloud; after other doses there was increased secretion of urine, with frequent urging to stool, and also pressing and dragging towards the anus; this was repeated after different doses, [1] . ► Copious emission of urine, which was watery, passed every two hours during the day, and almost every hour in the afternoon and evening (after 12, 13, and 15 grains), [4] . ► Profuse evacuation of urine (after 73 grains), [1] . ► Urine passed three times, about 2 ounces each time, during five hours, [9] . ► Urination to the extent of 7 or 8 pints, during the night, [31] . ► After the symptoms of irritant had abated, the patient passed upwards of a gallon of urine every night, which was found to contain sugar, [47] . ► Strangury with discharge of bloody urine, [39] . ► Urine. [620.] ► Increased secretion of urine, [17] ; (first day), [13] . ► Increased secretion of urine, with drawing and rather acute pain in the lumbar region, aggravated on moving the body; this pain began in the morning and continued till evening (after 11 grains), [7] . ► Urine increased for several days (sixteenth day), [13] . ► Urine more copious and passed more frequently than usual; the color was brownish-yellow (after 9 grains), [13] . ► Secretion of urine more copious than usual (after 5 grains); next day, a reddish cloud formed on standing (after 6 grains), [5] . ► *Urine diminished (first day), [23] ; (after ten days), [13] . ► Urine dark-yellow (sixth day), [28] . ► Urine reddish (third day), [23] . ► Urine dark-colored and depositing a brickdust sediment (first day), [28] . ► Reddish cloud in the urine, which was increased in quantity (second day), [13] . [630.] ► Urine very turbid, soon depositing a yellow sediment (fourth day), [25] . ► Slight mucous sediment in the urine (after 7 grains), [7] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Male. ► Erections in the morning in bed (twenty-seventh day), [13] . ► Erections on waking in the morning, with great desire for coition, which at a very unusual time (for it had been indulged in the day previous), was effected "maxima cum voluptuate" (eleventh day), [29] . ► Erections at noon without voluptuous thoughts (seventeenth day), [13] . ► Prickling sticking in the glans penis (fourth day), [22] . ► An itching stitch in the penis in the afternoon, while sitting (thirty-second day), [13] . ► Smarting of the orifice of the prepuce, also some smarting when urinating (sixth day), [28] . ► Frequent itching sensation in the glans penis (seventh day), [25] . ► Painful swelling of the left epididymis, as large as a hazelnut, behind and below the testicle (third day), [23] . [640.] ► After unsatisfied sexual desire in the morning, violent drawing tension and pressure in both testicles and along the spermatic cords into the abdomen, lasting several hours; therewith the testicles were very painful; even in the evening there was still tension in them, extending into the spermatic cords, [15] . ► Sensitiveness of both testicles, which are drawn up with a pressive sensation in them (third day), [23] . ► Increased sexual desire, [15] . ► Great inclination to coition, with great sexual enjoyment (second day), [29a] . ► Female. ► Abortion at the second month, [11] . ► Leucorrha, thin, white, stiffening the linen, with bruised pain in the small of the back; for a week (after thirty days), [14] . ► Menstruation somewhat longer and more profuse than usual, [13] . ► Menstruation, which was just at its close, was immediately very much increased after a new dose, with pains in the abdomen, small of the back, and thighs, but after a few hours returned to its ordinary state, [13] . ► Menstruation, which was only slight on the fourth day, immediately after a new dose became more profuse, thicker, with clots of blood; next day it was again scanty, [13] . ► Menses much thinner than usual, [13] . [650.] ► Menses some days too early and more profuse than usual, lasting three days, though flowing scarcely any after the second day, with blood black like ink, [14] . ► Menses one day too early, with pains in the small of the back and lower limbs, [13] . ► Menses five days later, [13] . ► Menses suppressed, [13] . URINARY ORGANS. ► Urine diminished, [52] .

chest.text: CHEST. ► Chest painful on deep inspiration, [31b] . ► Pain in the left chest, in the region of the seventh rib; next day, the place was sensitive to touch (twenty-fifth day), [35] . ► Slight pains in chest, [22] . ► Slight pain in right chest, penetrating to back, in evening (ninth day), [6] . [1150.] ► The pains in the thorax become so severe that he is scarcely able to turn over in bed or take a few steps on account of the aggravation of the pains in the muscles and bones, all the latter of which seem to be broken; the next day these pains extend over the whole cervical region, and he is unable to turn the head or move the arm upward without greatly increasing the pains; respiration was very much impeded; these symptoms decreased very much from day to day (fifth day after last dose), [36] . ► Sudden attack of violent burning pain as from a deep knife-cut in the centre of the chest, so severe that it compels him to throw away everything and to compress the chest firmly with both hands. After remaining quiet for two minutes the pain gradually diminishes, but returns with increased violence on every attempt to go on with his work. It begins on both sides under the clavicle, and extends over the whole chest down to the region of the lower ribs, but is most severe in the centre of the chest; the pain is somewhat like the burning felt when walking against a cold wind, but is not only burning but sharply cutting. Deep breathing increases the pain slightly, although the pain forces him to respire deeply. Warmth relieves the pain, without removing it. These pains in the chest keep on till noon, sometimes lasting for a quarter of an hour, then decreasing steadily on taking some warm soup, [40] . ► Tension in the left chest, rather externally, while walking in the evening (seventeenth day), [35] . ► Feeling of tension and constriction in the chest (seventy-ninth day), [35] . ► Tightness of the chest, [25] . ► Tightness of the chest, coming from the stomach; fasting in the evening (eighteenth day), [35] . ► Tightness across chest (after two weeks), [22] . ► Feeling of tightness across the chest; this tension lasted the whole forenoon but disappeared at noon (eighty-fourth day), [35] . ► Pressive-pinching sensation in the upper portion of the right lung, which on violent motion increased to a sticking pain; next day, the sticking pain increased to such a degree that I was obliged to incline, in walking, to the right side, and take short steps, in order to avoid the sticking pain, [27] . ► Dull pain in the region of the clavicle (twenty-third day), [26] . [1160.] ► Dull circumscribed pain in right chest, aggravated by inspiration (after fourth dose), [2] . ► Pressure upon the chest, which takes away the breath and causes extreme anxiety, at night (seventeenth night), [26] . ► Pressure on the chest, especially beneath the sternum, frequently in forenoon (one hundred and twenty-first day), [35] . ► Pressure in a small spot in the upper lobe of the right lung, which afterwards changes to a drawing pain along the whole length of the right chest, internally, lasting half an hour, in the forenoon (ninety-ninth day), [35] . ► Pain consisting of pressure and sticking in a spot as large as a dollar in the region of the left seventh rib, feeling as if in the costal pleura, in the evening (twenty-fourth day), [35] . ► Distressing pressure across the chest, with anxiety from time to time (twenty-fourth day), [35] . ► Pressive pain in the chest, in the region of the heart (ninety-third day), [35] . ► Violent pressive pain on the chest, as from a hundredweight, awoke him from sleep about midnight, after which he was unable to fall asleep before daybreak (eighteenth day), [26] . ► Oppression of chest, [22] ; (fourteenth day), [23] . ► Oppression of the chest, especially pressure beneath the sternum (one hundred and seventeenth day), [35] . [1170.] ► Oppression and sticking in the lower portion of the chest on deep inspiration (thirty-fifth day), [35] . ► Oppression and dyspna (after two weeks), [22] . ► Great oppression in the chest, especially in the region of the bifurcation of the bronchi, compelling him to take a deep breath with the aid of the pectoral muscles, during the night, [25] . ► Severe sharp pains about the chest (twenty-seventh, twenty-eighth, and twenty-ninth days), [8] . ► Dull sticking on the right side of the border of the thorax, in the hepatic region, aggravated neither by deep inspiration nor by motion, continuing till afternoon, when it disappeared (forty-seventh day), [35] . ► Sticking pains in the chest, in the evening, [5] . ► Severe stitches beneath one of the pectoralis major muscles, and at another time in one of the intercostal muscles, [25] . ► Transient stitches shooting through the chest, especially in the right side, [25] . ► Frequent fine irregular stitches in the integuments of the chest, unconnected with respiration or palpitation, [1] . ► Soreness of chest, [22] . [1180.] ► Dull pain in the whole chest as if sore (twenty-fourth day), [26] . ► Chest somewhat sensitive, especially in the region of the nipple, in the evening (ninety-seventh day), [35] . ► Persistent feeling of dryness and rawness in the lungs, in the evening, [25] . ► Slight transitory pain in middle of lung, on waking at midnight (first hour after second dose), [2] . ► Front. ► Fixed burning pain in middle of sternum (after fourth dose), [2] . ► Tension in the anterior wall of the thorax, at times on deep breathing (fifty-sixth day), [35] . ► Pressure and burning in the chest, in the forepart, in the region of the fifth and sixth left ribs, feeling as if in the costal pleura, lasting two hours; in the evening a similar sensation, but less severe, on the right side beneath the axilla (fifty-fifth day), [35] . ► Pressive pain beneath the sternum (fifty-sixth day), [35] . ► Sudden sticking in the inner surface of the breast-bone, [25] . ► Slight stitches in the inner surface of the sternum, in the forenoon (one hundred and ninth day), [3b] . [1190.] ► Painful spot somewhat to the right of the centre of the breast-bone (fourteenth day); on the next day unpleasant stitches in the same place, lasting three days), [23] . ► A point towards the middle and left of the sternum painful on pressure (third day), [2] . ► Sides. ► Constant pain in chest, under left axilla (fourth day), [2] . ► Rheumatic pains between seventh and eighth ribs, at their angles on the right side, increased by raising or twisting the body to the left, [9] . ► Tension in the right half of the chest, at the insertion of the pectoral muscles (one hundredth day), [35] . ► Drawing tension and dull pain in the right side of the chest, aggravated by going upstairs and by deep breathing, [25] . ► Dull, heavy pain in right side of chest, passing through to the back, continuing and passing off at intervals of twenty minutes (after one hour, second day); similar tearing pain, but less violent, and lasting only a short time (after three hours, third day); slight return of pain, in evening (fifth day), [6] . ► Aching in the lowest ribs of the right side, lasting two days, [31b] . ► Pressive pain in the pectoral muscles, beneath both axillæ, transient (sixty-sixth day), [35] . ► Dull pressive pain in the region of the three last true ribs of both sides, aggravated by deep inspiration, [25] . [1200.] ► Sharp pain in left side, between the hips and last vertebra (after one hour and a half, eighth day), [6] . ► A sharp shooting pain in the left side of the chest, that around the navel having disappeared by this time (after six hours, second day), [6] . ► Sticking in the right side of the chest, [25] . ► Acute tearing-sticking pain in the whole left side of the chest, extending from the axilla to the flank, rather superficial, feeling as if in the costal pleura, in the morning on waking, lasting half an hour (fifty-seventh day), [35] . ► Stitches in both sides of the chest (one hundred and second day), [35] . ► Transient superficial stitches in the right side of the chest (seventieth day), [35] . ► Stitch in right side (twenty-first day), [8] . ► Acute and severe stitch in the side for a moment (fourteenth day), [8] . ► Mammæ. ► Transient pains in right mammæ (third day), [8] . ► Transient darting pain in the mammæ (female), [14] . [1210.] ► Stitches in the region of the left nipple; after a few hours they disappeared but were renewed on deep inspiration, in the forenoon (seventy-fourth day), [35] .

CHEST. ► Objective. ► Emaciation and debility of the right side of the chest, as from pulmonary disorganization, with very copious purulent expectoration, [2] . ► Inflammation of the chest, with sensation as if the lungs were swollen and obstructed, fever and great dyspna, [2] . ► Subjective. ► Pains in the chest, as if the lungs contained large tubercles or cavities, [2] . ► Oppression, with cramplike pains in the chest, and suffocative paroxysms; inability to remain lying, especially at night, [2] . ► Constant oppression of the chest, [6] . ► Pains in the chest as if cut to pieces, in the evening (third day), [1] . ► Dull sticking in the middle of the chest, disappearing on moving about (after five days), [1] . ► Sharp sticking in the left side of the chest, in the evening (fifteenth day), [1] . ► *Fine transient stitches deep in the middle of the chest , [1] . [540.] ► Sharp stitches in the upper part of the left chest, while sitting bent over, disappearing after becoming erect, [1] . ► Sharp stitches in the right costal region, behind the breast, [1] . ► An extremely violent stitch in the middle of the chest, while walking, [1] . ► Sore pain with sticking low down in the chest, in the lowest right ribs, at 8 P.M., [1] . ► Front. ► Sharp sticking and pressure in the middle of the sternum, in the afternoon (sixth day), [1] . ► *Violent stitches in the middle of the sternum, extending to the shoulders , [1] . ► Sides. ► Several sharp stitches in the right side of the chest, [1] . ► Pain in the left side of the chest, as if sore externally, worse when touched (after twelve days), [1] . ► Mammæ. ► The breasts began to diminish in size, but the supply of milk was especially diminished (soon), [13] .

heart.text: HEART AND PULSE. ► Præcordium. ► Dull, cold, heavy pain at cardiac region, with tightness in chest and dyspna, [18] ; (45 drops, third day), [5] . ► Cramp in the region of the heart, [46] . ► Pressive pain in the heart, with a peculiar aching in it (thirteenth day), [35] . ► Pressive pain in the heart, several hours after dinner (seventeenth day), [35] . ► Pressive pain in the region of the heart, lasting a quarter of an hour and preventing sleep (ninth day), [26] . ► Distressing pressive pain in the region of the heart, accompanied by transient attacks of palpitation and anxiety (thirty-second day), [26] . ► Distressing pressive pain in the heart for an hour, in the evening (twelfth day), [1] . ► Sharp irritative fixed pain in region of apex of heart, unaffected by respiration or position, [1] . ► Sticking in the region of the heart, [35] . [1220.] ► Darting in præcordium (after fourth dose), [2] . ► Heart's Action. ► On pressing upon the region of the heart there seemed to be a trembling of the heart, like an oscillating motion, disappearing after awhile (one hundred and twenty-sixth day), [35] . ► Violent palpitation of the heart, with dull, pressive, distressing pain in the region of the heart, while in bed (eighth day), [26] . ► Pulse. ► Pulse accelerated, rather full, 100 (reaction?), [52] . ► Pulse 120, hard and full, [52] . ► Pulse 120, small and sharp, [54] . ► Pulse irregular, small, contracted (fourth day), [30] . ► Pulse very weak (after one hour and a half), [51] . ► Pulse very weak and fluttering, [45] . ► Pulse exceedingly feeble, [52] . [1230.] ► Pulse small and exceedingly depressed, so much so that I felt a little alarmed at his state, [46] . ► Pulse scarcely perceptible, [52] . ► Pulse scarcely perceptible; filiform and very slow (0.12 grains), [57] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-bi.

HEART AND PULSE. ► Præcordium. ► She awoke about 2 A.M., with anxiety about the heart, and was unable to fall asleep again, [1] . ► Burning in the region of the heart (after two days), [1] . ► Pinching pain in or by the heart, as if the heart were hanging by tightly drawn bands; mostly noticed on deep inspiration or coughing, not on motion of the body (after a few hours), [1] . ► Stitches in the præcordial region, [1] . ► Heart's Action. ► Palpitation when he becomes hungry (after ten days), [1] . ► *Frequent and violent palpitation , with anxiety, [1] . ► Violent palpitation in the forenoon, with confusion of the head and nausea (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► Violent throbbing and palpitation of the heart on the least exertion (after five or six days), [7] . ► Frequent intermissions of the beats of the heart, [1] . ► Pulse. [1080.] ► He feels the pulse over the whole body, even to the tips of the toes, [1] . ► Pulse slower than usual (twenty-ninth day), [2] .
PULSE. ► Pulse quick (second day), [15] .

HEART AND PULSE. ► Præcordium. ► Heart feels as if enlarged and heavy, and beats very slowly, [2] . [550.] ► Sensation as if all the vessels of the heart were dilated, with inclination to take deep inspirations, and to sigh as if fetching breath, [2] . ► All the symptoms of endocarditis; oppression, faintlike exhaustion, tumultuous, violent intermitting, and irregular action of the heart and pulse, with tensive pain across the chest, especially affecting the right ventricle, which gradually became dilated (after two weeks), [27] . ► Lancinating, cutting, and burning pains in the heart, [2] . ► Lancinating, burning, and rheumatic pains in the heart, with sensation as if it were surrounded by water, [2] . ► A few sharp stitches in the region of the heart, frequently while walking (fifth day), [1] . ► He is afraid to stir; the least movement aggravates the pains in the heart, [2] . ► Heart's Action. ► Palpitation , [29] , [50] , [54] , [55] . ► Strong palpitation of the heart, [2] . ► Very annoying palpitation, [52] . ► (Cure of palpitation of the heart, which she had previously been subject to), [53] . [560.] ► Intermitting beats of the heart, with lancinations, cramps in the chest, stupor, and loss of breath, [2] . ► Pulse. ► Accelerated pulse, [29] ; (tenth day), [24] . ► Pulse rapid and small, [52] . ► Pulse very rapid and irregular, [56] . ► Quick and very full pulse (after four doses), [9] . ► Pulse almost always strong and quick, [2] . ► Pulse quick and small, [17a] . ► Pulse very quick, at least 120, but varying every moment, [54] . ► Pulse 130, [30] . ► Pulse hard, tense, not frequent, [6] . [570.] ► Pulse small, soft (after three hours), [25] .

HEART AND PULSE. ► Præcordium. ► Violent stitch in the præcordial region (after five hours), [15] . ► Heart's Action. ► Violent beating of the heart, in the evening in bed, on account of which he awoke, [13] . ► Violent beating of the heart while lying upon the back, so that she awoke at midnight, and sat up full of anxiety (thirteenth day); violent palpitation at midnight, while lying on right side (fourteenth day), [13] . ► Palpitation on sudden motion and on standing up, with heat of the face and oppression of the chest, [15] . ► Momentary palpitation, at times (after fifteen days), [14] . ► Pulse. ► Pulse somewhat accelerated (after 11 and 13 grains), [7] . [750.] ► Pulse frequent, hardish (third day), [23] . ► Pulse hard and rather frequent, towards evening (seventh day), [25] . ► Pulse small and rapid, with warm hands, [13] . ► Very weak, rapid pulse, [41] . ► Pulse full, hard, and rapid, and a condition very like an inflammatory irritability of the whole body, but especially in the abdominal organs (second day), [9] . ► Pulse very rapid, for an hour, in the afternoon, while at rest, [15] . ► Pulse very rapid, at 4 P.M., with heat in the head for an hour (twenty-eighth day), [15] . ► Pulse increased in frequency by ten beats (first day), [28] . ► Pulse 70 (usually 65), (first day), [28] . ► Pulse 80 (usually 65), with some palpitation (first day), [28] . [760.] ► Pulse 90 in the evening (usually 65), (ninth day), [28] . ► Pulse slow, small, and weak, [39] . ► Pulse sunk in strength and frequency, [37] . ► Pulse diminished by 3 beats for a short time (after 9 grains), [8] . ► Immediately after taking the drug, especially in large doses, the pulse was from 3 to 4 beats slower than usual, partly on account of the cooling effect of the saltpetre, and partly from the cold water; this condition lasted a very short, time, three or four minutes, and the circulation returned to its usual course, [8] . ► Pulse reduced from 65 to 62 (after a few minutes); normal (after half an hour), [9] . ► Pulse very weak, small, and thready, at 60 (after four hours), [45] . ► Pulse hard, with symptoms of enteric inflammation (second day), [36] . ► Pulse somewhat smaller and softer than usual (two hours after two scruples), [3] . ► Pulse small and weak, [38] . [770.] ► Weak pulse, [33] ; (after a quarter of an hour), [42] .
PULSE. [1130.] ► Pulse small, rapid, [52] . ► Pulse irregular, scarcely perceptible, [53] .

extremities.text: EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Objective. ► Cracking in the joints (twenty-third day), [26] . ► Audible cracking in the joints (sixth day), [26] . [1290.] ► Violent audible cracking, on slight motion of the wrists, ankles, and spine (third day), [26] . ► Loud cracking in various joints (eighteenth day), [26] . ► Loud cracking, on moving the extremities, or joints of the spine (twenty-second day), [26] . ► Unusually loud cracking, on moving the joints of the extremities and vertebræ (thirty-first day), [26] . ► Weariness in the limbs, [25] ; (twentieth day), [31] . ► Weakness of all the extremities (second day), [31a] . ► Prostration of the limbs, in the evening, [25] . ► Subjective. ► Pains in the joints (twenty-first day), [8] . ► Pains in shoulders, arms, finger-joints, hips, and knees (twenty-third day), [8] . ► Rheumatic pains in nearly all the joints (twenty-fourth day), [8] . [1300.] ► Rheumatic pains in the right hip and left elbow (thirtieth day), [8] . ► Cramps in the limbs, [55] . ► Drawing in the limbs (twenty-first day), [35] . ► Drawing in various places in the long bones (one hundred and twenty-eighth day), [35] . ► Drawing in the forearms and lower legs (twenty-first day), [35] . ► Drawing on the backs of the hands and feet, [27] . ► Drawing and jerking in various muscles in the thigh and upper arm, in the evening, [25] . ► Violent drawing and boring pains in the bones of the left thigh and left upper arm, lasting several minutes and suddenly disappearing (third to ninth days), [34] . ► Dull drawing pains in various joints of the upper and lower extremities, most severe in the right ankle (thirteenth day), [26] . ► Dull drawing pain in left hip-joint and left upper arm from shoulder-joint to elbow (thirty-second day), [36] . [1310.] ► Dull drawing pain in the left arm and in both lower extremities, becoming more violent in the right foot, and especially tearing, extending into the great toe, where it was most violent (second day), [26] . ► Tearing-drawing pain in right tibia, right ankle, and wrist, in various phalanges, especially in both thumbs, transient, suddenly changing about (twenty-second day), [26] . ► Rheumatic pains (or, as the workmen expressed it, "it got into the bones"), shooting and pricking in all the limbs, worse in the morning, [22] . ► Shooting and pricking pains in all the limbs in the morning; he is stiff all over, and can hardly move, [22] . ► Tearing in the long bones of the extremities, [35] . ► Tearing in various joints, especially in the right wrist and finger-joints of the same hand (ninth day), [26] . ► Tearing in the hands and feet at intervals, in the afternoon (twenty-fifth day), [35] . ► Tearing in right tibia, and on back of right foot and corresponding ankle, also especially painful in the thumb, on the back of the hand, and in several phalanges of the right hand (thirty-second day), [26] . ► Tearing pain in right tibia and right ulna, on waking in the morning (twenty-fourth day), [35] . ► Tearing pain in the ankles and wrists (twenty-seventh day), [35] . [1320.] ► Slight tearing in the hands and feet (twenty-fifth day), [35] . ► Violent tearing in right tibia and various joints of fingers of both hands, so violent in right thumb that he was disabled from writing for more than an hour (twenty-third day), [26] . ► Transient tearing and stitches in the right axilla and posterior surface of the left thigh (eighth day), [35] . ► Short tearing pains in the extremities, especially in the anterior portions towards the hands and feet (sixty-sixth day), [35] . ► Wandering tearing pains in various joints of the upper and lower extremities now in the hip, now in the knee-joints (seventh day), [26] . ► Dull tearing in various joints, with cracking in them on motion, frequently returned after the proving, [26] . ► Wandering dull tearing pains in various parts of the extremities (thirty-third day), [26] . ► Drawing tearing in the right thumb, right tibia, and corresponding great toe (after two hours, thirty-first day), [26] . ► Drawing-tearing pains in various parts of the upper and lower extremities, in the right ankle, especially violent in the right great toe and the corresponding thumb (eighteenth day), [26] . ► Acute tearing pains in the lower legs and feet, and also in the forearms and hands; these pains were very peculiar; they recurred in paroxysms and were not diffused, but seemed to be confined to one fibre, as if a single nerve were suddenly torn, on waking in the morning (twenty-seventh day), [35] . [1330.] ► Bruised pain in the upper and lower limbs (tenth day), [26] . ► Bruised pain in the upper and lower limbs, very violent; and tearing in the right wrist and ankle, aggravated by motion (tenth day), [26] .

EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Objective. ► Trembling of the hands and legs, and easily fatigued from walking, [1] . ► Stiffness of the limbs (after ten days), [1] . ► Laxity and weakness of the limbs, [1] . ► Loss of power in the limbs, they give way, [1] . ► Tickling weakness in all the limbs, [1] . ► *So great uneasiness in the limbs, in the evening in bed, that she could find no place where she could lie easily , [1] . ► Subjective. ► The parts upon which she lies fall asleep (the arms and legs), [1] . [1170.] ► The left leg and right arm go to sleep, at night, [1] . ► *Such heaviness in the limbs that she is scarcely able to lift the feet , [1] . ► Limbs feel heavy, especially legs, [8] . ► Uneasiness in the limbs, in the evening ; she is obliged to move them about, [1] . ► Uneasiness in the limbs, in the evening; is frequently obliged to stretch them out, [1] . ► Burning pain in the limbs, at night in bed, [1] . ► Drawing pain in all the limbs, with a feeling as if he had been long sick, with great paleness of the face and emaciation, [1] . ► Pressure in the limbs as if in the bones, now here, now there, [1] . ► Pressive pain in the joints, with drawing pain in the long bones, [1] . ► Pressive pain in the joints of the knees, feet, and hands, only during rest, [1] . [1180.] ► Sticking in the joints and tendons , [1] . ► Transient tearing in the fingers and at the same time in the toes, [2] . ► The limbs pain when he rests them upon any object (after four days), [6] . ► Jerkings in the limbs (eighth day), [1] . ► Crawling in the limbs, especially in the legs, while sitting, with drawing in the lower legs, which makes him restless, [2] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-c.

EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Objective. ► Trembling of the limbs, [36] , [44] . ► Trembling of the hands and feet, [35] . ► Painless jerkings in the arms and legs in the evening in bed (fifth day), [13] . ► Great weakness of the limbs (ninth day), [28] . ► Lameness of the limbs, with weariness (third day), [28] . ► Paralysis of the limbs, [17] . ► Subjective. ► Pains in the right hip and left shoulder and ankle-joints, especially on walking, also tensive pains in the sterno-cleido-mastoid muscle, [26d] . ► Drawing in the upper and lower extremities, [28] . [810.] ► (Drawing in the limbs was worse), (four hours after the dose), [28] . ► Cramplike drawing pain, now in the right, now in the left arm, now in the legs, especially about the knees, mostly during rest, [15] . ► Sticking pain in the right shoulder, and afterwards in the knee-joint, repeated several times (seventh day), [25] . ► Sticking pains lasting a few minutes in the knee, elbow, and shoulder-joints; in the left elbow it lasts longer, and is increased by motion; the pains are worse in the afternoon than in the forenoon (first day), [25] . ► Tearing and drawing in the limbs (seventh day), [28] . ► Bruised feeling in the limbs (fifth day), [28] . EXTREMITIES. ► Crawling in the hands and feet, as if asleep, [52] .

upper_extremities.text: SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Objective. ► The arms swelled, became painful, red, and inflamed as far as the shoulder (after three days), [22] . ► Weariness and weakness of the arms (third day), [29b] . ► Subjective. ► Feeling as though the right arm had fallen asleep or were paralyzed, disturbing sleep (ninth day), [26] . ► Drawing in the bones of the arm (ninety-third day), [35] . ► Tearing and gnawing in the bones of the right arm and in the thumb and index finger of the right hand; some indications of the same pain in the left hand; in the forenoon (ninety-first day), [35] . ► Drawing-tearing pain from time to time in the joints of the upper extremities; these pains suddenly change their places (twelfth day), [26] . ► Acute tearing pain in the bones of the arm, especially in the vicinity of the elbow and wrist (one hundred and twenty-sixth day), [35] . ► Shoulder. ► The axillary glands suppurated but did not break (after three days), [22] . [1340.] ► Pain in the right shoulder-joint on moving it, and at other times also a sensation as though the joint were separating from its attachments (though without any tearing here or in other parts), (fourth day); the disagreeable sensation in the arm increased, after prolonged inactivity of the extremity, to a stiffness, which was painful even if no attempt was made to move the arm, but it was increased to a high degree on raising the arm (eighth and ninth days); the pain in the arm was much worse, especially if the arm was bent at the elbow and drawn somewhat backward and outward, as for example, when putting on the clothes (fourteenth day), [23] . ► Rheumatic pains in both shoulders, worse at night, [22] . ► Rheumatic pain in shoulder and elbow on motion, with numbness from shoulder to elbow (after four hours, third day), [6] . ► Violent tearing-aching pain in left shoulder, [1] , [22] . ► Paralytic drawing in the right shoulder (forty-ninth day), [35] . ► Pressive pain in the left shoulder, extending thence into the left chest, aggravated on moving the arm, especially on raising it (seventeenth day), [35] . ► Tearing in the right shoulder, afterwards in the left elbow and forearm, transient, while the other pains continue into the night, [25] . ► Paralytic tearing on the top of the right shoulder (twenty-sixth day), [35] . ► At night, soon after lying down, tearing pains in the shoulder and upper arm, on the side not laid upon; on turning, the pain went to the other arm, [1] . ► Arm. ► Frequent, sudden, very violent cramplike pain in the middle of the outer surface of the right upper arm; even after the pain had disappeared the spot remained sensitive (seventeenth day), [23] . [1350.] ► Sudden tearing and jerking in the right deltoid muscle, in the evening, [25] . ► Frequent jerking-tearing from the right shoulder to the elbow (eighth day), [35] . ► Elbow. ► Pain in left elbow, for several hours (second day), [8] . ► Pain in elbow-joint (thirty-first day), [8] . ► Drawing and tearing in the right elbow, extending into the hand and right lower leg, preventing the bending up of the foot, after midnight (eighteenth day), [26] . ► Darting pain in the outside of elbow-joint (half an hour after third dose), [2] . ► Shooting pain in left elbow, [2] . ► Forearm. ► Pain in a circumscribed spot on the extensor surface of the upper third of the right forearm, more in the muscles and partly in the upper arm; the place is also sensitive to touch (thirty-fifth day), [35] . ► Burning pain, extending from the middle of the forearm to the wrist, as though the parts had been scalded, lasting two days (after five weeks), [23] . ► Burning pain in the lower end of the left forearm, though there was nothing visible on the skin; evening (thirty-eighth day), [35] . [1360.] ► Dull painful sensation in the forearms during the day, though never violent (sixth day), [26] . ► Drawing in the bones of the right forearm, on the radial side (forty-second day), [35] . ► Drawing in the aponeuroses of the muscles of the right forearm (forty-fifth day), [35] . ► Tearing in both forearms; after awhile tearing in the left shoulder (fortieth day), [35] . ► Tearing in the forearm (twenty-fourth day), [35] . ► Tearing in the right forearm and right side of the occiput (forty-sixth day), [35] . ► Tearing pain in the right ulna, on waking in the morning; after a time it disappeared here and appeared in the right tibia; after rising the pains disappeared entirely (sixty-first day), [35] . ► Acute tearing pain the whole length of the bones of the right forearm (one hundred and seventeenth day), [35] . ► Throbbing in the left forearm, not corresponding to the beat of the pulse, lasting five minutes (thirty-first day), [26] . ► Wrist. ► Dartings in right wrist (one hour after third dose), [2] .
