[1370.] ► Severe throbbing-darting pain in the left wrist near the pisiform bone, continuing for nearly half an hour (eighth day), [2] . ► Cramplike tearing above the left wrist, in the evening (third day), [28] . ► Hand. ► Spasmodic contraction of hands shortly before death, [42] . ► Great weakness of the hands, so that he was unable to hold a paper without resting the hand upon a table, [25] . ► She let things fall from her hands, with weakness and drawing in the arms and distension of the veins of the arms (fourth day), [30] . ► Drawing in the left hand, after dinner (one hundred and twenty-first day), [35] . ► Drawing pain in the left hand, in the forearm, and nape of the neck (forty-seventh day), [35] . ► Sticking in the metacarpal joints, in the morning on waking, [25] . ► Violent tearing pain on the radial side of the left hand made me groan (fourth day), [35] . ► Hands and arms feel bruised and lame (sixth day), [36] . [1380.] ► Hands felt as the bones as if they had been bruised (45 drops, fourth day), [5] . ► Fingers. ► Twitching of the little finger of the left hand (third day), [26] . ► Both thumbs are especially painful (sixth day), [26] . ► Violent pain in the thumb, so that I was scarcely able to hold a pen; every motion of the arm or hand increased the pain; externally there was neither redness nor swelling to be seen; this pain lasted during the whole forenoon, and was frequently so violent that I was unable to take my handkerchief out of my coat pocket; it extended to the elbow, without the least external appearance; in the evening the pain was less, the joint still remained sensitive to touch; it almost entirely disappeared the next day (seventy-seventh day), [35] . ► Painful tension in the extensor surface of the right thumb; this tension diminished towards noon, and was felt only on violent motion of the hand; on pressing on the place where the radius articulates with the metacarpal bone of the thumb the pain was still felt; this spot was sensitive to pressure and on motion throughout the day (seventy-sixth day), [35] . ► Slight aching pains in the second joints of the fingers of the left hand (eighth day), [2] . ► Drawing in the right index finger and in the spine, in the evening in bed (first day), [34] . ► Drawing in the little and ring fingers of the left hand, afterwards in the left side of the face and in the right knee, soon after rising in the morning (eighty-first day), [35] . ► Drawing pain in the right thumb (fifty-seventh day), [35] . ► Acute pains in the bone of the first phalanx of the left little finger, so that I was obliged to rub it constantly, which brought relief; this pain was seated in the bone itself, was a gnawing-boring pain, and extended towards the tip of the finger, and lasted an hour, in the evening (one hundred and thirty-first day), [35] . [This symptoms made me certain that the action of the drug had not yet ceased. -Z.] [1390.] ► Transient but piercing sticking through the bone of the first phalanx of the right middle finger (thirty-eighth day), [35] . ► Repeated stitches in the metacarpal joints of the right middle finger, towards evening (forty-eighth day), [33] . ► Tearing in various phalanges of both hands, wandering and transient (twenty-fifth day), [26] . ► Tearing in the right thumb, afterwards in the left upper arm, then along the arches of the ribs of the left side (seventeenth day), [35] . ► Tearing pain in the right thumb, lasting through the day with transient intervals (twenty-fourth day), [26] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-bi.

SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Paralytic rigidity of the arms, [2] . ► Arms lost all power (fourth day), [15] . ► Lancinating and cramplike pains in the arms, with dematous swelling, [1] . ► Shoulder. ► Pain in the tendons of the right shoulder, on motion and touch, like a tension and as if swollen, [1] . ► Paralytic pain in the shoulders, only on moving them (after four days), [1] . [600.] ► Transient tearing in the right shoulder and afterwards extremely violent tearing in the right ear, [1] . ► Violent tearing in the left shoulder, [1] . ► Transient bruised pain in the left shoulder, [1] . ► Elbow. ► Tearing in the left elbow, now in the shoulders, now in the right elbow (after seventeen days), [1] . ► Forearm. ► Pain like a tension and sticking in the articular extremity of the radius, on moving the right index finger, [1] . ► Feeling of cramp in the right forearm above the wrist, on moving it (second day), [1] . ► Wrist. ► Tearing in the right wrist, afterwards itching on it, not relieved by scratching, followed by the appearance of an itching vesicle (after twelve days), [1] . ► Hand. ► Swelling of the hands as if from chilblains, [3] . ► Very characteristic trembling of the hands, [54] . ► Tearing in the metacarpal joints of the fingers of the left hand, in the evening (third day), [1] . [610.] ► Bruised pain in the margin of the right hand above the little finger, [1] . ► Fingers. ► Very painful swellings on the fingers, like paronychia, [2] . ► Pinching on the first (metacarpal) joint of the left thumb, [1] . ► Tearing in the index finger, from the base to the tip, [1] . ► Tearing in the inner surface of the right ring finger, which is thereby involuntarily flexed and for a long time cannot be extended, [1] . ► Painful tearing in the right thumb as if it would be torn out (fifth day), [1] . ► Violent tearing on the inner margin of the right thumb, [1] . ► Violent tearing on the left middle and ring fingers, in the evening (thirteenth day), [1] . ► Extremely violent jerking-tearing and sticking in a very narrow line on the outer side of the left thumb, as if in the bone, [1] .

SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Weakness of the arms, [12] . ► Temporary paralysis of the arms (from a drachm daily), [20] . (The medicine was taken for an inveterate headache, which improved when the arms lost power. They recovered a few hours after discontinuing the drug, and the headache returned. -Hughes.) ► The left arm falls asleep at night while lying on the back it wakes her about 3 A.M. (after eleven days), [13] . ► The feeling of numbness and crawling in the arm, with pain in the shoulder that had existed previously, disappeared; instead of it there was a pain in the right thumb-joint on moving it for several weeks (after thirteen days), [13] . [820.] ► Drawing pain in the arms if she lets them hang down for a long time, [12] . ► Tearing in the right arm, especially in the shoulder, worse in the afternoon and evening, [15] . ► Tearing in the arm intermitting, and returning at night when lying upon the right side (during menstruation), [13] . ► Tearing extending from the right shoulder to the fingers, waking from sleep at 11 P.M., lasting to 4 A.M., with a sensation as though the shoulder were standing farther out than natural; she was unable to lie upon either side, [13] . ► Extremely painful tearing in the right arm, extending to the wrist on motion, with stiffness of the arm, which was not relieved by rubbing, but by violent motion (twenty-seventh day), [13] . ► Drawing-tearing in the arm, extending from the shoulder to the fingers, towards evening (fourth day), [14] . ► Shoulder. ► Pain in the right shoulder on almost every motion of the arm, except upward and backward, which afford relief, [26d] . ► Pain in the left shoulder on raising the arm, especially on moving it backward, [26d] . ► Pain as from weariness in the left shoulder (after four hours), [15] . ► A paralytic pain in the right shoulder-joint towards the forepart, as if in the head of the bone, but only felt while the arm remained in one place; as soon as the arm was moved, the pain disappeared; if the arm was turned on its axis, there was a cracking in the forepart of the joint, which seemed to be caused by the tendon of the biceps muscle; there was a similar pain in the first joint of the right ring finger, only noticed on flexing and extending it. On the next day these symptoms had entirely disappeared, except that when lying down (and as it happened after a new dose of the drug) there was noticed a similar pain in the left patella, which disappeared after sleeping, and gave place to dull sticking pains in the anterior and farther portion of the left side of the chest, [26a] . [830.] ► Rheumatic pain in the shoulders, [22b] . ► Pressure on the left shoulder (after twenty-two days), [13] . ► Tearing in the shoulders, at one time on uncovering them, at another under the cover; wakes at midnight (twelfth and thirteenth days), [13] . ► Tearing and heaviness in the right shoulder, with a feeling of numbness in the arm, pain afterwards also extending to the wrist, and waking from sleep about 2 A.M. (after four days), [13] . ► Tearing in the right shoulder, with falling asleep of the fingers, wakes her at 3 A.M. (after twenty-three days), [13] . ► Frequent tearing in the left shoulder, [19] . ► Painful tearing in the left shoulder, frequently renewed (after thirteen days), [13] . ► Violent tearing in the right shoulder from 2 to 5 A.M., disappearing after rising, [13] . ► Bruised pain on the shoulder in the morning (after nineteen days), [13] . ► Arm. ► Jerking in the muscles of the right upper and forearm (third day), [23] . [840.] ► Paralytic weakness of the right upper arm, [15] . ► Drawing-pinching pain in the upper arm (after thirty-eight hours), [15] . ► Sticking and throbbing frequently in the upper arm (seventeenth day), [13] . ► Violent tearing in the bone of the upper arm (twenty-sixth day), [13] . ► Drawing-tearing in the deltoid muscle of the left upper arm during rest and motion (fifth day), [15] . ► Drawing in the right upper arm (sixth day), [29a] . ► Elbow. ► Drawing in the elbow-joint, extending up the posterior surface of the right upper arm (second day), [13] . ► On strongly flexing the forearm, pains, a kind of drawing, in the right elbow-joint in the inner side, as if starting from the ulnar nerve (recurring soon after a new dose, and lasting the whole afternoon), (twelfth day), [29] . ► Drawing, tension, and burning in the bend of the left elbow (after two hours), [15] . ► Tearing in the joints of the elbows, wrists, and finger-joints, and beneath the nails (after seven days), [14] . ► Forearm. [850.] ► Paralytic weakness in the right forearm at night, [13] . ► Pain in the arms extending from the elbows into the wrists, where it is a tearing and breaking, as if it would twist the bones; thence into the knuckles, where it distends the spaces between them, with swelling of the parts; thence it extends as a crushing pain as far as under the nails; somewhat relieved by rubbing the hands, with a feeling as if the hands were larger than usual, wooden, heavy, and numb, and paralytic; loss of power in them, though only at night, [14] . ► Drawing, throbbing, and violent pain from the right wrist to the elbow during dinner, afterwards in both arms (after twenty days), [13] . ► Tearing extending upward on the dorsal surface of the left forearm (ninth day), [29a] . ► Tearing in the right forearm, index finger, and thumb, waking from sleep at night, [13] . ► Tearing in the right forearm, from the elbow to the ring and middle fingers, with heaviness and numbness of the parts, [13] . ► Tearing in a tendon on the outer side of the left forearm, followed by paralytic weakness of it (seventeenth day), [13] . ► Paralytic tearing in the left forearm, extending to the wrist (twenty-second day), [13] . ► Extremely painful gnawing in the left ulna, a hand's breadth above the wrist, at short intervals, followed by a paralytic feeling, so that the arm must be allowed to hang down; in the afternoon while sitting; it disappears on rubbing, whereupon there is a pressure, which always reappears, often by itself (seventeenth day), [13] . ► Wrist. ► Pain on the inner surface of the right wrist, as if the parts would be forcibly drawn inward; even externally a depression forms, [13] . [860.] ► The right wrist feels sprained (while drawing a tooth); this sensation lasted ten minutes (third day), [27] . ► Tearing in the wrist (fifth day), [23] . ► Tearing in the right wrist, [15] . ► Acute tearing in the evening in the external condyle of the right wrist, even continuing during motion, [15] . ► Hand. ► Weakness of the hands and fingers; she could hold nothing tightly and properly; on making an exertion, there is pain in the wrist, [14] . ► Heaviness of the hands, like lead (after twenty-seven days), [14] . ► Painful grabbing and gnawing in the ball of the right hand, just behind the little finger (seventeenth day), [13] . ► Breaking and tearing pain in the right hand in the evening, [14] . ► Tearing stitches in the bones of the ball of the left hand, just back of the little finger (second day), [13] . ► Tearing in the hands, with shivering and thirst (eighth, ninth, and tenth days), [14] . [870.] ► Tearing in the back of the left hand, better after rubbing, [13] . ► Tearing in the metacarpal bone of the right index finger in the morning (fifth day), [23] . ► Fingers. ► Stiffness of the fingers at times (after eighteen days), [14] . ► Drawing in the right little finger (twenty-third day), [13] . ► Transient tearing-drawing in the middle finger of the left hand (second day), [22] . ► Pain, as from a sprain, in the fingers on holding a large object; on stretching them out, which at first he was unable to do, they seem too long, and if he wishes to hold anything, he is first obliged to bend them backwards, [13] . ► Pain, as from a sprain, in the right thumb-joint on moving it backwards and a pain in a small spot in the joints on pressing upon it, [13] . ► Pain in the right thumb-joint on bending the thumb backwards, as if it had been sprained and swollen, with cracking in it, [15] . ► Pain, as from a sprain, in the right index finger, and cracking in the joints on every motion of the hand, [13] . ► Sticking beneath the left thumb-nail, as with needles (twentieth day), [13] . [880.] ► Jerking-sticking in the right ring and middle fingers, [13] . ► Violent tearing in the last phalanx of the left thumb (nineteenth day), [13] . ► Pinching-tearing in the left thumb, [13] . ► Cramplike tearing in the knuckles, alternating with the pains in the head, [14] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-n.

sleep.text: SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepiness. ► Great tendency to yawn and stretch (seventh day), [2] . ► Frequent yawnings (sixth day), [2] . ► Very frequent yawning, though he had slept very well the previous night (twentieth day), [11] . ► Constant yawning, followed after half an hour by violent pressing pain in the stomach, great nausea, and efforts to vomit; vomiting could with difficulty be restrained (twenty-second day), [31] . ► Sleepiness, [26] . ► Sleepiness during the day (forty-third day), [23] . ► Sleepiness earlier than usual, with some pressive headache, [25] . ► Great sleepiness and yawning after dinner (fourth day), [2] . [1630.] ► Great sleepiness, in the afternoon (one hundred and twentieth day), [35] . ► Great sleepiness in the evening (one hundred and thirteenth day), [35] . ► Great sleepiness and exhaustion, so that I was scarcely able to write a word, in the evening (one hundred and fourteenth day), [35] . ► Very great sleepiness, constant closing of the lids, nodding, yawning, and weariness of the feet, towards noon, [25] . ► Irresistible sleepiness, at times (twenty-second day), [26] . ► Irresistible sleepiness before the usual time, with momentary dropping to sleep (third day), [26] . ► Overpowering sleepiness after dinner, [25] . ► Overpowering sleepiness in the evening; after sleeping for awhile upon a lounge I was waked by shivering, now in the upper part of the body, now in the whole body, now in different muscles (eighth day), [35] . ► Sleeplessness. ► Loss of sleep, [54] . ► Difficult falling asleep (fourth day), [26] . [1640.] ► Was unable to fall asleep for a long time at night, afterwards slept quietly and soundly (ninety-fifth day), [35] . ► Nights uneasy (thirty to thirty-fifth day), [23] . ► Night restless, [31b] ; (second day), [42] . ► Night restless, interrupted by dreams, unrefreshing (twenty-seventh night), [22] . ► Restless sleep towards morning, after subsidence of nausea and headache (15 drops, third day), [5] . ► Suddenly awakened by fright from a quiet sleep of three hours, and only gradually fell again into a doze (first night), [34] . ► Awoke early, and then fell into a confused, heavy half sleep; in morning unrefreshed and weary, [1] . ► Waking very early in the morning (fourth day), [28] . ► Wakes very early in the morning, and after falling asleep again very restless sleep with tossing about (eighth and ninth days), [28] . ► Waking at 1.30 A.M. (afterwards falling asleep again), (second day), [28] . [1650.] ► Waking at 1.30 A.M. (third night), [28] . ► Feeling in the morning on rising as though he had not slept enough (fifty-sixth day), [35] . ► Frequent startings, tossing about of the arms, incoherent talkings, and finally snoring, on falling asleep at night (after fourth dose), [2] . ► Frequent groaning and much tossing about in bed (twentieth night), [35] . ► Dreams. ► Vivid dreams, [1] . ► Vivid dreams at night, particularly towards morning (of various dangers and misfortunes), [25] . ► Disagreeable dreams (thirteenth day), [8] . ► Frightful dreams (eleventh and twelfth days), [8] . ► Very disagreeable sensation at 4 A.M.; it is best described as nightmare; I dreamed that some one was lying across my chest and abdomen, which arrested the breathing, so that I was in danger of suffocation; I groaned aloud, and after waking was covered with sweat; my blood was in a tumult; after rising I felt very weak (eighty-ninth day), [35] .

SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepiness. ► Frequent yawning, [1] . ► Sleepiness early in the evening, with morose silence, [2] . ► Sleepiness in the afternoon (third day), [4] . [1570.] ► Sleepiness, with yawning, while walking in the open air, [1] . ► Sleepiness after dinner, disappearing in the open air, [5] . ► Constant sleepiness in the afternoon, yawning, and suffering expression, [5] . ► Great sleepiness during the day ; she sleeps even while sitting, [1] . ► Great sleepiness; she could even sleep during breakfast (soon), [5] . ► *After eating, great sleepiness, with chilliness and yawning , [1] . ► Overpowering sleepiness in the afternoon and evening, [1] . ► *Attacks of sleepiness while eating (second and fourth days), [1] . ► Sleepy very early in the evening (after ten days), [6] . ► Very sleepy in the morning, and waking late, [1] . [1580.] ► Very sleepy, with yawning, in the forenoon, lasting till noon, [5] . ► In the morning, after a good sleep, he is soon obliged to lie down again, and after three hours' sleep feels well, [1] . ► Sleep too long, followed by confusion of the head, great lassitude, feeling of catarrh, and pressure in the eyes, [1] . ► Starting in sleep , [1] . ► Start, on falling asleep, [1] . ► He starts and jumps frequently during sleep, [1] . ► In the evening, on falling asleep, jerking through the whole body, so that he started up, [1] . ► His limbs jerk in his sleep, and he snores, [1] . ► The whole body moves in sleep two nights in succession, as in epilepsy, with jerking of the arms and stamping of the feet, though without rattling respiration; after waking he knows nothing of it, [1] . ► Sleeplessness. ► Falls asleep late (first weeks), [1] . [1590.] ► Falls asleep with difficulty, in the evening, after walking in the open air, [1] . ► He is unable to fall asleep for a long time, in the evening, for several days, [5] . ► He is unable to fall asleep before 11 or 12 o'clock, without cause , [1] . ► He is unable to sleep at night before 1 or 2 o'clock, without cause, and without other symptoms, [1] . ► He is unable to sleep before midnight, after mental labor, [1] . ► Only slumber instead of sleep, at night, [1] . ► Half waking sleep at night, [1] . ► *Restless sleep (fourth day), [4] . ► At night the child was restless and anxious, cried much, longed for this and that, without taking anything, [1] . ► During the menses, very uneasy sleep, with anxious dreams, [1] . [1600.] ► Very uneasy night; she wakes as many as twenty times without special cause, [5] . ► In the evening, after lying down, he started up awake, with shivering over the whole body, [1] . ► Inclination to wake early in the morning, without activity, [1] . ► She wakes much earlier than usual, and is unable to fall asleep again, [1] . ► She always wakes at 4 o'clock and afterwards frequently till morning, [1] . ►► *She wakes in the morning about 1 or 2 o'clock, and cannot sleep again, from wakefulness , [1] . ► At night, after waking, she was unable to fall asleep again, on account of vivid thoughts, [1] . ► Feeling in the morning as though he had not slept enough, [1] . ► Sleeplessness at night, and indeed, if he slumbers, had anxious dreams; followed in the morning by stupidity, with hot hands, [1] . ► Dreams. ► Fantasies at night, for three hours, in a waking condition, with heat in the brain, and external heat over the whole body, followed by some perspiration, coldness of the limbs, shivering, and much starting, as in fright, [1] . [1610.] ► He immediately fell asleep, but also began to dream, [1] . ► Dreams at night, with restless sleep, and frequent waking, [1] . ► Many dreams, with uneasiness and tossing about in sleep, [1] . ► At night he passes from one dream to another, [1] . ► Sleep full of dreams, with frequent waking (tenth day), [6] . ► Sleep restless, full of dreams, [2] . ► The whole sleep is full of vivid dreams of the business of the day, [1] . ► Dreamy sleep, with talking in it , [1] . ► Talking in sleep , [1] . ► Loud talking in sleep, [5] . [1620.] ► Violent crying in a dream at night, [1] . ► The child cries and tosses about restlessly, at night, [1] . ► Frequent voluptuous dreams (first fourteen days), [1] . ► Lascivious dreams, after coition, at night, with emission, [6] . ► Anxious dreams , she cries for help, [1] . ► During the menses, she again falls asleep after waking in the morning, but remains in an extremely unpleasant condition between sleep and waking; is distressed by hearing things, which make her anxious, though at the same time she knows that she is only dreaming, but is unable to open her eyes, and can only with difficulty arouse herself from this condition, [1] . ► Anxious dream of danger to her from passing forms, some of which lay hold of her, [1] . ► Anxious dreams; his father was about to beat him, [1] . ► Dream of robbers (eleventh day), [6] . ► Dreamed that the cathedral was on fire; on waking up (which she often did) could think of nothing else; got up for half an hour and lit a candle to get rid of the idea; then on sleeping again had the same dream again, and so on through the night, the last dream being that her own house was on fire; on two other nights dreamed each time about different subjects, but the dream was repeated over and over again, as on this occasion (seldom dreams at all), [8] . [1630.] ► In a dream she fell from a high mountain, [1] . ► Dreams of diseased parts of the body, [6] . ► Horrible dreams disturb her sleep, [1] . ► All sorts of frightful figures pass before her eyes during sleep, [1] . ► Dreams of masked persons, ghosts, and devils, [5] . ► Dreams of dead persons, as if they were living and quarrelled with her, [1] . ► Dreams of serpents, disease, and death, [5] . ► In a dream one announced his approaching death, [5] . ► Nightmare, at night, with a dream as if a stone were lying upon him, and at the same time the larynx were being gradually constricted, with ineffectual efforts to wake, [2] . SLEEP. ► Little sleep for six weeks, [13] . ► Almost always cold and could be warmed only with the greatest difficulty, for several weeks, [13] .

SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepiness. ► Frequent yawning, as though she had not slept enough, without sleepiness, [1] . ► Excessive, frequent yawning (fifteenth and sixteenth days), [1] . ► Invincible drowsiness, after 2 P.M., [2] . ► Heavy and painful sleep in the morning, and after meals, [2] . ► Deep sleep during the first half of the night; wakefulness in the morning, [2] . ► Sleeplessness. ► *Sleeplessness , [53] , [54] . ► Night almost sleepless; she was quite wide awake most of the time, and only became sleepy towards morning (after thirteen days), [1] . ► Nightly restlessness, [50] . ► Restless sleep (after fourteen days), [1] . ► Restless sleep, from which he awakes with a start and a feeling of distress, as if caused by some strong emotion, or the sense of a great calamity, [55] . ► Sleep restless, especially in the morning, with dreams, which are not remembered on waking, [2] . ► Sleeps much less soundly than usual, but has no nightmare, [51] . ► She started up during the first sleep, but soon fell asleep again (fifth day), [1] . [770.] ► She wakes every hour, at night (after fourteen days), [1] . ► Sleep was disturbed and unrefreshing, [24] . ► She cried aloud in sleep, towards morning, but after waking remembered nothing of it (after three days), [1] . ► Dreams. ► Joyous dreams, [1] . ► Very anxious dreams (after thirteen days), [1] . ► Dream of falling and consequent violent starting up, in the evening, while napping (after eleven days), [1] . ► Dreams that she would be killed (after fourteen days), [1] . ► Nightmare, [54] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-i.

SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepiness. ► Yawning, [9] . ► Yawning and sleepiness during the day, [14] . ► Much yawning, with weariness and indolence, [30] . ► Sleepiness (first day), [25] . ► Sleepiness while walking and during rest (first day), [13] . [1030.] ► Sleepiness, yawning, and exhaustion, in the forenoon (seventh day), [13] . ► Sleepiness, so that he could have fallen asleep immediately; this gradually disappeared toward 10 o'clock, leaving only a slight pressure in the forehead and over the right eye in the forenoon (first day), [28] . ► Great sleepiness after dinner, with weariness of the limbs on waking (second day), [29a] . ► Great sleepiness between 11 and 12 A.M.; this sleepiness also continued during dinner at 3 P.M., and became irresistible; he was obliged to lie upon the sofa, contrary to his custom; sleep made restless by frightful dreams, and in spite of frequent waking he gradually aroused himself only after two hours (second day), [29] . ► Overpowering sleepiness at noon; in spite of being frequently disturbed he was able to rouse himself completely from sleep only after two hours (eighth day), [28] . ► Sleepy and exhausted after rising in the morning (fourth day), [24] . ► Sleepy and exhausted in the afternoon (second day), [13] . ► (Quiet sleep), (curative action), (first day), [29a] . ► Stupid sleep as if drunken; she heard nothing about her (after six days), [13] . ► Sleep usually stupid, with fantasies from which she awoke in a fright, [14] . ► Sleeplessness. [1040.] ► She was unable to fall asleep before midnight, after which she slept well, [13] . ► Uneasy sleep on account of a throng of ideas, which he could not keep away, [13] . ► Sleep restless, disturbed by many anxious dreams (fifth night), [24] . ► Restless sleep with frequent waking (after ten days), [13] . ► Sleep restless, full of dreams, with frequent waking in the morning (sixth day), [29a] . ► Restless sleep at night, [9] . ► Sleep restless during the night with many dreams and profuse perspiration (seventh day), [25] . ► Night restless, [9] . ► Night restless, with little sleep (first night), [9] . ► Night restless, with many dreams (after 6 grs.), [6] . [1050.] ► Nights restless, frequently only slumbering, with constant waking or wakened by pain; for twenty days, [14] . ► She fell asleep late, awoke early, and then tossed about (after twenty-eight days), [14] . ► She woke at 1 o'clock and could not fall asleep again, [13] . ► Dreams. ► Dreamy sleep; she was thronged with thoughts and unable to get any rest; with great anxiety, [13] . ► Sleep full of dreams through the whole proving, [13] . ► Many dreams after midnight (third night), [24] . ► Voluptuous dreams (after twenty-two days), [13] . ► Vivid dreams full of strife and disputes, [12] . ► Dreams of quarrels, vexation, and anger, [13] . ► Dreams of journeys; yet she made no progress, which vexed her, [13] . [1060.] ► Anxious, visionary dreams, during the heat, with frequent starting up and sweat; the next morning transient shivering, and in the forenoon thirst (after twenty-seven days), [13] . ► Anxious painful dreams, as if she had a painful swollen cheek, or as if her child had been beaten, [14] . ► Sleep uneasy from frightful dreams (second day), [29a] . ► Dreams of danger from water, fire, and the like, [13] . ► Dreams of sickness, or of the breaking of one of her teeth, [13] . ► Dreams of the death of an acquaintance, [13] . ► Night-mare (eighth day), [15] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-n.

fever.text: FEVER. ► Chilliness. ► No sensation of superficial coldness, though the loss of temperature was very marked to the touch (after one hour and a half), [51] . [1660.] ► Surface generally cold, especially of the limbs (0.12 gr.), [57] . ► Unpleasant coolness of the whole body, after the nausea (sixty-seventh day), [35] . ► Slight chilliness (with sickness of stomach), (after half an hour, eighth day), [6] . ► Great chilliness in the evening (twelfth day), [23] . ► Occasional attacks of chilliness and shivering (thirty-second day), [26] . ► Coldness of the body (during vomiting), [12] . ► Shivering and sensation of coldness, chiefly in the arms and shoulders, in afternoon (second day), [5] . ► Shivering alternating with flushes of heat, slight sweat on the back and inside of the thighs (after one hour), [32] . ► Shivering extending from the lower legs over the whole body, with a sensation in the pericranium as if it were being tightly constricted about the head, in frequent paroxysms; an hour after the chill there followed heat with dryness of the mouth and lips, so that she was constantly obliged to moisten them; the next morning she first had great thirst but no perspiration (third day), [29b] . ► Coldness of the extremities, [47] . [1670.] ► Feet and hands cold, [52] . ► Feet cold, during the attack, with shivering over thighs and back, [40] . ► Heat. ► Skin hot and dry, [52] . ► Heat of whole body at night (with disordered stomach), [14] . ► Heat over the body with feeling of cold (after vomiting), [12] . ► Feeling of heat over the whole body, [26] . ► Feeling of heat over the whole body, with increased thirst (soon after 40 grs., third day), [26] . ► Feverishness in the first part of the night, [22] . ► Febrile paroxysms, night and morning, [22] . ► Heat of the face (fifteenth day); came on suddenly at 5 P.M., during rest (seventeenth day), [32] . [1680.] ► Flushes of heat in the face, at 4 P.M. (fourteenth day), [32] . ► Face and hands glowing hot, while the arms were cold and deep internal chilliness continued, [31b] . ► Sensation of glowing heat in the face, which however was not noticeably red, at 4 P.M. (ninth day), [32] . ► Sweat. ► Cold clammy skin, [52] . ► Sweating profusely, [45] . ► Remarkable perspiration while sitting quietly in the evening (one hundred and eleventh day), [35] . ► Anxious sweat over the whole body while vomiting, [31b] . ► Cold perspiration on the hands (during vomiting), [12] . ► Hands cold, and bathed in cold sweat (after one hour and half), [51] . ► Cold sweat upon the forehead, extending as far as the root of the nose, while the rest of the body was dry (twenty-second day), [31] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), "Maziness" in head; on waking, vertigo; giddiness; on rising, heaviness, etc.; on waking at 5 o'clock, heavy pain in head; on waking, headache; on waking, pain in circumference of skull; pressive headache; lightness across forehead; on waking, pain in left side of forehead; pain in frontal bone ; soon after rising, pain over left eye; burning in eyes ; on waking, swelling of lids; dryness, etc., in lids; on waking, heaviness of upper lids; burning in margins of lids; lachrymation; sneezing; discharge from nose etc.; after waking, dryness of nose; obstruction of nose; bitter taste; on waking, pressive pain in throat; on waking, sore throat; feebleness of stomach; pain in stomach; griping in intestines, etc.; after waking, sensation in penis; on waking, soreness in larynx; after rising, roughness in larynx; irritation in larynx; on waking, hoarseness, etc.; hacking cough; dyspna; pain in side of chest; drawing in muscles of neck, etc.; pain in small of back; pain in sacrum, etc.; on waking, pain in coccyx; rheumatic pains; pain in limbs; on waking, pains in legs, etc.; on waking, pain in ulna; on waking, sticking in metacarpal joints; soon after rising, drawing in fingers, etc.; general discomfort, etc.; pains in various parts; on waking, tearing here and there. ► ( Forenoon ), Pinching in temporal bones; pressure in occiput; pain along orbital arch; burning, etc., on eyeball; stitches in ear; pressure on chest; venous excitement; symptoms in general. ► ( Afternoon ), Immediately after eating, pains in temple, etc.; pain over left eye; photophobia; heat of face. ► ( Evening ), Melancholy; vertigo; stitch in forehead; compression from both temples; burning in eyes; earache; pressure in ear; dryness of nose; soreness in nose; pain in cheek-bones; thirst; pain in right chest; prostration of limbs; burning in forearm; chilliness; perspiration. ► ( Night ), Pain in parietal region; itching, etc., in eyes; pains under scapula; rheumatic pains in shoulders; rheumatic pains in hip; in bed, shooting in great toe; in warmth of bed, heat, etc., of skin. ► ( After midnight ), Drawing, etc., in elbow. ► ( Open air ), Pain in forehead; burning, etc., in eye; smarting in eyes; fluent coryza; sore throat. ► ( Draught of air ), Twisting, etc., in abdomen. ► ( After breakfast ), Nausea. ► ( Cold air ), Pain above eyes. ► ( Coughing ), Stitch in lumbar region. ► ( After dinner ), Aversion to mental work; pain in head; pain in forehead; burning in eyes, etc.; sneezing; stitches in epigastrium, etc. ► ( In house ), Vertigo, etc. ► ( Inspiration ), Borborygmi, etc.; griping in lower belly; stitch in lumbar region. ► ( Lying down ), Vertigo; pains in temple. ► ( After meals ), Cough. ► ( Motion ), Pain over eye; pain above eyes; nausea; stitches in region of spleen, etc.; pain in lumbar region; pains in renal region; bruised pain in limbs; rheumatic pain in shoulder, etc. ► ( Pressure ), Stitches in region of spleen. ► ( Rest ), Ache in region of kidneys. ► ( Sitting ), Pain in coccyx. ► ( Smoking ), Burning in eyes, etc.; bad taste in mouth; metallic taste in mouth. ► ( Standing ), Vertigo. ► ( Stooping ), Giddiness; heaviness, etc.; pain in right flank; pain in loins. ► ( Walking ), Vertigo; headache across forehead, etc.; pressure in sacrum; pain in coccyx; especially when ascending steps, pain in sartorius muscle; pains, etc., in knees. ► ( In winter ), The pains. ► ( Writing ), Burning in right eye; burning in lower lids. ► Amelioration. ► ( Towards evening ), All pains. ► ( Night ), Pains, etc., in knees. ► ( Open air ), Vertigo, etc. ► ( Eating ), Nausea ; gastric symptoms. ► ( Pressure ), Griping in lower belly. ► ( Tea ), Giddiness. ► ( Walking about ), Heaviness, etc. ► ( Working ), General indolence.

FEVER. ► Chilliness. ► Chilliness, as in the onset of coryza, [1] . [1640.] ► Chilliness immediately after the cessation of the pains, [5] . ► Chilliness, after eating , [1] . ► Chilliness on every motion, even in bed (first days), [5] . ► Chilliness for two hours, without thirst, with confusion of the head, while riding over a stony road, [1] . ► At first chilliness, followed by heat of the face (after two days), [6] . ► Chilliness and sensation of coldness, in the morning, in bed, followed after a quarter of an hour by heat; again chilliness after a few hours, though without subsequent heat, [1] . ► Chilliness in the forenoon; hot hands in the evening, [1] . ► In the evening, chilliness and heat alternately, followed by sweat during the night (third day), [1] . ► Chilliness, in the evening at 9 o'clock, disappearing after lying down, and not followed by heat or thirst (first day), [5] . ► Constant chilliness, with great thirst and internal heat, with heat of the hands, and aversion to all food (after fourteen days), [1] . [1650.] ► Before menstruation, much chilliness, trembling of the limbs, and spasmodic sensation in the abdomen, [1] . ► Great chilliness, as in fever, without thirst; several evenings, [1] . ► Great chilliness , especially after eating, and towards evening, [1] . ► Internal chilliness at noon, with heat of the hands and subsequent heat over the body, though all without thirst, [1] . ► Constant internal chilliness for four days, without heat or thirst, with icy cold feet, confusion of the head, general prostration amounting to faintness; with swelling of the lower jaw and gum, and burning toothache, with stitches (after thirty-two days), [1] . ► Chilly and shivery, in the evening before lying down, [5] . ► Excessive febrile chill, towards evening, lasting several minutes; he is obliged to lie down; followed by nausea, vomiting, and cramplike pain in the chest the whole night, with short breath, much internal anxiety and much perspiration on the head (sixth day), [1] . ► Daily at 6 P.M., first febrile chill for an hour, with thirst; then heat, without thirst, with profuse fluent coryza; followed by slight perspiration during a natural sleep; on the subsequent morning scraping in the throat, bad taste in the mouth, loss of appetite, and agglutination of the left eye, [1] . ► Frequent shivering in the room, without subsequent heat, [5] . ► Frequent shivering, with yawning, relieved by the warmth of the stove, in the forenoon (first day), [5] . [1660.] ► Chilliness on the head, [1] . ► Chilliness on the crown of the head and over the whole body, in the evening (after twelve days), [1] . ► After the menses, in the evening, coldness of the back, and after midnight, waking with cramp and coldness in the stomach, which last till towards noon (nineteenth day), [1] . ► Cold hands , [1] . ► Cold feet , in bed, [1] . ► Cold feet, with heat of the face, [1] . ► Shivering in the back, in the morning, in bed, [1] . ► Heat. ► Increased warmth, at night, with violent pains in the zygoma, [5] . ► Heat, in the evening, in bed, without subsequent perspiration, [5] . ► First heat, and burning in the eyes like fever (at an open window), immediately followed by chilliness in the open air, in the afternoon, [1] . [1670.] ► Sleep at night interrupted by heat of the whole body, especially of the hands, and by very vivid dreams, [1] . ► *After taking cold in a draft of air, she becomes heated for a moment in the room, followed by heaviness of the limbs, tearing in the whole body and in the head, with roaring in the ears and general coldness, during the following night with sour-smelling perspiration (after thirty-one days), [1] . ► *Much heat, great thirst, and restless night, before menstruation , [1] . ► Internal and external heat, towards morning, without thirst (second day), [5] . ► Dry heat over the whole body, in the evening, [5] . ► Febrile heat every morning about 9 o'clock, and in the afternoon about 5, lasting from one-half to one hour, with deep yawning, excessive thirst, headache, and pulsation in the abdomen, [1] . ► He is attacked with fever in the evening after taking cold; towards morning perspiration with violent headache, and after rising confusion of the head, [1] . ► Febrile paroxysm, after becoming heated even to profuse perspiration, followed by becoming chilled in a cold bed, with burning headache, heat in the face, and violent, scarcely endurable shivering over the whole body; there breaks out such violent stopped catarrh that he can scarcely get any breath, with perspiration for three days (after thirty-eight days), [1] . ► Orgasm in the blood, and heat in the head, [1] . ► Orgasm in the blood, in the evening, before going to sleep, with oppression and tightness in the chest, [1] . [1680.] ► Heat and redness of the face, in the morning in bed, [1] . ► Long-continuing redness and heat in the face, with icy coldness of the feet, [1] . ► Very hot hands in the evening in bed, with momentary shuddering, and long hindered falling asleep, [4] . ► Dry heat of the cheeks and hands, with short breath, [1] . ► Sweat. ► Sweat in the morning in bed, [1] . ► *Night-sweat (first three nights, after two hours, and sixth days), [1] ; (after four days), [4] . ► Profuse sweat, while walking, [1] . ► Abundant warm sweat, with much heat, from midnight to 3 A.M., [8] . ► Perspires very easily during the day, [1] . ► Perspiration over the whole body, in the morning in bed (sixth day), [1] . [1690.] ► Profuse perspiration on every mental exertion, while reading, writing, etc., [1] . ► Sweat on the soles of the feet, [1] . ► Profuse sweat on the feet, for several days, [4] . ► Perspiration on the head, neck, and upper part of the body, during sleep, [1] . ► Perspiration on the perineum, at night, [1] . ► Perspiration in the axillæ , [1] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), On waking, out of humor; on waking, peevish thoughts; on waking, headache, during menses, headache; stitches in forehead; stitches into left ear; nosebleed; on waking, soreness of lips; on waking, pain in teeth; after waking, aggravated by eating, pain in roots of teeth; on waking, stitches in teeth, etc.; tongue dry, etc .; offensive odor from mouth; after waking, numbness in mouth; dryness in mouth ; burning in mouth, etc.; at about 3 o'clock, water running from mouth; bitter taste; after waking, taste of blood; on waking, loss of taste; mucus in throat; mucus in back of throat, etc.; hawking, etc.; on waking, feeling of lump in front of throat; eructations; acid eructations ; relieved by walking, cramps in stomach; pressure in stomach ; feeling in stomach; throbbing in pit of stomach; colic in upper abdomen; in bed, griping in abdomen; from 3 to 4 o'clock, diarrha; fasting, cough; cough ; at 5 o'clock, cough, etc.; shortness of breath; cutting in chest ; stitches in side; tearing in nape of neck; tearing in right scapula ; pressure in back; on rising, bruised feeling in small of back; pain in shoulder; on raising arm while writing, sticking in axilla; in bed, stitches in elbows; when writing, trembling of hands; on waking, hands fall asleep ; tips of fingers fall asleep; in bed, drawing in finger; after waking, numbness of leg; in bed, heaviness of body; at 2 or 3 o'clock, pains recur; after usual stool, pains renewed; in bed, chilliness, etc.; in bed, shivering in back; about 9 o'clock, febrile heat, etc.; in bed, heat, etc., in face; in bed, sweat ; perspiration on perineum. ► ( Forenoon ), Pain in whole head; drawing in forehead ; pain in left teeth; thirst; nausea; chilliness; shivering, etc. ► ( Noon ), Peevish mood; pressure upon eyes. ► ( Afternoon ), While walking, pressive headache in forehead, etc .; nose thick, etc.; towards evening, anxiety in chest; stitches in costal regions; weary in thighs; towards evening, chilliness, etc.; at 6 o'clock, febrile chill, etc.; heat, etc.; about 5 o'clock, febrile heat, etc. ► ( Evening ), Sadness; anxious presentiments; in bed, fretfulness; on falling asleep, out of humor; peevish mood; after falling asleep and waking again, confusion in head, etc.; dullness, etc.; in head; pain in head, etc.; before lying down, heat in head; on going to sleep, pressure in forehead, etc.; pressure on top of head; one-sided headache; before going to sleep, tearing in left eye; in bed, pain in eyebrow; lachrymation, etc.; in bed, stitches in ears; hearing blunted; fluent coryza, etc.; twitching in cheek, etc.; tearing from temple into jaw; drawing in teeth; on getting into bed, drawing toothache ; pressive toothache; stitches in front teeth; dryness in mouth; sore throat; before lying down, thirst; tearing in right side of abdomen; pain in lower abdomen; smarting in anus; crawling, etc.; in anus; diarrha; in bed, cough; fatiguing cough; after lying down, especially when lying on right side tearing in bones of chest; in bed, uneasiness in limbs ; tearing in upper arm; feeling in thighs; tearing in knee; while sitting, cramp in great toe; weakness, before going to sleep, disappearing in bed; itching over body; chilliness; chilliness on crown of head, etc.; in bed, heat; dry heat all over; in bed, hot hands, etc. ► ( Night ), After lying down, sad foreboding; while lying in bed, rush of blood to head; pressive headache; tearing in orbit, etc.; lachrymation; only when lying upon it; throbbing in ear; pain in tooth, etc.; sticking toothache; jerking, etc., in tooth; acidity in mouth; thirst; in bed, gradually disappearing on rising, qualmishness; pains in stomach; an hour after falling asleep, cramp in stomach; pressure, etc., in stomach; emission of flatulence; colic, etc.; burning in anus; urging to stool; diarrha; cough ; from 9 P.M., till morning, cough; dry cough, etc.; arrest of breath; tension in sides; stiffness in nape of neck; on waking, stiffness of neck etc.; in bed, burning in limbs; stiffness in arms, etc.; throbbing in upper arm; restlessness of hands; towards morning, in bed, thumb falls asleep; cramp in thigh, etc .; on waking, tearing, etc., in lower legs; in bed, cramp in calf, etc.; pain in whole body; after going to bed, at 11 o'clock, itching stickings all over; in bed, itching all over; warmth etc., heat all over; towards morning, heat; sweat . ► ( Midnight ), Drawing in forehead. ► ( Before midnight ), Hiccough; cough. ► ( After midnight ), Soon, soreness in lids; rising of water from stomach; sticking in chest; till 3 A.M., warm sweat, etc. ► ( Open air ), Vertigo; burning, etc., of eyes; face pale etc., all troubles, especially febrile condition. ► ( Walking in open air ), Headache; tearing in one side of head; pressure, etc., in abdomen; pressure in back. ► ( Bending backwards ), Pain in small of back. ► ( After breakfast ), Bitter-sour taste. ► ( Cold ), Tearing, etc., in back tooth, etc. ► ( On becoming cold ), Pain in pharynx. ► ( Cold things in mouth ), Toothache. ► ( During dinner ), Fretful mood, etc.; pains about umbilicus, etc.; falling asleep of foot. ► ( After dinner ), Constriction in head; ulcerative pain in head; digging in back tooth; throbbing, etc., in incisors; itching, etc., in back tooth; sticking in upper abdomen; feet fall asleep . ► ( Eating ), Toothache ; tearing toothache; throbbing in teeth. ► ( After eating ), Vertigo; jerking, etc., in tooth; especially after breakfast, pressure in stomach; immediately, fulness, etc., in abdomen; tickling in larynx; weariness, etc.; chilliness . ► ( After physical fatigue in open air ), Weeping mood. ► ( Food or drink ), Especially cold, pains in stomach. ► ( Knitting ), Tearing in shoulder; tearing in wrist. ► ( Laughing ), Stitches in side of abdomen. ► ( Lying down ), Headache. ► ( Mental exertion ), Perspiration. ► ( Motion ), Throbbing, etc., in teeth; pain in upper arm; drawing on surface of wrist; chilliness. ► ( Moving head ), Sensation in head; throbbing behind ears; falling asleep of knees. ► ( Pressure ), Pain in upper left side of head. ► ( Rest ), Drawing in abdomen, etc.; after physical exertion, pain in back; bruised pain in back; pain in joints of knees, etc .; tearing in axilla. ► ( Riding in carriage ), Tension along side of back. ► ( Rising from sitting ), Griping in groins; pain in knee; tearing in calves. ► ( Rising from stooping ), Pressure in side of skull; twitching etc., in ear; sticking in right chest. ► ( Running ), Stitches in tendons. ► ( After singing ), Feeling of lump in throat; soreness of throat. ► ( Sitting ), Retraction of umbilical region; griping in groins; sticking in left chest; pain between scapulæ, etc.; pain above small of back; tearing in lumbar region; pain in region of kidneys; crawling in limbs, etc.; sensation in knee. ► ( Standing ), Vertigo; pressure in occiput, etc.; drawing in thigh ; twitches on lower leg; tension in calf. ► ( Stepping ), Stitches in occiput. ► ( Stooping ), Feeling in forehead; stitches in occiput. ► ( During supper ), Pain in front teeth, etc. ► ( After supper ), Itching in anus. ► ( Talking ), Frontal lightness, etc.; soreness of chest . ► ( Bending talked to ), Frontal lightness. ► ( Touching body ), Fright. ► ( Turning around ), Vertigo . ► ( On uncovering body ), Roughness in throat. ► ( Violin playing ), Cough. ► ( Walking ), Vertigo; pressure in forehead, etc.; pain in liver ; feeling in lower abdomen; on expiration tension across chest; pain in knee; especially on extending leg, pain on side of knee; stitches, etc., in feet. ► ( Walking rapidly ), Weakness in head. ► ( Warmth of bed ), Drawing in thigh . ► ( Writing ), Vertigo; throbbing in head; feeling in forehead; pressure in whole frontal region; dyspna, etc. ► Amelioration. ► ( Afternoon ), On waking, stopped catarrh. ► ( Open air ), Vertigo; pain in occiput; feels better. ► ( Tight binding ), Tearing, etc.; in back tooth. ► ( Leaning head on hand ), Frontal lightness, etc. ► ( Lying ), Drawing in small of back. ► ( Moving about ), Pain in head, etc.; stiffness in neck; pain between shoulders. ► ( Pressure ), Itching, etc., in back tooth. ► ( Rest ), Giddiness; pressure in forehead, etc.; pain in small of back. ► ( Sitting up in bed ), Headache. ► ( Swallowing food ), Soreness of throat. ► ( Warmth ), Toothache. ► ( Wrapping up head ), Pressive headache at night. >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-c. FEVER. ► Fever on the next day, with general shivering, violent chill in the limbs, [13] . ► Skin hot and dry (third day), [15] . ► Cold sweat over the whole body, [13] . FEVER. ► Skin cold, cyanotic, covered with cold, clammy sweat, [53] . ► Excessive coldness, with redness of the face, [52] . Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-n.

head.text: HEAD. ► Confusion and Vertigo. [60.] ► Confusion of the whole head, as if screwed in, with sticking in the brain, with frequent pauses, [5] . ► Confusion of the head, as after intoxication, and as if the ears were stopped, with nausea, almost amounting to vomiting (after eight days), [6] . ► Frequent confusion of the head , [1] . ► Frequent confusion of the head in the morning, and heaviness in the region of the eyebrows, [1] . ► Confused feeling in the head, as if he had not slept enough, in the morning after rising, and a feeling as if befogged, with loss of liveliness, [5] . ► In the evening, after falling asleep and waking again, she was confused in her head, had no ideas, did not know where she was, and then was seized with frightful anxiety, after which she again became quiet, [1] . ► Feeling as if intoxicated (fourth day), [1] . ► *Vertigo on suddenly turning the body and head , [1] . ► *Vertigo on turning around , [6] . ► An attack of vertigo as often as he rises from his chair and turns around, [1] . [70.] ► Vertigo, as if there were a depth behind him, and he would fall down, on turning around , after looking into a mirror and after reading, [1] . ► Vertigo, immediately on rising, as if the head were too light; she is obliged to hold it, [1] . ► Vertigo, especially after eating, [1] . ► Vertigo while sitting, like a swaying to and fro (before eating), [1] . ► Vertigo while sitting, so that he dares not rise for fear of falling, [5] . ► Vertigo, as if reeling, while standing and walking, better in the open air, [1] . ► Vertigo, as if intoxicated, while walking, so that he staggered from side to side, [5] . ► Vertigo, while writing and in the open air; everything turns around with him, [5] . ► Dizziness in the head, mostly in the morning and evening, [6] . ► Very dizzy, even while sitting (after thirty hours), [6] . [80.] ► Giddiness in forehead, as if she would fall forwards, on holding head down, [8] . ► Giddiness in forehead while rising from lying to sit up in bed; she then opens her eyes wide as if to see, for she does not reach far enough forwards if she tries to grasp anything; the same giddiness is felt during the act of lying down again, and she then also feels as if she were descending a great way; the giddiness is not felt at rest, whether sitting or lying, [8] . ► Frontal lightness and giddiness on moving, as if all things in the room were going round (not as if room were revolving), when talking or being talked to; feels as if she must lean head on hand as it seems to hold head still, and relieves the giddiness and lightness, [8] . ► General Head. ► A constant in the head as though something in it were loose , and turned and twisted toward the forehead, [1] . ► Painful turning and twisting within the head, [1] . ► The head several times jerks towards the left side, without loss of consciousness, whereupon the nape of the neck feels stiff, [1] . ► Dulness and confusion in the head, in the evening, [6] . ► Weakness of the head, [1] . ► Great warmth in the head, especially in the right side of the face, frequently (fifth day), [5] . ► Taking cold in the head is followed by pain in the head and teeth, [1] . [90.] ► Violent pain in the whole head, with throbbing and sticking in the knees, disappearing on moving about; in the evening, [5] . ► Burning painful sensation of heat in the head, [1] . ► Rising heat in the head, in the evening, before lying down; disappearing in bed, [5] . ► Headache in the morning, on waking, lasting a quarter of an hour, for several mornings, [1] . ► During the menses, headache in the morning, with great heaviness, [5] . ► Headache relieved by sitting up in bed, aggravated by lying down, [1] . ► During the menses, great headache on the second day, from morning till evening, [4] . ► Violent headache for several hours, from walking in the open air, [1] . ► A feeling of fulness in the head, as if the brain pressed hard against the skull, [5] . ► Rush of blood to the head, and a feeling of intoxication therefrom, [1] . [100.] ► Rush of blood to the head, at night while lying in bed; at times it seemed as though the senses would vanish, [1] . ► Warm rush of blood to the head, with orgasm of blood in the body, and after some hours slight headache (immediately), [1] . ► After dinner constriction in the head like a band about it, [1] . ► Violent pressure from within outward, as if the brain would press forward, [5] . ► Violent pressive pain in the whole head, with shivering chill over the whole body, especially in the forenoon, [4] . ► Violent pressure over the whole skull, extending down the nape of the neck, throbbing in the head and whole body; the pain does not tolerate the slightest touch, and is aggravated in paroxysms, with excessive nausea and vomiting of bile, [3] . ► *Pressive headache , [1] . ► Pressive headache for several nights, disappearing on wrapping up the head, [1] . ► Shattering headache, [1] . ► Dull sticking in the head (first day), [1] . [110.] ► Stitches through the whole head, [1] . ► Jerking-tearing pain in the head, [1] . ► Ulcerative pain in the head, after dinner; she was obliged to lie down, when it became better, [5] . ► Painful throbbing in the head when she writes, [1] . ► Jerking headache, the whole day, [1] . ► A painful sensation as of something movable in the head, worse on moving the head, [1] . ► Weakness in the head just over the eyes, after walking rapidly (seventeenth day), [1] . ► Forehead. ► Heaviness and pain in the sinciput, [5] . ► A sensation on stooping as if something were sinking from the occiput towards the forehead, [1] . ► A feeling in the forehead as if a hot body were lying before it, frequently repeated while stooping and writing, disappearing on rising, [5] . [120.] ► Terrible headache through the eyes, [1] . ► A feeling in the forehead as if it would burst, in frequent short paroxysms, [5] . ► Drawing in the forehead, in the forenoon and at midnight (second and thirtieth days), [2] . ► *Pressure and drawing tearing in the forehead, extending into the eyes and root of the nose (fourteenth, seventeenth, eighteenth, and twenty-first days), [2] . ► Pressure in the forehead, in the evening, on going to sleep, with qualmish nausea, as if the stomach were disordered; relieved by rest, aggravated when walking, [1] . ► Pressure in the forehead, with photophobia , [2] . ► Severe pressure and drawing in the forehead in the evening, [6] . ► Violent pressure from within outwards, in the whole frontal region, while writing, [5] . ► Pressive pain in the forehead, like a confusion, [5] . ► Pressive pain in the forehead, with vomiting of mucus and acids, [3] . [130.] ► Pressive headache in the forehead, in the afternoon, while walking, with peevishness (thirteenth, nineteenth, and twentieth days), [2] . ► Sticking in the forepart of the head, [1] . ► Violent sticking in the forehead the whole day, and at times also in the left side of the head; together with severe pain in the chest and icy coldness of the limbs, [1] . ► Stitches in the forehead like needles, [5] . ► Stitches in the forehead, in the morning, [1] . ► Stitches in the upper part of the forehead and above the temples, on moving the lower jaw, [1] . ► Tearing in the left frontal eminence (twenty-fifth day), [2] . ► Throbbing and beating in the forehead, and especially in the sides of the head, frequently intermitting; also after dinner, while walking and standing, [5] . ► A digging throbbing in the frontal bone, above the left eye, [5] . ► Throbbing pain in the forehead, [1] . [140.] ► Crawling pain above the forehead, [1] . ► Temples. ► Pain in temples, especially in the right one, as if proceeding from the stiff neck, [8] . ► Pinching pain in the left temple at intervals; also tearings , [2] . ► Pressure in the right temple, from morning till noon (after eleven days), [6] . ► Pressure and pressing in the right temple (eleventh, nineteenth, and twentieth days), [2] . ► A sticking pressure inward in the left temple, [5] . ► Pressive pain from within outward, in the right temple, [5] . ► A sharp pressive pain in the temple, externally, [1] . ► Pressive headache in the left temple (sixth day), [2] . ► Pressive headache from both temples towards the middle. [150.] ► *Sticking in the temples , [1] . ► Sticking in the temples, even to starting up and crying out, in the right temple, with tearing, [5] . ► A stitch above the left temple, and immediately afterwards in the middle of the forehead, extending from within outward, [5] . ► Some tearing stitches in the left temple, extending into the zygoma, [2] . ► Tearing in the right and left temple, also in the left parietal bone, [5] . ► Beating vibration in the right temple, [1] . ► Jerking in the left temple, [1] . ► Painless bubbling-like twitching of the muscles in the right temple, [2] . ► Vertex. ► Headache in the vertex, when pressing upon the head, [1] . ► Pinching pain in the whole upper part of the head, especially in the left side, [2] . [160.] ► Drawing and tearing on the vertex (thirty-third and thirty-fourth days), [2] . ► Pressure upon the top of the head, in the evening, [6] . ► Parietals. ► A severe heavy sensation in the left half of the head, [5] . ► After taking cold, headache in the right side and heat in the eyes, [1] . ► *Paroxysms of one-sided headache, right and left, with weakness and exhaustion, almost amounting to nausea, in the evening, [2] . ► A tearing drawing in the left half of the head , above, in front of, and in the temple (twelfth, nineteenth, and twenty-fifth days), [1] . ► Pressure from without inward on the right side of the skull, on rising up from stooping, [5] . ► A stitch through the right side of the head, from behind forward, [3] . ► Beating (throbbing) pain in the upper part of the left side of the head; on pressure the pain becomes more violent and sticking; more externally, [5] . ► Occiput. ► Heaviness in the occiput, like a confusion, [5] . [170.] ► Heaviness in the occiput, as if it were filled with lead, the head constantly falls backward, with stiffness of the nape of the neck, extending to between the shoulder-blades, [1] . ► Aching and heaviness in the occiput, worse on swallowing, [8] . ► Drawing in the occiput and nape of the neck, especially in the right side with stiffness, [2] . ► Pressure and burning low down in the occiput, with heaviness of the head, even to falling forward, [5] . ► Violent pressure in the occiput, with rush of blood in the head and a feeling of heaviness, while standing, [5] . ► Pressive pain in the occiput, extending to the nape of the neck, disappearing in the open air, [1] . ► Stitches extending from the nape of the neck into the occiput, [1] . ► Stitches in the occiput, on stepping and on stooping, as if upon the surface of the brain, [1] . ► Tearing, now in the right, now in the left side of the occiput, and now in forehead (first day), [5] . ► Throbbing tearing in the right side of the occiput, close to the nape of the neck (sixteenth day), [2] . ► External Head. [180.] ► *Dryness of the hair , [1] . ► Falling of the hair , [1] , [4] . ► Pimples on the scalp, [1] . ► Painful pimple on the right side of the head, as if a boil would form (sixth day), [6] . ► Sticking pain externally on the head and in the nape of the neck, with a sticking swelling of the cheek, and sticking in the teeth, [1] . ► Fine stitches externally in various parts of the head, [5] . ► Violent tearing externally on one side of the head, while walking in the open air, [1] . ► Itching on the scalp, [1] . ► Itching on the scalp, with sore pain when scratched, [6] . ► Frequent itching on the head, especially on the occiput, [5] . EYE. ► Objective. [190.] ► Redness and heat of the eyes, [4] . ► Blue rings around the eyes, [1] . ► Redness of the white of the eye, with many vessels in it , [1] . ► Swelling of the right eye, [1] . ► Inflammation of the whites of both eyes, with burning pain (fifth day), [1] . ► Subjective. ► Dryness of the eyes (second day), [1] . ► Feeling of dryness in the eyes as from sand, and of intense sleepiness in the eyes, [1] . ► The eyes become painful and weak, [1] . ► The eyes are painful on moving them, [1] . ► Both eyes seem very hot to the touch, [1] . [200.] ► Eyes hot, with scalding tears, the lachrymation worse on looking at anything, [8] . ► Pain in the left eye on directing it upward, [1] . ► *Burning in the eyes , [1] . ► Burning in both eyes, [5] . ► Burning and biting in the eyes , [1] . ► Burning and dryness of the eyes, worse in the open air than in the room, [5] . ► Eyes burn at night, especially left, [8] . ► Boring pain in the eyes, [1] . ► Pinching in the eyes, [1] . ► Pressure in the eyes , [1] . [210.] ► Pressure in the eyes, and dry matter in the lashes, [1] . ► Pressure upon the eyes and in the orbits, with sleepiness, at noon (thirty-sixth day), [2] . ► Pain as if the eyes would be pressed inward, [1] . ► *The eyes are painful on reading , as if pressed inward, [1] . ► Biting and transient sticking pains in the eyes, [2] . ► Stitches in the middle of the eye , [1] . ► Stitches in the right eye (twenty-first day), [4] . ► Tearing in the left eye, in the evening before going to sleep, [2] . ► A pressive tearing within the right eye (twelfth and twenty-sixth days), [2] . ► Smarting pain in the eye (fourth day), [6] . [220.] ► Itching in the eyes, [1] . ► Brow and Orbit. ► Swelling of the glabella between the eyebrows (twenty-first day), [1] . ►► *Swelling between the eyebrows and lids, like a sac , [1] . ► Pain as if a boil would form in the left eyebrow, in the evening in bed (eighth and thirteenth days), [2] . ► Pressure above the eyes , with a violent pain in the whole forehead, [1] . ► A boring pressure inward above the left eye, [5] . ► Sharp tearing in the right orbit and in the eye at night (thirtieth and thirty-first days), [1] . ► A pressive tearing in the region of the right eyebrow (twenty-sixth day), [1] . ► Jerking and twitching in the right eyebrow, [1] . ► Lids. ► *Swelling of the upper lid toward the nose, [1] . [230.] ► *Inflammation of the lids of the right eye, with pain in the eyes and inability to read by the light , [1] . ► Agglutination of the eyes, in the morning (after sixteen hours), [1] . ► The eyes are agglutinated by mucus in the morning, [5] . ► The eyes maturate in the canthi, [1] . ► Eyes gum in outer canthi, especially the left, [8] . ► The eyelids are difficult to open on waking in the morning, [1] . ► The eyelids close forcibly, [1] . ► Burning in the eyelids, [1] . ► The child complains of coldness in the lids, [1] . ► A pulling or tearing in the right lid and above the right eye, [1] .
