[140.] ► Pressure in the right eye (second day), [29a] . ► Momentary pressure in both eyes at different times (fifth day), [29a] . ► Pressure shooting through both eyes, soon after supper (fifth day), [29a] . ► Slight pressure in the left eye (second day), [29a] . ► Painful pressure in the eyes, as if sand or dust were in them, the whole day (after sixteen days), [13] . ► Drawing pressure through the left eye and left side of the forehead, following an oblique course (seventh day), [25a] . ► Constant tearing in the inner canthi, [13] . ► Burning biting as from salt water, especially in the left eye (twenty-eighth day), [13] . ► Itching of the right eye, and constant acrid lachrymation, which runs over the cheek, [12] . ► Sticking itching on the inner angle of the left and on the outer angle of the right eye; itching on the right side of the neck, left upper arm, left side of the forehead, right side of the chest, etc. (ninth day), [29a] . ► Orbit. [150.] ► Compressive pain in the orbits aggravated by pressing on the upper part of the eyeball (ninth day), [28] . ► Lids. ► Lids of the right eye still red with much itching (eleventh day), [28] . ► Inflamed redness and swelling of the right eyelid, burning in the external canthus of the same eye and pressive stitches (ninth day), [28] . ► With the headache the eyelids close, [14] . ► Agglutination of both eyes, in the morning (nineteenth day), [13] . ► Agglutination of the right eye with mucus, in the morning (fifteenth day), [13] . ► Pressure beneath the upper lid of the left eye, as from a hair, [14] . ► Sticking and burning in the lid constantly increased together with the headache, so that I was totally unable to work, on account of which I took Aconite 6th by olfaction, which somewhat relieved the pains (ninth day), [28] . ► Burning biting of the lids of the right eye; is obliged to rub them, [15] . ► Lachrymal Apparatus. ► Much water constantly flows involuntarily from the right eye, [12] . ► Ball. [160.] ► Pain in the left eyeball as if it were grasped and compressed from both sides, so that its long axis was increased, at 3 P.M., during dinner (second day), [29] . ► Pressure in the right eyeball (seventh day), [29a] . ► Very transient pressive pain in the right eyeball, [26c] . ► Slight pressure, on the right eyeball at different times (ninth day), [29a] . ► Vision. ► Loss of sight, [39] . ► Transient blindness, [16] . ► After taking saltpetre, the odor of camphor frequently makes it black before the eyes so that she can see nothing, [14] . ► Rings of variegated colors before the eyes, with good visual power, for two days, [14] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-n. HEAD. ► Reeling so she cannot stand, [52] . EYE. ► Eyes staring, immovable, the pupils dilated, [53] .

nose.text: NOSE. ► Objective. ► The nose is red, hot, and covered with many white pimples, [1] . ► *The nose is thick and red ; especially worse in the afternoon, [1] . ► Great swelling of the tip of the nose, [1] . [330.] ► A small pimple in the left nostril (after five days), [6] . ► *Scurfy nostrils , [4] . ► *Sore scurfy nostrils , lasting a long time, [1] . ► Ulceration of both nostrils, [1] . ► Ulcerative pain in the right nostril, [5] . ► *Stoppage of the nose , [1] . ► During the menses, on the second day, nasal catarrh, pain in the abdomen, toothache, pain in the back, sticking in the ears and restless sleep, [4] . ► Stopped catarrh (after twenty-six days), [4] . ► Stopped catarrh, so that he could scarcely draw his breath, [1] . ► Stopped catarrh, which disappears in the afternoon on walking (after three days), [5] . [340.] ► Stopped catarrh, with much yellowish-green mucus in the nose, [1] . ► Stopped catarrh frequently, also in the evening in bed, with crawling in the throat (after eleven days), [2] . ► Stopped catarrh, with itching in the nose; she could with difficulty get air enough through for several days (after four days), [5] . ► Coryza, with bloody mucus from the nose (after eight days), [4] . ► Fluent coryza the whole day, especially in the evening, [1] . ► Fluent coryza, with excessive sneezing, as many as thirty times in a day, [1] . ► Profuse fluent coryza , [1] . ► Profuse fluent coryza, every evening, with frequent sneezing, [1] . ► Profuse fluent coryza, with much sneezing, pain in the back and head (tenth day), [1] . ► Excessive fluent coryza (after twenty-nine days), [1] . [350.] ► Blowing of a purulent substance from the right nostril; it then becomes stopped and blowing causes a sticking, constrictive pain extending to the occiput, [3] . ► Offensive matter is blown from the right nostril, [1] . ► *Frequent bleeding of the nose , [1] . ► Nosebleed in the morning, [1] . ► The right nostril is bloody every morning, [1] . ► Subjective. ► Burning in the left nostril, [1] . ► Burning and biting in the upper part of the left nostril extending into the ethmoid bone (twenty-third day), [2] . ► Violent burning in the nose, [1] . ► A pinching in the nose and root of the nose, especially on the right side (twenty-third day), [2] . ► Itching in the nose, [1] . [360.] ► Frequent itching in the right nostril, [5] . ► Smell. ► Acute smell, [1] .

NOSE. ► Objective. [160.] ► Ineffectual efforts to sneeze, [1] . ► Sneezing (first day), [35] . ► Frequent sneezing with running of clear water from the nose (third day), [1] . ► Frequent sneezing with lachrymation, [2] . ► Running from the nose, [24] . ► Coryza (fourth day), [34] . ► Symptoms of severe coryza, and of bronchitis, with the exception of fever and muco-purulent expectoration, [16] . ► *Acute coryza; great redness of the mucous membrane of the eyes, nose, throat and palate, with profuse lachrymation, violent sneezing, and running of water from the nose , frequent irritation to cough and swelling of the upper lids; this coryza lasted for a long time, [25] . ► Fluent coryza, the head being badly stuffed up, [2] . ► He can get scarcely any air through the nose on account of catarrh, in the morning after waking (after twenty-three days), [1] . [170.] ► (The catarrh previously existing disappeared), (after eight days), [1] . ► Found him in bed with his head wrapped up in a flannel nightcap; he had got a desperate cold, somehow, the day before, with which he woke up, but was getting better (second morning); he took no more Iodide, and was free from his desperate cold the next day, [38] . ►► *Accumulation of very tenacious mucus in the nostrils , [2] . ► Profuse discharge of thick yellow mucus from the nose, [1] . ►► *Discharge from the nose of greenish-black or yellow matter, of a foul and sickening smell , [2] . ► Burning water runs profusely from the nose and makes the skin sore, [1] . ► Nosebleed, whereby she lost more than half a pound of blood in two hours (second day), [1] . ► Violent nosebleed, which could not be stopped by anything (after eleven days), [1] . ►► *Discharge from the nose of decomposed greenish-red blood , [2] . ► Subjective. ► Feeling in the upper part of the nose as though a leaf were lying in front of it, with burning (sixteenth day), [1] . [180.] ► Stoppage of the nose, from which only clear water runs, [1] . ► Burning in the nose and throat (after one hour), [25] . ► Burning in the nostrils with running of water from the nose, and at the same time stoppage of them (after eleven days), [1] . ►► *Sensation of fulness in the nose, with beating pains in the nasal bones , [2] . ► Fine tearing in the upper part of the left nostril (after twelve days), [1] . ► *Gnawing sensation in the nasal bones, with lancinating and boring pains extending to the forehead , [2] . ►► *Throbbing and burning pains in the nasal and frontal bones, with swelling , [2] . ► Loss of smell (after twelve days), [1] .

NOSE. ► Objective. ► The skin of the nose is red as if inflamed, [12] . ► Tip of the nose inflamed (thirty-seventh day), [14] . ► An ulcer deep in the right nostril, that after several days is covered with a scab (after nineteen days), [13] . ► Sneezing in the morning without catarrh (tenth day), [29a] . ► Frequent sneezing (second day), [27] ; (nineteenth and twentieth days), [14] ; in evening, about 10 o'clock (ninth day), [29a] . ► Much sneezing almost immediately, [12] . ► (Violent sneezing, several times), (ninth day), [29a] . ► Violent sneezing, in the morning (thirtieth and fortieth days), [13] . [200.] ► Some drops of water run from the nose without catarrh, [12] . ► Catarrh with sneezing (soon after a new dose), [13] . ► Violent catarrh, with stoppage of the nose, loss of smell, and rough voice (eleventh and twelfth days), [13] . ► Stopped rather than fluent catarrh, with burning externally about the nose, [12] . ► Catarrh now dry, now fluent, though constant, [12] . ► The catarrh flowed freely in the open air, less so in the house, [26b] . ► (The catarrh from which he suffered became unusually worse, from the right nostril clear water dropped, and the mucus was difficult to loosen), [26b] . ► Bleeding from the nose, without relief to the head, took place on the day following bleeding from the scurf on the tip of the nose, [14] . ► Bleeding from the nose three times in one week; the blood acrid like vinegar (after twenty days), [14] . ► Bleeding from left nostril when blowing the nose, [13] . [210.] ► Bleeding from the left nostril, immediately after rising, followed by relief of the headache, [26c] . ► Bleeding from the nose in the afternoon (after twenty days), [13] . ► Blowing of blood from the nose, soon after rising, followed by some nosebleed, [26c] . ► Clotted blood, or small balls of blood, come from the nose on blowing it (after seventeen days), [13] . ► Subjective. ► Dryness of the nose and burning of the (usually) sore place in the nose (seventh day), [28] . ► Stoppage of the nose, with a disagreeable taste (third day), [28] . ► Stoppage of the nose with frequent sneezing (nineteenth day), [13] . ► Stoppage of the nose for two days, followed by discharge of purulent offensive mucus with sneezing (after forty-eight days), [13] . ► Burning about the nose with burrowing and clawing, aggravated by touch, with swelling of the right nostril, as if there were an eruption in it with want of air in the nose, [14] . ► Burning in the right nostril as if sore, when blowing the nose (fourth day), [13] . [220.] ► Clawing and burning about the wings of the nose, [14] . ► Swollen feeling in the right nostril , which is painful on pressure, [13] . ► Sore pain in the upper part of the right nostril , with sensitiveness to external pressure, [13] . ► The bones of the nose are painful, especially when taken hold of, [12] . ► Pain in the tip of the nose as if a pustule would form (sixth day), [14] . ► Itching in the left side of the tip of the nose, internally (eighth day), [29a] .

face.text: FACE. ► Objective. ► *Sickly color of the face, with pale lips , [4] . ► *Paleness of the face after a meal, [1] . ► Before and after dinner paleness of the face, nausea, vertigo, with eructations, weakness of the limbs, and coldness of the hands and feet, though not without appetite, [2] . ► *Paleness of the face and weakness , [1] . ► Pale face, with weak eyes, [1] . ► Lifeless expression, [1] . ► Face pale and hollow-eyed, especially in the open air, in which the child looks as if frozen, [1] . ► The child becomes glowing red in the face in the morning, vomits its breakfast, then becomes deathly pale; after repeated vomitings, it again becomes well, but remains very weak for two days, [1] . ► Burning-red cheeks for half an hour in the evening, followed by great paleness of the face, [1] . [370.] ► Cheeks thick, with tearing and sticking, [1] . ► Cheeks thick, red, with fine papulous eruption, also on the nose, [1] . ► Swelling of the right cheek in the lower portion, with stitches and pain when touched, [1] . ► Great swelling of the cheeks, which develops into ulceration of the gum, without previous toothache, [1] . ► Cheeks. ► Burning in the face beneath the right eye, [3] . ► Pressive drawing in the muscles of the cheeks near the lower jaw, [2] . ► Tearing in the left zygoma, and afterwards in the inner side of the cheek, [2] . ► Tearing in the left zygoma, only mitigated by pressing upon it, with a sensation as if the cheek were swollen, through the evening and night till the next morning, so that she cried and could not sleep, [5] . ► Pinching-tearing in the right zygoma, extending into the palate, [2] . ► Twitching in the left cheek, with fine burning stitches, with tearing extending into the left temple, in the evening, [5] . ► Lips. [380.] ► Lower lip thick and ulcerated, [1] . ► Swelling of the upper lip, with cracks, sensitive to touch and bleeding easily, [1] . ► Burning in the lips, [4] . ► Burning in the lower lip, [5] . ► Cramplike sensation in the lips, [1] . ► A stitch in the upper lip, [5] . ► Tearing in the left side of the upper lip and in the gum, disappearing on pressing upon them, [5] . ► Soreness of the red of the lips; they are sticky, as if agglutinated, in the morning on waking, [1] . ► Smarting, sore pain around the mouth in the margin of the red of the lips, very sensitive to touch, [1] . ► Chin. ► Swelling of the lower jaw and the glans, with looseness of the teeth, [1] . [390.] ► Grinding of the teeth at night in sleep, [1] . ► Pinching pain in the right lower jaw, not far from the articulation, [2] . ► Distressing cramp in the jaws, which also draws the pharynx together, [1] . ► Tearing in the lower jaw and in front of the right ear, [5] . ► Tearing extending from the left temple into the articulation of the jaw in the evening, [2] . FACE. ► She looked haggard and exhausted (second day), [15] .

FACE. ► Objective. ► Look characteristically quick and anxious, [52] . ► Remarkably earnest, wild, uncertain look, [51] . [190.] ► Remarkably sad and dejected expression of countenance, [51] . ► Looks sometimes excited, sometimes depressed, [54] . ► *Paleness of face (after one hour), [4] . ► (Great paleness of the face, with the spasmodic attacks), [1] . ► *Face colorless and transparent-looking, like a porcelain mask, [2] . ► Discolored complexion, [51] . ► Earthy-looking complexion, [52] . ► Bistre-colored complexion, [56] . ► Complexion rather yellow, [55] . ► Yellow, bilious complexion, with black circles around the eyes, [2] . [200.] ► Complexion more yellowish-green than dead white, [54] . ► Face yellow, greenish, dark, and much emaciated, [2] . ► Red, puffy, inflamed face; with a phlyctenoid eruption, [2] . ► Face very red (after three hours), [25] . ► Swelling of face, [49] . ► Swelling of the face, particularly of the eyelids, and of the submaxillary region (three hours after third dose), [26] . ► Inflammation and swelling of the facial bones, [2] . ► Emaciation of face and neck, [52] . ► Lengthened visage, [54] . ► Subjective. ► Face very sensitive to air, which also aggravates all the symptoms of that part, [2] . [210.] ► An indescribable pain extending out from the left ear, and if she only moves the hand towards the ear without even touching it, it creeps over the whole side of the face, as though it were mesmerized; in the evening, [1] . ► Cheeks. ► Wrinkled, flabby cheeks, [51] . ► Swelling of the left cheek for three days (after fourteen days), [1] . ► Such an uncomfortable sense of distension and stiffness about the cheeks and submaxillary spaces that it had to be discontinued, [36] . ► Fine, but painful sticking and like a jerking in the left cheek, lasting a long time; afterwards the spot remained sensitive to touch for a long time, [1] . ► Tearing and sticking in the left zygoma, in the morning in bed, when lying upon it (after four days), [1] . ► Lips. ► The lips are full of glutinous mucus in the morning after waking (sixteenth day), [1] . ► The upper lip and nostrils are very sensitive, even when not touched (fourth day), [1] . ► The lips are dry and cracked (after fifteen days), [1] . ► Painful drawing in the right side of the upper lip and in the gum (second day), [1] . ► Chin. [220.] ► Some uneasiness and stiffness in the jaws (second day); difficulty increased (second day); jaws immovable (third day), [18] . ► Sticking in the left lower jaw, in the tibia, in the left thigh and left forearm, in the bones, in the forenoon (after twelve days), [1] . ► Tearing in the left lower jaw and corresponding teeth (twelfth day), [1] . ► Violent tearing in both sides of the lower jaw, as if it would be torn out (after fifteen days), [1] . ► Gnawing in both sides of the lower jaw, [1] .

FACE. ► Objective. ► Pale sickly expression, [13] . ► Face pinched and very anxious (after four hours), [45] . ► Paleness of the face as after long illness (after thirty days), [13] . ► Face, which was formerly red, became pale, and collapsed as in cholera, [39] . [230.] ► Face sunken; pale, cold nose, [35] . ► Muscles of face convulsed (after a quarter of an hour), [42] . ► A visible jerking motion of the muscles of the face, especially by the eye and on the right side of the neck, during a light nap in the morning, about 8 o'clock; the first attack was in the region of the right articulation of the jaw; I was perfectly conscious, but afterwards on thinking about it I became fearful that it would develop into an epileptic spasm; and I fell to dreaming during the night that the eyes were tightly closed, and I ineffectually endeavored to open them during the attack and was obliged to open them by force with the fingers, [26d] . ► Subjective. ► Feeling of heat in the face, without rapid pulse (after a few hours), [30] . ► Acute tearing in the bones of the left side of the face, [13] . ► Cheeks. ► Tensive pain in the cheeks, with redness of them and increased throbbing in the head, as if in the middle of the brain, [13] . ► Stitches as with needles in the left cheek, followed by burning (thirty-eighth day), [14] . ► Tearing in the zygomata, [15] . ► Gnawing pain in the left upper jaw, close to the wing of the nose (fifth day), [13] . ► Jerking pain in the right zygoma, as night, [15] . [240.] ► Jerking pain in the upper jaw and zygoma, [15] . ► Intermitting jerking pain in the zygoma, extending towards the vertex the whole day, at times also in the wrist, [15] . ► Lips. ► Twitching of the muscles, whereby the mouth was distorted, [33] . ► Chin. ► Drawing in the right side of the lower jaw (thirteenth day), [28] . ► Pressure and dull sticking pain in the right articulation of the jaw on moving it and on swallowing (fifth day), [15] . ► Tearing, first in the right side of the chin, then beneath the right external malleolus, while sitting, [13] . ► Tearing in a narrow streak in the middle of the base of the right lower jaw (ninth day), [29a] . ► Tearing in the left lower jaw extending into the head, with toothache in the same row, relieved by pressure and lying upon it, in the evening in bed, [13] . ► Drawing tearing in the left side of the lower jaw, and in a hollow tooth of the same side (sixth day), [29a] . ► Sticking tearing between the mastoid process and the angle of the lower jaw of the right side (ninth day), [29a] .

abdomen.text: ABDOMEN. ► Hypochondria. ► Stitches in the left side of the abdomen, beneath the ribs, [2] . ► Sharp stitches and sticking-tearing in the left side of the abdomen, beneath the short ribs (eighth, ninth, seventeenth, and twenty-fourth days), [2] . ► A simple pain in the hypochondria, with gurgling, [1] . ► Stitches in the hypochondria and pit of the stomach, which impede the breathing, [1] . ► Cutting pain in the right hypochondriac region, with pressure in the pit of the stomach, [5] . ► Sticking-tearing in the right hypochondriac region, [2] . ► *Feeling of heat in the hepatic region , [1] . [650.] ► Burning pain in the hepatic region (first day), [1] . ► *Sticking in the hepatic region, which seems like pleurodynia, [2] . ► *Pinching-sticking in the hepatic region , [2] . ► Dull stitches in the hepatic and right inguinal regions, [2] . ► Frequent dull stitches in a small spot in the hepatic region, with sore pain when touched (eighteenth day), [2] . ► Sharp stitches in the hepatic region, [2] . ► Pain in the liver , while walking, several days in succession, [1] . ► Drawing pain in the liver, [1] . ► Pressure in the liver changes to heaviness, [1] . ► Pressure extending towards the liver , as if starting from the right breast, with throbbing in the epigastric region, which is painful to touch, [1] . [660.] ► Pain in the liver like a soreness after pressure, [1] . ► Umbilical and Sides. ► Painful retraction of the umbilical region, while sitting, disappearing on moving about, [5] . ► Burning about the umbilicus, with griping in the abdomen, during dinner, [5] . ► Griping below the umbilicus, during dinner and after rising from a seat; burning in the right inguinal region, with great internal and external sensitiveness, and a feeling on stooping as if something would fall out, gradually disappearing during rest, [5] . ► Pressure and digging in the abdomen below the umbilicus, as from incarcerated flatulence, therewith he is obliged to sit bent over; worse on walking in the open air (nineteenth day), [1] . ► *Slight cutting about the umbilicus, frequently , [5] . ► Stitches at times above the umbilicus, as from flatulence, [1] . ► Severe pressure in the left side of the abdomen from stooping (ninth day), [1] . ► Pinching pressure in the left side of the upper abdomen, as from incarcerated flatus (eleventh day), [2] . ►► *Cutting pain in the left side of the upper abdomen , extending from the lower portion of the left chest, where there is a sticking at the same time , [2] . [670.] ► Dull sticking in the right side of the upper abdomen, after dinner, [2] . ► Stitches in the right side of the abdomen, while laughing, [1] . ► Stitches in the right side of the abdomen, as after retaining urine during sleep, relieved by emission of flatulence, [1] . ► Dull stitches in the right side near the umbilicus (nineteenth day), [3] . ► Stitches like fine jerkings in the right side of the abdomen, [1] . ► Tearing, at times jerking in the right side of the abdomen or flank, in the evening (sixteenth and seventeenth days), [2] . ► General Abdomen. ► Distension of the abdomen, with pressive pain, feeling of fulness, weakness, and disinclination for every motion or mental effort, [2] . ► *Hard distension of the abdomen, with painfulness of the umbilical region, to touch , [1] . ►► *Abdomen distended , [2] . ►► *Distended abdomen, after eating , [1] . [680.] ► Abdomen very much distended, [1] . ► During the menses, much flatulence, bad taste in the mouth, and frequent eructations of bile, [1] . ► Incarcerated flatulence , also after twenty days, [1] . ► Incarcerated flatulence, with colic, [1] . ► Incarceration of flatulence followed by emission of an unusually large amount of wind, [1] . ► Movings about in the abdomen, followed by cutting in the stomach, with pressure extending up into the throat, during rest and motion, [5] . ► Movings about in the abdomen, with urging to stool, disappearing after emission of flatulence, [5] . ► Rumbling in the upper abdomen (before dinner), as before diarrha, with slight colic (first day), [2] . ► Constant rumbling in the abdomen, with frequent eructations and yawning, [5] . ► Discharge of much flatulence (after fourteen days), [1] . [690.] ► Emission of much flatulence, at night, [1] . ► Emission of flatulence difficult and impeded, with unsatisfactory stool, [1] . ► Emission of offensive flatulence, [3] ; at night, [5] . ► Flatulence passes upward and downward, with relief, [5] . ► Many disturbances caused by flatulence (first, second, and third day), [1] . ► Urging to pass wind, he could scarcely restrain it, [1] . ► During the menses, pain in the abdomen, bad taste in the mouth, rumbling in the bowels, great weakness and sleepiness, [4] . ► Violent pain in the abdomen, which sometimes extends towards the hips, lasting till late into the night (first day), [4] . ► Tormented by flatulence, for three nights in succession, [1] . ► Burning and drawing in the abdomen, [1] . [700.] ► Chilliness and swashing in the abdomen, as if it were full of water, though almost entirely upon the right side, in the evening, [5] . ► *Feeling of coldness in the abdomen, as if a cold fluid passed through the intestines (during menstruation) , [5] . ►► *Fulness, heat, and great distension in the abdomen, immediately after eating a little , [2] . ► Abdomen tense, very much distended (after the disappearance of the cough caused by Kali), [1] . ► Distension, dragging asunder, and griping in the abdomen, followed by soft stool, [5] . ► Spasmodic constriction of the abdomen, causing coldness, [1] . ► Constrictive colic, [1] . ► Pinching colic in the upper abdomen, in the morning (eleventh day), [2] . ► Cramplike pain in the abdomen (twenty-fifth day), [4] . ► Griping in the abdomen, in the morning in bed, preceded by chilliness, with urging to a soft stool, [1] . [710.] ► Griping in the upper abdomen, towards noon (twenty-fifth day), [2] . ► Griping and uneasiness, in the abdomen, after taking soup at noon and in the evening, and also after eating warm cakes in the morning, [2] . ► At night, griping in the abdomen, at intervals, with nausea and constant eructations, [1] . ► Griping in the abdomen and distension of it, [1] . ► Griping in the bowels, with the usual stool, followed by constant urging, lasting till afternoon, when a liquid stool followed (fourth day), [5] . ► Violent drawing in the abdomen, arms, and legs, with bruised pain in the upper arm, worse during rest (first day), [1] . ► Pressure in the abdomen, [1] . ► Pressive pain in the upper abdomen, as far as below the pit of the stomach, in the evening (thirty-fifth day), [2] . ► Pressive flatulent colic, after breakfast, only transiently relieved by emission of flatus (fourteenth day), [2] . ► At night, colic, from the slightest movement in bed, not during rest; dull sticking and pressure, as from an induration, [1] . [720.] ► Pressure in the bowels after a difficult scanty stool, [2] . ►► *During the menses, cutting in the abdomen , [5] . ► Cutting in the left side of the upper abdomen, [2] . ► Cutting and drawing in the abdomen, like false labor-pains (twelfth day), [1] . ► *Cutting in the abdomen, as if everything would be torn to pieces , at first deep in the lower abdomen, then higher up (first day), [1] . ►► *Cutting in the intestines; violent pain ; in order to relieve it he is obliged to sit bent over, pressing with both hands, or to lean far back; he cannot sit upright , [1] . ► Cutting in the upper abdomen, as from flatulence moving about, with emission of flatus, while walking, [2] . ► *Frequent cutting in the abdomen, as before diarrha , [1] . ► Cutting colic, for two hours at night, without subsequent stool, then in the morning pain in the small of the back and chest, and in the afternoon all the limbs feel bruised, [1] . ► Dull stitches and pressure pain the left side of the upper abdomen (tenth and twentieth days), [2] . [730.] ► Colic and diarrha, at night, [1] . ► Colic, with many eructations, [1] . ► Colic, with many eructations and spitting of saliva, [1] . ► Colic from flatulence, [1] . ► Flatulent colic, relieved by eructations and passage of wind, [1] . ► Sore pain in the abdomen, with pressure towards the genitals, as during menstruation, with pain in the small of the back, [1] . ► *The abdominal muscles are painful to touch , [1] . ► Throbbing in the abdomen , [1] . ► Jerkings in the abdomen, [1] . ► During the cough, pain in the abdomen like a shock, [1] . ► Hypogastrium and Iliac Regions. [740.] ► Tickness [Bigness (?). -T. F. A.] of the lower abdomen, [1] . ► Gurgling in the left side of the lower abdomen on pressing upon it, [1] . ► Feeling of distension in the lower abdomen below the umbilicus, disappearing on moving about, [5] . ► *Feeling of tension of the lower abdomen, and a sensation of heaviness in it, while sitting and walking , [1] . ► Pinching colic in the lower abdomen (thirtieth day), [1] . ► Pressing outward in the lower abdomen, several times (after ten days), [1] . ► Pressure in the lower abdomen (twenty-sixth day), [3] . ► Pressive pain in the lower abdomen above the pubis in frequent paroxysms, disappearing on passing wind (first day), [1] . ► Pressive pain in a small spot in the left lower abdomen, in the evening (thirty-ninth day), [2] . ► Feeling of a heavy weight in the lower abdomen, more a pressive than pinching pain, most intolerable while walking (after three hours), [1] . [760.] ► Dragging in the groin with sensitiveness to touch (relieved after the emission of flatulence), [5] . ► During an ordinary stool, painful dragging towards the groins, [5] . ► Pressure in the groin as from a hernia, [1] . ► Sudden sticking pain in the left inguinal region, during stool, with swelling of the glands, [1] . ► Drawing-sticking and dragging outward in the inguinal region, as if the old scar of an operation for hernia would open, [5] . ► Stitches in the groins and flanks, on moving or stretching out, [5] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-c. ABDOMEN. ► Abdomen very sensitive to touch, [13] .

ABDOMEN. ► Hypochondrium. ► Stitches beneath the short ribs and accumulation of flatulence; the pains cease on the emission of flatulence (sixth day), [29a] . ► Stitches beneath the right short ribs, in the side extending to the back, as if behind the liver, [15] . ► Some stitches in the left side beneath the ribs, from afternoon till evening (first day), [15] . ► Colic , griping beneath the left short ribs (descending colon), extending into the epigastric region (transverse colon), worse when standing and walking, relieved or removed by crouching together; pressure upon the descending colon increased the pains, and after the crouching they were also again felt (seventh day), [29a] . ► Pain in the left hypochondrium as after a violent blow; with pains in the small of the back, which were frequently so violent that she could not lie, followed by leucorrha for eight days; which together with the pains in the back ceased soon after the menses, [14] . ► Umbilical and Sides. ► Griping in the umbilical region after soup (sixth day), [29a] . ► Griping in the umbilical region from accumulation of flatulence, disappearing after the emission of flatulence, in the evening (fifth day), [29a] . [450.] ► Griping in the umbilical region followed by some flatulence and the evacuation of a thin clear stool, after eating (sixth day), [29a] . ► Griping about the umbilicus with emission of flatulence, followed by relief in the head (eighth day), [29a] . ► Griping about the umbilicus and beneath the short ribs of the left side, followed by frequent emission of flatulence, without entire relief from the pain, in the morning in bed (seventh day), [29a] . ► Griping and cutting in the abdomen before a normal stool, [13] . ► Transient cutting in the umbilical region, with a feeling as though he was frequently obliged to go to stool, remaining unaffected by the usual stool, but with frequent and profuse emission of urine (after 14 grains), [8] . ► Distension and sticking in the left side of the abdomen, relieved by bending together, [13] . ► Sudden shocks in the left side of the abdomen as from something alive, [13] . ► Abdomen. ► Inflammation of the intestinal canal ran a violent course for eighteen days, causing death, [38] . ► Abdomen swollen, but soft all over, and very tender to the touch (second day), [48] . ► Distension of the abdomen and emission of flatus (with desire for stool), soon after a new dose, [13] . [460.] ► Distension of the abdomen, even almost to bursting, in the evening, [13] . ► Great distension of the abdomen and emission of much offensive flatus with the ordinary stool (twentieth and twenty-first days), [13] . ► Abdomen distended (after 7 grains), [6] . ► Abdomen distended and much rumbling and emission of flatus (fifth day), [24] . ► Abdomen somewhat distended, in the afternoon, much emission of flatus about 4 o'clock, which was frequently repeated till late in the evening (first day), [24] . ► Abdomen distended, tense (fifth day), [15] . ► Rumbling in the abdomen without stool, from morning till evening (twenty-ninth day), [13] . ► Rumbling in the abdomen, followed by desire for stool without result; frequent emission of flatus (third day), [24] . ► Rumbling in the abdomen, with griping extending up into the stomach, which was sensitive externally, and as far down as the left side of the abdomen, where it was a sticking, with distension, frequent emission of flatus and a feeling as though diarrha would occur, for two hours (after thirty-eight days), [13] . ► Very loud rumbling in the whole intestinal canal without pain, towards noon (first day), [34] . [470.] ► Violent rumbling in the abdomen without colic or stool (after 13 grains), [7] . ► There began to be movings about in the abdomen (after twenty-five minutes), [9] . ► Urging of flatulence and a feeling as though diarrha must ensue; with the flatulence there is an evacuation, but only of a few drops of a very thin fluid (second day), [23] . ► Emission of flatus and rumbling in the abdomen (first day), [23] . ► Emission of much flatus in the evening, with scraping in the rectum, [15] . ► More profuse and more offensive flatus than usual, [2] . ► Much offensive flatulence (fourth day), [22] . ► Feeling of emptiness in the region of the transverse colon, [15] . ► Pain in the abdomen, [18] , [34] . [See note to S. 401. -Hughes.] ► Pain in the abdomen and small of the back, during menstruation, [13] . [480.] ► Severe pain in abdomen, [43] . ► Violent pain in the abdomen, followed by emission of flatus, [15] . ► Violent pain in the abdomen, especially in the right side, after eating veal; ending after two hours with pressive pain in the stomach with a feeling of emptiness in it; after some hours again cutting pain in the abdomen, diminishing but continuing all night, [15] . ► Frightful pains in the abdomen that cannot be relieved, [41] . ► Excruciating pains in the abdomen, [33] . ► Burning pain in the abdomen while sitting bent over, extending to the small of the back, disappearing on rising up (twenty-first day), [13] . ► Feeling of fulness in the abdomen (after 8 grains), [5] . ► Fulness in the abdomen, no desire for food, though it was eaten with relish (first day), [29] . ► Griping in the region of the transverse colon (first day), [23] . ► Griping afterwards sticking pains in the abdomen and small of the back, especially in the morning and evening (eighth day), [13] . [490.] ► Griping pain in the whole of the abdomen in the evening, with rumbling; it extends up to beneath the left breast, where it is a sticking, [13] . ► During menstruation (which was increased) griping in the abdomen, [13] . ► The usual stool preceded by griping and pains in the abdomen and small of the back, [13] . ► Griping in the abdomen with accumulation of flatulence, noticed during sleep (sixth day), [29a] . ► Griping movements in the abdomen without desire for stool, frequently intermitting (fourth day), [13] . ► Frequent griping here and there in the abdomen (fifth day), [13] . ► Griping colic with soft stool (twelfth day), [20] . ► Slight drawing in the abdomen, after supper (seventh day), [28] . ► Disagreeable drawing sensation in the small intestines (after 9 grains), [33] . ► Dull burning pressure here an there in several parts of the abdomen above the umbilicus, [13] . [500.] ► Cutting in the abdomen in the morning and evening, for several days, [13] . ► Slight cutting in the small intestines (one hour after 7 grains), [2] . ► Cutting colic in the small intestines, like that frequently felt when the intestines are too full of air (after 5 grains), [8] . ► Violent cutting colic (after 13 grains), [7] . ► Sudden violent painful stitches in various parts of the abdomen, in the evening (tenth day), [13] . ► Constant tearing pains in the intestines (second day), [36] . ► Most violent tearing pains in the colon, soon extending to the whole intestinal canal and causing cramp in the stomach, immediately, [38] . ► Colic without evacuations, [9] . ► Transient colic in the forenoon and afternoon (after 7 grains), [8] . ► Hypogastrium and Iliac Regions. ► Violent tearing-burning, as if deep in the pelvis, in the evening, worse during rest than motion; it also seems to be in the hip-joint, or hip-bone, [15] . [510.] ► Sticking and burning in lower abdomen, and also in the rectum, after dinner, aggravated by motion (tenth day), [13] . ► The pubic region is painful to touch (third day), [23] . ► During menstruation, burning in right groin, while sitting bent over, [13] . ► Violent contractive pain in left groin, when walking; she was frequently obliged to hold it drawn inwards; it almost took away her breath; followed by a semiliquid stool, with mucus, and cessation of the pain; the pain was frequently a sticking in the evening (eleventh day), [13] . ► Dragging and pressure towards the abdominal rings (fifth day), [15] . ► Feeling of compression or pressure above the left ilium, while walking (sixth day), [13] . ► Sticking in middle of both ilia, while sitting, [13] . ► Painful sticking in left inguinal region, extending outwards through the ilium, while walking, [13] . ► Violent stitches in right groin, and at the same time, in the ilium (eighth day), [13] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-n.

respiratory.text: RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Larynx and Trachea. ► Rattling in the chest, at night, when lying upon the back, [1] . ► *Easy choking when eating , [1] . ► Chokes easily while eating, because some of the food gets into the larynx, [1] . ► Constriction of the larynx, in the evening on falling asleep, so that he woke in fright; followed by stitching dryness in the throat (twelfth day), [1] . ► Sensation as if the larynx were constricted, in the open air, [1] . [950.] ► Frequent drawing pain in the larynx, with raw sensation, [1] . ► Raw pain in the larynx, on coughing, [1] . ► Tickling, provoking a cough, after eating (after six days), [1] . ► Tickling in the larynx, provoking cough, with great hoarseness, [6] . ► Rattling and gurgling in the trachea, on breathing, preceding cough, [1] . ► Voice. ► Voice rough, [1] . ► Hoarseness, as if something were sticking in the throat, provoking a desire to hawk, [1] . ► At first hoarseness, afternoon excessive fluent coryza, [1] . ► Complete hoarseness , and loss of voice (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► Cough and Expectoration. ► Cough from tickling in the throat (twentieth day), [3] . [960.] ►► *She begins to cough as early as 3 A.M .; repeated every half hour , [1] . ► Cough in the evening in bed, [1] . ► Night cough, [1] . ► *He is awakened at night by cough , [1] . ► She is obliged to cough every five minutes, from 9 P.M. till morning, [1] . ► *Cough that affects the chest, caused by tickling in the throat , [1] . ► Cough, on playing the violin, [1] . ► Cough, causing a sticking in the larynx, with fluent coryza, [1] . ► Cough, which easily makes her vomit, [1] . ► Frequent cough before midnight, but not during the day, [1] . [970.] ► Violent cough, in the morning fasting, disappearing after breakfast, [1] . ► *Violent cough every evening, after lying some time in bed, for several weeks , [1] . ► Cough so violent as to cause vomiting , in the morning, [1] . ► *Fatiguing cough, in the evening , [1] . ► Racking cough, so severe that she loses her senses, [1] . ► *Suffocative and choking cought, at 5 A.M., as from dryness in the larynx; she is unable to speak on account of cramp in the chest, with redness in the face, and perspiration over the whole body , [1] . ► Spasmodic and irritable cough in different violent paroxysms, even amounting to retching, causing sore pain in the upper part of the head, and followed by great exhaustion, [1] . ► Scraping, scratching cough, [1] . ► *Tickling cough , [1] . ► Frequent hacking in the afternoon and following forenoon (after six days), [5] . [980.] ► Dry cough, suddenly coming and going, [1] . ► Dry cough, almost only at night, with sticking in the larynx, [1] . ► *Dry cough at night, waking from sleep, with acute pain in the chest on coughing, with little cough during the day (first day), [5] . ► *Cough from tickling in the throat, without expectoration , [3] . ► The cough loosens mucus, which, however, does not come into the mouth, and hence cannot be expectorated, [1] . ► Much cough in the morning, with expectoration, though most in the evening, [1] . ► Hacking cough, with some expectoration, mostly only at night and in the morning, together with coryza, [1] . ► Cough, with much expectoration, [1] . ► Cough, with expectoration of blood in the mucus, three times (seventeenth day), [1] . ► At night she was obliged to expectorate much mucus, frequently for half an hour, [1] . [990.] ► *Expectoration of small round lumps from the throat , [3] . ► Expectoration of a sourish taste, [1] . ► Respiration. ► Inclination to take a deep breath, [1] . ► Tightness of the breath, [1] . ► Shortness of the breath in the morning , [1] . ► Breath very short, in the morning, [1] . ► Arrest of breath wakes him at night, [1] . ► Arrest of breath, waking him from sleep at night, [1] . ► Dyspna, with shortness of the breath, while writing (third day), [5] . ► Dyspna, as from an affected chest, [1] . [1000.] ► He felt as if there was no air in his chest , and he could not breathe (after five or six days), [7] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-c.

RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Larynx, Trachea, and Bronchi. ► Accumulation of mucus in the larynx and bronchi, [2] . ► Considerable accumulation of mucus, and of what seems like false membranes, in the throat and larynx, with difficult respiration and rattling, [2] . ► Affection of the mucous membrane of the air-passages, [12] . ► All the symptoms of severe spasmodic croup (fourth morning), [7] . ► Sticking in the air-passages and a feeling of rawness in them, which obliges hawking, whereby she expectorates mucus, [1] . ►► *Raw pain in the larynx, as if from granulations , [3] . ► Voice. [510.] ► Occasional and trifling alteration in the sound of the voice, [2] . ► Voice as in catarrh, [1] . ► Hoarseness and frequent aphonia, with much obstruction in the throat and larynx, and weakness of the chest, [7] . ► Her voice is short, like her answers, [54] . ► Voice feeble, at times rather tremulous, [51] . ► Loss of voice (third day), [7] ; for a long time, [41] . ► Cough and Expectoration. ► Inclination to cough, [6] . ► Constant provocation in the larynx to a dry cough (after six days), [1] . ► Cough worse in the evening or at night and preventing sleep, [2] . ► Severe cough, especially towards evening, [2] . [520.] ► Short hacking cough caused by rawness in the throat (soon), [1] . ► Whistling cough, as in croup, or spasmodic, as in hooping-cough, [2] . ► Dry cough, several mornings in succession (after six days), [1] . ► Dry cough, with a feeling of soreness in the larynx, in the evening (after fourteen days), [1] . ► Dry cough, morning and evening (after sixteen days), [1] . ► *Deep, hollow cough, with whitish and greenish expectoration , and tearing-out pains starting from the ensiform cartilage , [2] . ► Hoarse cough, with great obstruction of the larynx, sensation of tearing in the chest, and dark-red expectoration, [2] . ► Spitting of blood, [2] . ► Respiration. ► Shortness of breath, [29] . ► Patients generally experience well-marked difficulty of breathing, and bring up a large quantity of expectoration similar to that observed in the first period of simple bronchitis; the expectoration ceases as it began, that is to say, without passing to the purulent state, [10] . [530.] ► He awoke during the night with great difficulty of breathing and loss of voice (third night), [7] .

RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Larynx. ► Tensive pain in the larynx while breathing (after thirty-five days), [14] . ► Irritation to cough, caused by tickling in the larynx (fourth day), [13] . ► Sudden violent irritation to cough in the right side, near the pit of the throat, as if in the right bronchus, neither painful nor itching; it could be suppressed by a slow, deep breath, and by an effort of the will; this provocation to cough lasted about an hour (at that time I was treating two patients who had a similar irritation to cough), [26b] . ► Voice. ► Voice as in catarrh (after fifty days), [13] . ► Hoarseness , [28] . ► Hoarseness and rawness of the throat (eighth day), [28] . [660.] ► Hoarseness and cough; she raised pieces of mucus, with stopped catarrh (during menstruation), [13] . ► Suppressed hoarse voice, with some tickling provoking cough, [29b] . ► Loss of voice, [33] , [41] . ► Cough and Expectoration. ► Cough day and night, with sore pain in the chest, followed by catarrh, with stoppage and itching of the nose (thirteenth day), [13] . ► Cough, with stupefying headache, wakes her at night, about 3 o'clock; if she raises herself or moves, the cough becomes worse (twenty-second day), [14] . ► Cough caused by tickling in the middle of the chest, after coming into the house, persistent, [13] . ► Cough, with soreness in the chest, pain in the head and throat (seventeenth day), [13] . ► Cough, which was persistent and annoying, called for three doses of Ipecac 3d, after which it entirely disappeared (third day), [25] . ► Cough almost takes away her breath, [14] . ► Cough paroxysmal, especially caused by eating bread or cakes, [26b] . [670.] ► Dry cough (fourth and fifth days), [13] . ► Dry cough with rawness in the throat and heaviness on the chest (sixth day), [14] . ► Dry cough for fourteen days, with dull tension, contraction, and pressure in the chest; a rawness beneath the sternum, which provokes cough, but which afterwards disappears for a few minutes, [14] . ► Dry, hacking cough the whole day, with almost audible beating of the heart (twentieth day), [14] . ► Short, dry, hacking cough (thirteenth day), [28] . ► Cough, with expectoration, in the morning (fourth day), [25] . ► Cough, with expectoration and pressive pain in the sternum, in the morning (sixth day), [25] . ► Cough and expectoration, mostly in the evening, after lying down, [12] . ► Sleep disturbed at night by cough, with expectoration; towards morning moderate perspiration (second night), [25] . ► Cough (after one hour), with which the face became red, and by which there was at last a little mucous expectoration; lasting nearly a quarter of an hour, frequently returning during the day (seventh day), [25] . [680.] ► Cough frequently recurring, mostly followed by expectoration of hard masses of bronchial mucus, that sank in water, and was not dissolved by shaking; during the cough there was a pressive pain beneath the sternum, and afterwards a feeling of soreness in the same place (second day), [25] . ► Bloody cough, at the full noon, [12] . ► More cough in the morning than during the day, [14] . ► When coughing, expectoration affords relief (twenty-third day), [14] . ► Mucous expectoration, with blood, while coughing, [12] . ► Bloody expectoration, with slight cough, [12] . ► Bloody expectoration, twice, in the afternoon, with dry cough (fourteenth day), [13] . ► Expectoration of clotted blood after hawking mucus (during menstruation), (twenty-fifth day), [13] . ► Sour-smelling expectoration from the chest, [12] . ► Respiration. ► Respiration accelerated, with a sensation of feverish weakness over the whole body (third day), [23] . [690.] ► Constantly, a sensation in epigastric region and oppression of the chest, oblige frequent inspiration, especially in morning and towards evening, with confusion and drawing in the head (fifth day), [22] . ► Oppression of breathing while ascending; sticking in chest and cough, with expectoration of clear blood (twenty-fourth day), [14] . ► Difficult respiration, [33] , [41] ; (after a quarter of an hour), [42] . ► Dyspna, in the region of the pit of the throat, [12] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-n.

back.text: NECK AND BACK. ► Neck. ► Stiff neck, [8] . ► Stiffness in the nape of the neck, in the morning in bed (also after three days), [1] . ► Stiffness in the nape of the neck, in the morning, disappearing during the day; lasting several weeks, [1] . ► Stiffness in the nape of the neck, at night, [1] . ► Stiffness in the nape of the neck , with elongation of the uvula, [3] . ► Increased stiffness of neck, with pain in sides of neck and back of neck, compelling her to move it, though movement increased the pain, [8] . ► On waking in night or morning, feels the neck stiff, which goes off after moving about, [8] . ► If she wakes at night the neck, arms, and shoulders feel more stiff than at any other time, [8] . [1090.] ► Neck quite stiff, unable to move it any way or to lie down from it; stiffness extends down back; shoulders feel heavy; at the same time tonsils feels swollen as if touching, causing feeling of suffocation; worse on lying down; the stiffness and swollen feeling of tonsils always come on together, [8] . ► Pain in the nape of the neck, on bending the head backward, [1] . ► Cervical muscles painful on motion, [1] . ► Violent tension in the nape of the neck, which is still more painful on moving the head, [5] . ► Drawing pain in the nape of the neck (after two hours), [5] . ► Pressive drawing in the right side of the neck, [1] . ► Tearing in the nape of the neck, at times, only transient, [5] . ► Tearing in the right side of the nape of the neck, in the morning, [1] . ► Tearing in the lower portion of the right side of the neck (after twenty-four days), [2] . ► Jerking pain in the left side of the neck (after two days), [6] . ► Back. [1100.] ► Stiffness in the back, she is unable to stoop, [1] . ► Stiffness and lameness in the back and small of the back, [1] . ► Rheumatic pains in back, chest, shoulders, and arms, worse on moving them, [8] . ► Attack of constrictive pain in the back, during rest, after physical effort; he was obliged to lie down, followed by profuse perspiration, lasting through the night, and in the morning stool consisting of blood, and mucus, though without pain, [1] . ► Contractive pain in the back, during rest, after physical exertion, [1] . ► Some sharp biting, pinchings on the posterior parts of the ribs on both sides of the back, [1] . ► Violent backache, [1] . ► Pressure in the spine when swallowing, [1] . ► Burning pressure in the back, worse when walking in the open air (after nineteen days), [1] . ► Tensive pressure like excessive fatigue extending from the right scapula along the side of the back into the small of the back, recurring without cause, and also in the morning in bed, but especially when riding in a carriage, [2] . [1110.] ► Drawing pressure in the back, [1] . ► Pain in the back as from a sprain, [1] . ► Stitches in the right side of the back, extending through the chest (twenty-fifth day), [2] . ► *Burning tearing near the right side of the spine, above the small of the back (eighteenth day), [2] . ► Bruised pain in the back, during rest , not during motion, [1] . ► Dorsal. ► Tensive pain behind the left scapula, on breathing, [1] . ► Cramplike attack, like a tearing, between the shoulders, followed by stiffness in the nape of the neck, and on attempting to move the head it several times jerks backwards, [1] . ► Pressure in the left scapula, [1] . ► A pressure at first between the scapulæ, afterwards a burning extending thence to the crest of the pelvis, alike during rest and motion; the burning is perceptible when touched by the hand, [1] . ► A sharp pressure on the upper part of the back (thirty-fourth day), [2] . [1120.] ► Drawing pressure in the scapulæ, [1] . ► Pain as from a sprain in the left scapula, [1] . ► Sticking and pressive tearing in the back near the right scapula (tenth and thirty-eighth days), [2] . ► Sticking pain between the scapulæ, with oppression and anxiety in the chest, almost only when sitting, so that she is obliged to rise and walk about, [1] . ► Violent sticking pain as from a sprain in the left scapula, extending into the chest, [1] . ► Dull sticking in the left scapula, [2] . ► Pinching sticking in both scapulæ, [2] . ► A stitch extending from the tip of the left scapula to the pit of the stomach, during hard work (after seven days), [2] . ► *Stitches in the right scapula, on breathing , [1] . ► Sharp tearing stitch under the right scapula, [2] . [1130.] ► *Tearing in the right scapula, in the morning (fourth day), [2] . ► Bruised pain between the shoulders and on the left shoulder, disappearing on motion, [5] . ► Sticking bruised pain in the right scapula, on motion, perceptible as far as into the chest, [1] . ► Pulsating throbbing on the upper margin of the left scapula, [5] . ► Lumbar. ► Stiffness in the small of the back, [1] . ► Pain in the small of the back, only on bending backward, not during rest, [1] . ► Pain in the small of the back, after standing or walking awhile, [1] . ► Frequent pain just above the small of the back, while sitting, [2] . ► Violent pain in the small of the back, with pains in the abdomen like labor pains and discharge from the vagina, [1] . ► Pain like a heaviness in the small of the back, [5] . [1140.] ► During the menses, pain in the small of the back, like a heaviness, [5] . ► Pain in the small of the back as from flatulent distension, in the morning in bed, with a feeling as if bubbles accumulated at the small of the back, associated with urgent desire for stool, all of which disappeared after passing wind, [5] . ► Violent pain in the small of the back, as if broken, on moving about, [5] . ► *Drawing pain in the small of the back , [1] . ► Violent, constant drawing in the small of the back, alternating with pulsation in it, only relieved when lying, [1] . ► Pressure in the region of both kidneys (seventh, eighth, fifteenth, and nineteenth days), [2] . ► Pressure in the back above the region of the right kidney, in the morning (twentieth day), [2] . ► *During the menses, severe pressure in the small of the back and forepart of the lower abdomen, as if everything would push out at the genitals , [1] . ► Sore pressure in the region of the right kidney (sixth day), [2] . ► *Feeling in the morning as if the small of the back were pressed inward from both sides , [5] . [1150.] ► Stitching ascending at times from the small of the back through the left side of the abdomen to the chest, [1] . ► Stitches in the region of both kidneys (eleventh and twenty-ninth days), [2] . ► Dull stitches in the region of the left kidney, at first on expiration, afterwards several in succession, disappearing on rubbing, [5] . ► Tearing in the region of the right kidney (thirteenth day), [2] . ► *Tearing in the lumbar muscles, impeding respiration , [1] . ► Tearing back and forth in the left lumbar region, while sitting, disappearing on motion, [5] . ► Pain as if the flesh were torn from the loins, when walking, but especially when touched, [1] . ► Pain as if bruised in the regions of both kidneys, continuing a long time in the afternoon, while sitting (first day), [5] . ► Severe bruised feeling in the small of the back, especially in the morning on rising, [1] . ► Throbbing in the small of the back, [1] . [1160.] ► Jerking pain in the small of the back on stooping, so that for a long time he is unable to stand erect, [1] . ► Sacral. ► Tickling weary pain above the sacrum, [1] . ► Severe gnawing in the coccyx, during rest and motion, [5] .

NECK AND BACK. ► Neck. ► Hard, painless tumor, like a wen, on the nape of the neck, [2] . ► Stiffness and swelling of the neck, with cramplike pains and great difficulty in moving the head, [2] . ► Sticking in the right side of the nape of the neck, while lying down, [1] . ► Back. ► Curvature of the back, with weakness of the chest, [2] . ► Lancinating and burning pains in the back, with inability to remain lying, [2] . ► Dorsal. ► Throbbing several times between the shoulders (after seventeen days), [1] . ► Lumbar. ► Pain in the small of the back like that before menstruation, with two diarrha-like stools (after fourteen days), [1] . ► Violent pain in the small of the back, so that she could not lie quietly anywhere (after sixteen days), [1] . ► *Feeling as if screwed in in the small of the back, very painful (after three days), [1] . [580.] ► Frequent sharp stitches in the small of the back, while sitting (third day), [1] . ► Constant pain in the small of the back, almost as if beaten, especially when sitting bent, [1] . ► Violent pain in the small of the back the whole night as if beaten, so that she does not know how she shall lie (after five days), [1] . ► Digging in the kidneys and loins as if they were stroked with hot iron rods, [2] . ► Sacral. ► Pain in the coccyx as if she had fallen upon it (after six days), [1] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-i.

NECK AND BACK. ► Neck. ► Stiffness of the nape of the neck, [14] . ► Pain, like a stiffness in the nape of the neck, as if sprained, on nodding or turning the head, lasting three days (after thirty-three days), [11] . ► Tensive pain in the right sterno-cleido-mastoid muscle on turning the head, [26d] . ► Tearing in the cervical muscles of the right side, extending from the shoulder to the head, [15] . ► Painful throbbing in a cervical vertebra, after raising the head from stooping, [13] . ► Back. ► Paralysis of the spine, with tetanus, [16] . ► Pain in the back (after twenty-seven days), [15] . ► Pain in the back when coughing, [12] . ► Pain in the back on stooping, [15] . [780.] ► Constant pain in the back while fasting, [37] . ► Pinching pain in the back, in the evening (after thirty-eight hours), [15] . ► Pressure and burning in the back, relieved by walking, aggravated by sitting and by lying in bed, [15] . ► Bruised pain in the whole of the back, preceded by sticking in the hips (twentieth day), [13] . ► Bruised pain in the back in all positions, in the evening (during menstruation), [13] . ► Dorsal. ► Tensive drawing between the scapulæ, at 6 P.M. (second day), [27] . ► Violent sticking, as with knives, between the shoulders, waking her from sleep and causing shortness of breath, appearing while lying on the back, and relieved by lying on the right side (after twenty-six days), [13] . ► Stitches beneath the right scapula, at night, [12] . ► Transient stitches beneath the left scapula, in the evening (third day), [27] . ► Painful stitches in the region of the lower angle of the left scapula, on deep inspiration, [15] . ► Lumbar. [790.] ► Paralyzed feeling in the small of the back, in the evening (third day), [27] . ► Pain in the small of the back, in the morning, on waking, extending into the left hypochondrium, lasting several hours (twelfth day); she was obliged to stand up (twenty-ninth day), [14] . ► Pain in the small of the back, alternating with griping in the abdomen, in the afternoon, and followed in the evening by a hard stool (ninth day), [13] . ► Violent pain in the small of the back, at night, waking her, and not allowing her to sleep again (after fifty-two days), [13] . ► Violent pain in the small of the back, which did not permit lying on the back, woke her at 2 A.M. (after twenty-seven days), [13] . ► Drawing pains in the region of the kidneys (after 12 grains), [7] . ► Pinching pressure in the small of the back, the whole day, [15] . ► Violent pressive pain in the lumbar region, worse during rest, so that she was obliged to walk about in order to obtain relief; the pain was relieved after gentle rubbing, but was so much aggravated when coughing, that she cried out, [14] . ► Stitches in the left side of the small of the back, while sitting (second day), [23] . ► Stitches in the region of both kidneys, most violent in the right, and very acute when taking a deep breath, in the evening, [15] . [800.] ► Bruised pain in the small of the back, at 3 A.M.; she was unable to turn over on account of it (after twenty-three days), [13] . ► Pain in the small of the back, as if it had been beaten, in the morning, on waking, [14] .

lower_extremities.text: INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Ascending steps is very difficult; walking upon a level is not, [1] . ► The limbs fall asleep while lying , [1] . ► Feeling of numbness, and great inclination of the whole right leg to fall asleep , especially in the lower leg, [2] . ► Numb sensation of the whole right leg, as if it was going to sleep, with great subsequent heaviness in it, in the morning after waking, [5] . ► *The lower extremities frequently fall asleep , [1] . ► While sitting, first one and then the other limb falls asleep, [1] . [1310.] ► Great heaviness suddenly of the left leg, so that he can only move it with great difficulty, as it paralyzed, at night in bed and during the following day while sitting, [5] . ► Burning and pain in both limbs, also even with acute stitches, [1] . ► Hip. ► Weak, weary, and bruised in the hips and limbs, especially in the calves, on walking (thirteenth day), [1] . ► Stitches, fine, but very acute, in the left hip-joint while standing; after sitting down, there is a sticking-tearing down the whole leg, as if in the marrow, which disappears after rising from the seat, [5] . ► Tearing, at times crawling, in the hips or in the parts enveloping them (nineteenth, twenty-first, and thirtieth days), [2] . ► Tearing in the hips and knees even while sitting, [1] . ► Tearing pain in the left hip from time to time, [1] . ► Pinching-tearing in the hip-joint, [2] . ► Pains as from a blow in the upper part of the left hip-bone while walking and on touch, [2] . ► Bruised pain in the hip-joint, with pain on motion and on sneezing, [1] . [1320.] ► Jerking in the left hip-joint on turning the leg, [3] . ► Thigh. ► He is as weary in his thighs as if he had been used up by walking, for many days, mostly in the afternoon, [1] . ► Paralysis of the whole thigh, with a feeling as if it would fall asleep, [2] . ► Feeling of loss of power in both thighs above the knees in the evening, [5] . ► Dull pain in the nates, [2] . ► Cramp in the right thigh and calf woke him twice at night , [1] . ► Drawing pain in the thigh (after eleven days), [6] . ► Drawing pain in the thigh, while ascending, as if it would break in two, [1] . ► Drawing pain in the left thigh, extending to the knee, [1] . ► Paralytic drawing in the whole thigh , frequently increasing to a tearing, worse while standing and in the warmth of the bed, often only in the evening and at night, [2] . [1330.] ► Twitching in the anterior surface of the right thigh, [5] . ► Tearing in the upper and inner portion of the thigh, [2] . ► Tearing in the posterior portion of the thigh, close to the nates, extending towards the genitals, [2] . ► Tearing in the left thigh and in the tibia during menstruation, [5] . ► Tearing in and on the nates not far from the hip-joint, [2] . ► Attacks of pinching-tearing in the nates, [2] . ► Soreness between the legs, [1] . ► Sore pain in one spot in the middle of the thigh when touched, [1] . ► Knee. ► Violent bruised pain a hand's breadth above the right knee, as if the thigh would fall off, while standing, and worse while sitting, afterwards continuing during rest and motion, [5] . ► Pain like a suppuration in the nates and thighs from sitting, [1] . [1340.] ► Jerkings in the muscles of the thighs , [2] . ► Jerkings in the muscles in the nates, [1] . ► Stiffness in the knees (second day), [1] . ► Stiffness, tension, and weakness in the right knee, as if tightly bound up, [1] . ► Painful falling asleep of the knees on walking fast; he cannot bend them well, [1] . ► Knee-joints feel nearly powerless; she does not bend them in walking lest they should give way, hence she walks sideways, [8] . ► Paralytic sensation in the knee while sitting, [3] . ► Paralytic pain in the right knee while walking (sixth day), [2] . ► Tensive pain in the right knee, and afterwards crawling in it, only while walking, and disappearing while sitting, [5] . ► Dull pain on the side of the knee while walking, and especially on stretching out the leg, [2] . [1350.] ► Drawing pain in the knee while walking, extending to the thigh, [1] . ► Stitching in the left knee (second day), [5] . ► Pain as from a sprain in the knee, on rising from sitting, for several minutes, [1] . ► Tearing in both knees (first day), [5] . ► Tearing in the knee and knee-joint, in the evening, with warmth in it, [2] . ► Tearing in the hollow of the knee, [2] . ► Tearing pain in the knee while walking and sitting, [1] . ► Frequent tearing in the knees , [2] . ► Throbbing and beating in the left knee frequently during the day, [3] . ► Leg. ► Falling asleep and crawling in the right leg, [1] . [1360.] ► Heaviness of the legs, [1] . ► Drawing pain in the right leg, extending to the foot, for several days, [1] . ► Drawing and tearing in the bones of the legs , [2] . ► Paralytic drawing in the lower legs, [1] . ► Twitches on the anterior surface of the left lower leg while standing, [5] . ► Tearing and drawing, with a feeling of great weariness, in the lower legs, especially in the ankles, on waking at night, [1] . ► Stitches in the tibiæ, [1] . ► Tearing in both tibiæ, with pain in the periosteum when touched and a feeling of tension when walking , [2] . ► Tearing in the upper part of the tibia beneath the knee, [2] . ► Tearing in the left tibia, [5] . [1370.] ► Tension in the calves, as if too short, on rising from sitting during the day, [1] . ► Tension in the left calf, as if the tendons were too short, while standing, not while sitting, [5] . ► Cramp in the right calf (after twenty hours), [1] . ► Cramp in the calf and sole on drawing up the leg at night in bed, [1] . ► Tearing in the upper part of the calf (twentieth day), [2] . ► Tearing in the right calf, extending deep inward on pressing and rubbing, [5] . ► It caused pain in the upper part of calves, as if bruised, or from too much walking, and on stretching out the legs, stiffness from half way up back of thighs to tendines Achillis, as if the tendons were tightened, [10] . ► Ankle. ► Severe drawing and sticking in the left ankle, when stepping upon it, for several hours in the morning after rising, most painful in the evening, with throbbing in it and sticking in the heel; she is unable to rest upon the foot, and is obliged to keep it constantly suspended; it feels too heavy, swollen at the seat of the pain, and hot to touch, [1] . ► Stitches beneath the malleolus, [1] . ► Violent stitching in the tendons behind the right external malleolus when running, disappearing during rest, [5] . [1380.] ► Feeling as if a stitch were shooting into the malleolus; when walking, a feeling as if the feet would break; she was obliged to remain standing, [1] . ► Tearing just above the malleolus (twentieth day), [2] . ► Tearing in the inner malleolus transversely towards the tendo Achillis, [5] . ► Tearing about the malleoli, with cold feet, which ceases after they get warm, [1] . ► Tearing in the ankles frequently , [2] . ► Spasmodic tearing in the malleolus, with pulsation about it, extending up the tibia as far as the knee, [1] . ► Foot. ► Swelling of the feet, [1] . ► Great swelling of the feet, extending to the malleoli, [1] . ► Falling asleep of the left foot during dinner, [5] . ► The feet fall asleep after dinner , [4] . [1390.] ► Heaviness and stiffness of the feet, [1] . ► Feet and legs feel to her to be too small, [8] . ► Tension of the feet, almost without swelling, [1] . ► Pinching-drawing in the foot, as from great weariness, [2] . ► Sticking in the feet, [4] . ► Stitches and burning in the feet after walking, [4] . ► Stitches in the left foot, extending inward, [1] . ► Tearing on the inside of the foot and on the sole , [2] . ► Drawing-tearing in the foot, extending to the toes, [2] . ► Visible twitching on the back of the left foot in the evening, [5] . [1400.] ► Stitches on the back of the foot, [1] . ► Tearing on the back of the foot extending to the toes, [2] . ► Swelling and redness of the soles of the feet, with burning in them, even while lying down, though still more when stepping, [2] . ► Pressive pain in the sole of the foot while stepping and while walking, [1] . ► Pressive pain in the heel, [1] . ► Stitches as with needles beneath the heel, [1] . ► Crawling in the soles of the feet, extending towards the toes, [1] . ► Crawling pain in the soles of the feet, with painful sensitiveness of them, [1] . ► Toes. ► Chilblain on the ball of the great toe, with sticking-cutting pain; it is red and thick, [1] . ► Inflamed red chilblains on the toes, with pressive pain, [1] . [1410.] ► Bluish-red chilblain on the ball of the great toes, inflamed, and with cutting pain and needle-like stitches in it, especially when in the boots or shoes, [1] . ► Cramp in the left great toe, so that he is unable to stretch it out, in the evening while sitting, [5] . ► Pain as from a sprain in the first joint of the great toe, while walking, most acute on bending it up (eleventh and thirty-third days), [2] . ► Tickling-sticking in the tips of the toes, [2] . ► Stitches as with needles in the balls of the great toes, [2] . ► Stitches in the corns, [4] . ► Fine stitching, with itching, on the tip of the great toe, [1] . ► Tearing in the toes (fourth, seventh, eleventh, and twentieth days), [2] . ► Tearing in the first phalanx of the great toe (eleventh, sixteenth, nineteenth, and thirty-fourth days), [2] . ► Tearing in the tips of the great toes (eleventh, seventeenth, and thirty-sixth days), [2] . [1420.] ► *The tips of the toes are very painful on walking , [1] . ► Gnawing on the outer margin of the right great toe, [5] . ► The nail of the great toe is painful on the side, as if it would grow into the flesh (fourteenth day), [2] . ► The corns are painfully sensitive, [1] . GENERAL SYMPTOMS. ► Objective. ► Perceptible beating of all the arteries, [3] . ► Violent trembling, [1] . ► Sudden trembling, [6] . ► Indolence (second day), [1] . ► Tremulous fatigue while walking, first in the knees, followed by trembling in the abdominal muscles and in the arms, [1] . ► Lassitude, weakness, and nausea, after the afternoon nap, [6] . [1430.] ► After eating, weariness with throbbing in the pit of the stomach, and headache, [1] . ► Great weariness, on waking in the morning, relieved after rising, returning in an increased degree in the afternoon, [4] . ► After eating very weary and sleepy, [4] . ► Great weakness, in the evening, [5] . ► Attack of weakness, on returning from a moderate walk, so violent that she could with difficulty reach the house, therewith she became warm in the stomach, drops of sweat stood upon the forehead (in winter) and the limbs trembled; after a short rest all weakness passed of, [1] . ► Attack of sudden weakness, in the evening on lying down, with an aching sensation, nausea, warmth and weakness in the pit of the stomach, vertigo and vanishing of ideas from the head; also, two similar attacks in the morning, followed by great weariness, [1] . ► A child four years old constantly desires to be carried, [1] . ► Exhaustion and weariness, in the evening, almost amounting to nausea, [2] . ► *Frequent exhaustion and weariness (first day), [1] . ► Attack of exhaustion of the whole body, especially in the small of the back, the cervical muscles seem relaxed, the arms and legs relaxed as if they would sink down, together with weakness about the heart like a faintness (after a few hours), [1] . [1440.] ► Attack of faintness as soon as he moves but little, [1] . ► A week before the occurrence of menstruation, restlessness as if the menses would appear (sixteenth day), [1] . ► Subjective. ► The whole body is very sensitive; whenever touched or moved it hurts (third and fourth days), [5] . ► Great dread of the open air, [1] . ► Takes cold easily (third day), [1] . ►► *Very much inclined to take cold , [1] . ► Easily takes cold while walking in the open air in the evening, followed by sweat at night, and restlessness and heaviness in the neck as from a weight (fourth day), [1] . ► Takes cold very easily after becoming heated on moving about; he loses his appetite and is attacked with febrile shivering, diarrha with griping pain in the abdomen, restless sleep, etc., [1] . ► Symptoms of taking cold from every draft of air, [1] . ► Her flesh feels numb to her, [8] . [1450.] ► Her flesh all over feels swelled to her, [8] . ► If she looks down without bending head down she feels weak and trembling, [8] . ► Feeling of weakness every morning, as if he would become faint or attacked by vertigo (first six days), [1] . ► Feeling of emptiness over the whole body, as if hollow, [1] . ► *Heaviness, especially of the feet; walking becomes irksome , [1] . ► Heaviness of the body, in the morning in bed, disappearing after rising, [1] . ► Heaviness and prostration of the whole body, as if worn out, [5] . ► A kind of tension within the body, which extends to the head and eyes, [1] . ► Drawing pain in the whole body, now in one place, now in another, in the nape of the neck, scapulæ, the hands and knees (after ten days), [1] . ► *Twitching here and there in the muscles , for several days, [6] . [1460.] ► Uneasy sleep at night, on account of pressive pain in the side of the body upon which he lies, [1] . ► Oppression and anxiety at night if she lies upon the right side, is obliged to sit up in bed until she has eructations, [1] . ► Sticking is the most characteristic pain of Kali , [3] . ► Itching stitches here and there in the body, [1] . ► Flesh feels tender all over as if the skin were crushed, [8] . ► Bruised pain in all the muscles of the body, [1] . ► Pain as if suppurating, when pressing upon any part of the body, [1] . ► Painful throbbing in the clavicle, shoulders, sides of the abdomen, etc., [5] . ► Excessive pain in the whole body, like the beating of a hammer, at night, [1] . ► The rheumatic pains get worse when the neck symptoms increase, [8] . [1470.] ► *The pains recur in the morning, at 2 or 3 o'clock, so that he is unable to remain lying, and are worse than during the day while moving about , [1] . ► Remaining in the open air aggravates the troubles, especially the febrile condition, [1] . ► After the usual stool the pains are renewed, in the morning (second day), [5] . ► Much talking affects her, [1] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-c.

INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► The gait is disturbed, [54] . (after thirteen days), [1] . ► A gnawing pain in the middle of the right thigh, while sitting in the evening with the right thigh over the left (first day), [1] . ► Knee. ► Tearing twitching in the right knee, [1] . ► Tearing above the hollow of the knee, immediately afterwards also below it (second day), [1] . ► Tearing in both knees, at night (after six days), [1] . ► Several transient tearings in the outside of the left knee, while sitting, [1] . ► Violent tearing in the left knee, as if in the periosteum, with a feeling as though it were swollen, at night, lasting two hours (after six days), [1] . ► Leg. ► Swelling of the legs in the evening, [2] . ► Violent gnawing pain in left leg, as if in the periosteum (after several days), [22] . [650.] ► Violent tearing in the right heel, while standing, disappearing on walking (twelfth day), [1] . ► Ulcerative pain in the heels and in all the toes, [1] . ► Toes. ► Tearing in the whole of the right great toe, [1] . ► Tearing in the second toe of the right foot, [1] . ► Two painful tearings in the left great toe, [1] . GENERAL SYMPTOMS. ► Objective. ► Nervo-sanguine temperament, [2] . ► Augmentation of the secretive action of the mucous membranes, especially of those lining the genital organs, [16] . ► Excessively thin, [30] . ► Emaciation , [29] , [55] . ► Considerable emaciation, [53] .
