[680.] ► Great prostration of strength (after four doses), [9] . ► The vital powers were prostrated to the lowest degree, every moment seemed about to snap the thread of his earthly career, [17a] . ► Fell unconscious (fourth day), [15] . ► He emitted a most abominable smell from his whole person, [17a] . ► Great restlessness (three hours after third dose), [26] . ► Great restlessness, with inclination to keep moving, to practice gymnastics, and to squeeze forcibly anything taken into the hands, [2] . ► Extreme restlessness (after one hour), [4] . ► Great nervous mobility, [29] . ► General uneasiness (first three days), [15] . ► Great uneasiness in every position (after three hours), [25] . [690.] ► Agitation and nervous uneasiness, [52] . ► Subjective. ► Nervous susceptibility exaggerated, but without any appreciable localization of disease, [30] . ► Skin very sensitive to cold, [2] . ► Very distressing condition of the nervous system, [53] . ► Nervous irritation harassed him very much, [17] . ► General feeling of weakness and depression, making him incapable of exertion; could scarcely walk or stand, [52] . ► Felt poorly (after third dose), [9] . ► Began to feel unwell (after third dose), [26] . ► General malaise (immediately), [4] . ► During the pains in the kidneys, abdomen, and stomach, vertigo, dulness, intoxicated sensation, malaise, and debility; he does not know what to do with himself, as every position is tire-some and painful, [2] . [700.] ► Indescribable sensation of anguish (soon after), [51] . ► Continual complaints (after one hour), [4] . ► Burning, lancinating, throbbing, pungent, and rheumatic pains, and pains in the bones, especially at the beginning of the cold season, after excesses, or resulting from syphilitic affections, [2] . ► Pinching here and there in the whole body, worse in the evening (after fourteen days), [1] . ► Tearing here and there in the whole body, for several days in succession (after eight days), [1] . ► (Never failed to see a decrease or suspension of the pains of the bones), (after one or two days), [14] .

stomach.text: STOMACH. ► Thirst very urgent (third day), [15] . ► Hiccough and vomiting the whole day, [13] . ► Nausea and vomiting with the most violent pains in the stomach, [13] . ► Inclination to vomit on pressing over epigastric region (second day), [15] . ► Vomiting, almost immediately; increased after drinking warm water, [13] . ► Vomited incessantly; the vinegar and water which he drank were instantly rejected (after one hour), [14] . ► It was with the greatest difficulty that he could take any nourishment, since it always caused the most violent pain and frequently vomiting; the vomiting was not persistent, and only occurred after taking food or drink (after six weeks), [13] . ► Burning pains, especially in the epigastric region, aggravated by pressure, for several weeks, [13] . [1710.] ► Burning in the stomach, extending to the mouth, with a sensation of constriction, [13] . ► Fluids had scarcely reached the stomach when they were followed by a sense of burning, and in general, in a few minutes, were rejected by vomiting (second day), [15] . ► Acute pain at stomach, immediately, [15] . ► On pressing over the epigastric region she complained of some uneasiness (second day), [12] .

STOMACH. ► Appetite. ► Improvement of the appetite, [24] . ► Appetite usually increased; it is remarkable how soon after taking Iodine the desire for food arises (first day); diminishing or disappearing (second day), [14] . ► Great hunger, but he can scarcely eat on account of bad digestion, nausea, and vomiting, [2] . ► Bulimy, [52] . ► Desire for milk, wine, and spirits, [2] . ► Loss of appetite, [27] . ► Total want of appetite; or rather she was convinced she could not eat, [56] . ► Anorexia, [24] , [53] . [320.] ► Aversion to all food, [2] ; (after seventeen days), [1] . ► Aversion to broth, [1] . ► Thirst. ► *Thirst , [24] ; several evenings in succession (after five days), [1] . ► Constant thirst (after fourth dose), [9] . ► Great thirst; the whole day and even at night (after three and fifteen days), [1] . ► Eructation and Hiccough. ► Eructations with taste of food long after eating, [2] . ► Frequent gulping eructations of a large quantity of air, [1] . ► Frequent regurgitations of bitter matter, with desire to vomit, [2] . ► Raising of phlegm morning and evening, and often after meals, [2] . ► Hiccough, in the evening (after four days), [1] . [330.] ► Very frequent, empty, hiccough-like eructations, [1] . ► Constant inclination to waterbrash, without its really occurring, [1] . ► Nausea and Vomiting. ► *Nausea (immediately), [4] . ► Nausea in the stomach, even vomiting, [1] . ► Nausea, with pressure in the stomach, [1] . ► Nausea, with great straining, and tearing sensation in the chest, [2] . ► Frequent nausea, [2] . ► Constant nausea, accompanied with frequent vomiting and smart fever (fourth day), [34] . ► Slight nausea, [12] . ► Retching (three hours after third dose), [26] . [340.] ► Inclination to vomit after an embrace, [2] . ► *Vomiting , [27] . ► Vomiting and purging at the same time (after fourth dose), [9] . ► Copious and painful vomiting, frequently after meals, with drawing in the stomach extending to the back, and colic, [2] . ► *Violent vomiting, with accumulation of saliva (after one hour), [25] . ► Spontaneous vomiting of a yellow fluid, tasting strongly of Iodine (after one hour), [4] . ► Vomiting of food and bile mixed with blood, [2] . ► Frequent and painful vomiting of food, bile, and blood, [2] . ► Vomiting of blood, preceded by heat and burning in the stomach, [2] . ► Stomach. ► Indigestion, [5] . [350.] ► Digestion constantly deranged, [2] . ► The stomach feels empty and hungry, being unable either to retain or digest anything, [2] . ► Pain in the stomach like an emptiness and coldness, not relieved by warm soup, in the evening (sixteenth day), [1] . ► Feeling of great emptiness and qualmishness in the stomach, not relieved after eating (after twenty-one days), [1] . ► Sensation as if the stomach were full of bile, [2] . ► Constant "cracking and crying" in the stomach (seventeenth and eighteenth days), [1] . ► Discomfort in the stomach, [1] . ► After the pains in the abdomen have lasted for some time, the stomach also begins to pain, and both then together disappear, [1] . ► Pain in the cardiac portion of the stomach (after large doses), [16] . ► Slight pain and heaviness in the stomach (first day); the pain, however, is not always present; diminishing or disappearing (second day), [14] . [360.] ► Sudden attack of severe gastralgia, lasting several months, [50] . ► Burning at the epigastrium, [24] . ► Burning sensation and very acute pain at the epigastrium (immediately), [4] . ► Burning in stomach during digestion, [52] . ► Burning in the stomach, as if there was a charcoal furnace in it, [2] . ► Burning and pressure in the stomach, relieved by eructations, but immediately returning, [1] . ► Burning pains in the stomach, with throbbing and contraction, [2] . ► Terrible burning externally in the pit of the stomach, as if the place were inflamed, [1] . ► Pains, as if the stomach was perforated, [2] . ► Sensation as if from corrosive ulcers in the stomach, [2] . [370.] ► Painful beating in the left side of the epigastric region, in the evening, [1] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Kali-i.

STOMACH. ► Nausea, retching, and vomiting of mucus and water, then bloody mucus, [52] . ► In three hours nausea and griping set in; these continued to increase to the eleventh hour, when some whiskey and nutmeg which had been taken was vomited. At the twelfth hour, violent watery purging in large quantity set in and continued for an hour, and the pain ceased. On the morning of the third day he felt a good deal of lumbar aching, which he attribued to the confinement. At midday he took 2 ounces of Hollands in cold water; an hour after he passed water, which was coffee-colored from admixture of blood, [53] . ► Burning in the stomach, [52] .

skin.text: SKIN. ► Objective. ► Redness of skin, as after strong friction, [2] . ► Skin dried up, and as if glued to the bones, [2] . ► Skin in general rough, like hog skin, [3] . ► Skin easily injured, the slightest wound tends to become a bad sore, [2] . ► Swellings resembling condylomata or wens, [2] . ► Eruptions, Dry. [710.] ► Different forms of cutaneous disease, as acne, eczema, and purpura, [16] . ► Cutaneous eruption, sometimes; when these eruptions make their appearance the patient is disquieted; they are generally of the character of urticaria; if the medicine be continued they assume the character of eczema and prurigo; in some cases, especially when the eruption appears on the face, a congestion of the cellular tissue, beneath the skin, is added to the other symptoms, giving rise to slight excrescences, having the appearance of tubercles; the eruption will disappear in a few days, after discontinuance of the medicine, [11] . ► Different eruptions, and more especially eruptions of a psydracious form, somewhat resembling the pustules of acne, with this difference, that they are not confined to the parts habitually affected with acne; thus they are found not only on the face and shoulders, but on every part of the body without exception; in one case we may have eczema, in the other herpes, while in others it may cause simple erythema; in two patients, at two different periods, there appeared an eruption of papulous erythema on some parts, of erythema nodosum on others, and in a patient affected with cancer of the face, to whom it was given in rather large doses, it on several occasions caused an eruption of impetigo on the hairy scalp, and of a rupia, offering the characters of a cachectic rupia, on the legs and forearms, symptoms which disappeared as soon as the remedy was omitted, and showed themselves again when its use was renewed, [10] . ► Miliary and urticarious or vesicular eruptions, with itching and burning, which allow no rest, [2] . ► Purpura, in a predisposed subject, and of course erythema and other symptoms of iodism, [44] . ► Many small yellow spots appear, now in one place, now in another, which exfoliate, like herpes, [2] . ► Blotches on the face and other parts of the body (after a few doses), [39] . ► Red blotches on different parts of the face, [2] . ► I have seen it produce on three several occasions, after a fortnight's use, a genuine spotted disease on the legs of a gentleman; in the case of a lady I ordered it for removal of very serious tertiary symptoms of syphilis; it caused towards the termination of the cure a petechial eruption on the lower limbs, [10] . ► Erysipelatous swelling and redness of both cheeks, extending towards the temples, with a few spots on the forehead (second day), [35] . [720.] ► Several pimples on the chin and nose (after five days), [1] . ► Red pimples, miliary eruptions, with great itching of the vulva, [2] . ► A sticking-burning pimple in the skin, below the corner of the mouth, [1] . ► A sensitive pimple on the cheek, surrounded by redness and swelling (after six days), [1] . ► A very sensitive pimple on the nostril (after five days), [1] . ► Miliary eruptions, with burning-itching and palpitation in the face, [2] . ► Dry tetter as large as a penny on the cheek, with violent itching (after ten days), [1] . ► Itching tetter on the face (after fourteen days), [1] . ► Eruptions, Moist. ► Scaly herpes, with large copper-colored pimples on the face, [2] . ► Syphilitic-looking herpes, difficult to cure, especially on the cheeks, and in the beard, [2] . [730.] ► Eczema impetiginoides (in one case), [14] . ► A small pimple on the chin, which itches very much, and exudes water, [1] . ► Vesicles and yellow liver-spots on the face, [2] . ► After tearing in right wrist, itching on it, not relieved by scratching, followed by the appearance of an itching vesicle (after twelve days), [1] . ► Eruption and herpetic scabs behind the ear, [2] . ► Herpetic eruptions and obstinate ulcers on both lips, [2] . ► Severe corrosive herpes on the prepuce, [2] . ► Erysipelas of the face (after taking it three or four days); some time afterwards it was given again with exactly the same result; after an interval of several months, he began to take the medicine a third time; after about a fortnight he was attacked with erysipelas of the face, scalp, neck, etc., rather severely, [45] . ► Eruptions, Pustular. ► The most frequent eruption is the pustule of acne, which shows itself from the end of the first to the second day; it most frequently occurs on the face; it does not usually last as long as the treatment, that is, it disappears in fifteen or twenty days, [14] . ► A long-continued use of Iodide of potassium will, in some subjects, occasion an eruption, generally of a pustular form (almost always ecthyma), [48] . [740.] ► Pustular herpes, often ulcerated, and with small red veins on the face, [2] . ► Phlegmonous swellings, as from bruises, [2] . ► Suppurating ulcers, such as arise from burns and bruises, [2] . ► Inflammatory swellings, which assume a gangrenous character, [2] . ► Small ulcers, with raised borders and grayish bases, on the vulva, [2] . ► Ulcers corroding to the bone, on the head, nose, arms, and legs, [2] . ► Eruption on the face (after some days); subsequently all over the body; maculæ first of a dark-red color came out, which gradually got darker, until the spots, resembled purpura; the cuticle next became raised over some of the spots, and was filled with a fluid of a purple color, constituting large bullæ an inch in diameter; on the cuticle giving way the true skin was found sphacelated underneath; the ulcers continued over a month, [17] . ► He presented a most grotesque appearance, looking more like a leopard than, a man; he was mottled all over with spots; those on his face were purple, whilst those on the lower extremities were of a dark-red color; the spots on the legs came out last; there were two large bullæ on the forehead, one on the lip, two under the left clavicle, two on the inside of the right thigh, one on the side of the prepuce; after a few days the prepuce corresponding to the bullæ had sphacelated, and the integuments of the penis, as far as the pubis, were involved in mischief; mortification had also seized upon the lip and the other parts specified as having bullæ; the eruption disappeared first from the face, and afterwards from the lower extremities; the sphacelated parts were thrown off, including the whole penis, body, and integuments, from the pubis, not leaving a vestige of it behind, [17a] . ► The tip of the left thumb is ulcerated and yellow, as if it would break, which, however, it does not do (after forty-one days), [1] . ► Ulcerated chilblains, [2] . ► Subjective. [750.] ► Some patients have experienced only a feeling of heat and pricking of the skin, attended at times with more or less pruritus, [10] . ► Great itching all over, especially on the face, arms, and thighs, [2] . ► Violent biting on the nape of the neck and on the forehead, which burn after scratching (fourth day), [1] . ► Itching on the right nates, disappearing after scratching (after eighteen days), [1] . ► Itching on the inner side of the right upper arm; after scratching there remains for several days a dry, red spot, which at first itches (after fifteen days), [1] . ► Itching on the right instep, worse after scratching, in the evening (after four days), [1] . ► Great itching of the pubis, [2] .

SKIN. ► Objective. ► Surface of the body pale, but warm and moist (second day), [48] . ► Small itching spots on the neck and left forearm, red when touched, [13] . ► A dull-greenish spot on the left side of the thigh (this spot might have been there longer, since there was no sensation that called my attention to it; it was not caused by contusion), (after fifteen days), [26] . ► A wartlike elevation on the left cheek becomes larger and itches, [13] . ► Eruptions, Dry. [990.] ► Numerous pimples on the nape and occiput, which disappear the following day (after thirty days), [12] . ► Many pimples on the nape of the neck, [13] . ► Itching pimples on the size of peas on the body, even on the face, only not on the hands and feet, [12] . ► Itching pimples on the right nates after scratching (after thirty-two days), [13] . ► Itching at times, burning or biting pimples on the nape of the neck, on the forepart of the nose, throat, and right elbow, where she had to scratch them bloody, [13] . ► A small pimple on the shoulder, with violent sticking pains and irritation to scratch it off, [15] . ► Eruptions, Moist. ► Blisters on the upper lip, with inflamed areola and tensive pain (after sixteen hours), [13] . ► Small vesicles, which change to pustules, on the face and other parts of the body (second day), [9] . ► Burning vesicles full of thin yellow fluid, here and there; after scratching they burst and the burning ceases (after thirty-four days), [14] . ► Many itching pimples on the right forearm, which exude water on scratching, [13] . [1000.] ► A large painless pimple like "water-pock" on the inner margin of the lower lip, which after several days became smaller and at last disappeared without breaking (second day), [22] . ► Eruptions, Pustular. ► Small, painless pustule with red base on the nape of the neck, [13] . ► A tensive painful pustule on the left side of the nose, [13] . ► A boil on the right shoulder, with tensive pain, [13] . ► A boil on the lower portion of the thumb, [12] . ► Subjective. ► Some stitches on the skin, especially on the chest, on every motion, [13] . ► Stitches as with needles followed by burning on the skin, especially on the face, [14] . ► Itching, especially on the legs and tibiæ, so that she was obliged to scratch them bloody; with red spots here and there (after twenty days), [14] . ► Itching here and there in the evening, obliging scratching, [15] . ► Itching with stitches here and there in the evening after lying down, [13] . [1010.] ► Itching in several parts also on the scalp; at times she was obliged to scratch it till it bled, after which it burned and pained, [13] . ► Itching in various places several times; also on the inner side of the right great toe, as if it had been frostbitten (ninth day), [29a] . ► Tickling itching here and there over the whole body, on the left thumb, right side of the nose, right meatus, left upper arm, hollow of the right knee, left cheek and concha, sole of the right foot, back, right tibia, right axilla, left thigh, scalp, scrotum, etc., as if feathers were lightly drawn over the surface (immediately), [29a] . ► (During this proving he suffered less than usual from the extreme itching of the skin of the whole body), [28] . ► Itching biting in the left knee, [13] . ► Crawling in the hands and feet, as from ants; also later on the tongue, [13] . ► Tickling in the left upper arm, left ear, leg, and scrotum (sixth day), [29a] . ► Itching on the right side of the nose, and afterwards fine sticking in the tip of it, towards evening (fifth day), [14] . ► Itching and crawling in the tip of the nose (twenty-second day), [14] . ► (Itching here and there on the chest, feet, etc.), (eleventh day), [29] . [1020.] ► Itching on the right forearm, with pimples after scratching, [13] . ► Itching on the right arm, middle finger of the right hand, on the left cheek, on the small of the back, the left lower leg, etc., in the evening (eighth day), [29a] . ► Itching on the left elbow, on the anterior and inner sides of the right thigh (second day), [29a] . ► Violent itching on the upper margin of both orbits, frequently (fourth day), [13] . ► Frequent violent itching of the face, [12] .
